name: Senate GOP
subject: Your signature is needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, **2024 is approaching fast and Joe Biden is ruining our country even faster...**

Currently, Democrats have control of the Senate and the White House. This majority**** allows them to _halt ALL Republican priorities_ like securing the border, lowering grocery prices, ending the woke indoctrination of our kids in schools, holding Joe Biden accountable, and standing up to our enemies abroad.

Winning back a Republican Majority in the Senate is **VITAL** to saving America because if we don’t, Democrats will continue to **VOTE DOWN** our priorities.

We are up for a battle[](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=9a2cdb51c34b429ea847c4663b72bd7d&_e=PiPCn6nytk_BEgM_Ey_1XoMNdeb67Bu3mcacbv-CA7Axrmj7LJ47EsjqNY6NCKlAQr_HoRPzEtBBkgLsRtuUdrnKqfzjCQwuTXaWUMB-5Qg5gDHhX2olhc7-Wr_BQX173iA0DIWyD7SgTpT9_TSAeaIm9a1xNO6D2H-Wi4c3TDULzIk4vp4OVxrUzXXZdeAR_ts0zO2aSvZbBPcMFPbqneAMjupgw2JNshFblqd0UBDClbJv3xuuHAW2MUhiVlDPWIUDi0m2pm5-63lsg-EDH6Sf_UGL6LHldu9bfQTQwDROiMHf0Omg6U4ZLqC5tnofqsi2LAOKW1b025o7lYnU5Vm02Fw8QqmxNxhgKPdw6AQe4G-4EAAxaYJLMn7ZDZ7s)[](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=9a2cdb51c34b429ea847c4663b72bd7d&_e=PiPCn6nytk_BEgM_Ey_1XoMNdeb67Bu3mcacbv-CA7Axrmj7LJ47EsjqNY6NCKlAQr_HoRPzEtBBkgLsRtuUdrnKqfzjCQwuTXaWUMB-5Qg5gDHhX2olhc7-Wr_BQX173iA0DIWyD7SgTpT9_TSAeaIm9a1xNO6D2H-Wi4c3TDULzIk4vp4OVxrUzXXZdeAR_ts0zO2aSvZbBPcMFPbqnZ-Dv23sjoOfiZd8GWhcAr2MmbmdVYAq-IFlmCpmDbqGL6vSAibjk2-BQFeHAW7V4DfgUDQZyy4MIj74hKn-GTSiNr5Ec0SzGaTLqM1z3_YwB2ZOaLVpiiMNrzJXcReYZnUina_DU-na0QgZ63JrPPRRa2s00eAZuvqh9TRFSESU) because Democrats are raising MILLIONS from thousands of donors in liberal pockets of California, New York, and other left-leaning states.

Friend,
Reports indicate that my upcoming _unjust_ **ARREST** in Atlanta will be **TELEVISED** for the entire world to see.
The Sheriff publicly declared that a **MUGSHOT** will be "ready" for me.
This is just like when the FBI **RAIDED** my home and staged it to look like a made-for-TV crime scene with police sirens and flashing red and blue lights.
And how can we forget the time when they tried to **FRAME** me as an asset of the Russian government and a traitor to our country?
_The pattern is undeniably clear._
The Deep State has done everything in their power to try and paint me as a villain - all while the _REAL_ villains, nestled deep within the Washington, D.C. swamp, quietly get away with bleeding our country dry.
And now, it's being reported that I could potentially face 1,000 YEARS in prison.
The Deep State wants to make an example out of me...
...They want to show the nation that these are the consequences of choosing to put a political outsider in the White House.
This is ultimately about instilling **_FEAR_** in the public.
**The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs. **
**The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their Public Enemy #1.**
Together, we will PEACEFULLY show the Deep State that their intimidation tactics cannot work on the American people.
No matter how much they attack our movement, we will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_If you are doing poorly due to the very sinister and corrupt people running Washington right now, please do not donate. I mean it._
Otherwise, I don't have to tell you how critical these times are for our country. America needs you now more than ever before.

The Sheriff publicly declared that a MUGSHOT will be "ready" for me. This is just like when the FBI RAIDED my home and staged it to look like a made-for-TV crime scene with police sirens and flashing red and blue lights. And how can we forget the time when they tried to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government and a traitor to our country? The pattern is undeniably clear. The Deep State has done everything in their power to try and paint me as a villain - all while the REAL villains, nestled deep within the Washington, D.C. swamp, quietly get away with bleeding our country dry. And now, it's being reported that I could potentially face 1,000 YEARS in prison. The Deep State wants to make an example out of me... ...They want to show the nation that these are the consequences of choosing to put a political outsider in the White House. This is ultimately about instilling FEAR in the public. The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs. The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their Public Enemy #1. Together, we will PEACEFULLY show the Deep State that their intimidation tactics cannot work on the American people. No matter how much they attack our movement, we will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! If you are doing poorly due to the very sinister and corrupt people running Washington right now, please do not donate. I mean it. Otherwise, I don't have to tell you how critical these times are for our country. America needs you now more than ever before. | | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: REMINDER: Mifepristone is still safe, effective, and widely available!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends, you likely saw this news about the latest in the court battles around abortion medication, but I want to flag this very important reminder: Mifepristone is still safe, effective, and widely available .
And I’m going to keep fighting to make sure it stays that way.
Because if I’ve said it once, I’ve said it a thousand times - ABORTION RIGHTS ARE A KITCHEN TABLE ISSUE!
Here’s the hard part, though. While Republicans continue to try to weaponize the courts to enact their anti-abortion agenda, they’re also doing every single thing in their power to expand their House majority and get control of the Senate and the White House so they can pass a nationwide abortion ban.
We can’t give a single inch in this fight, because if we do, they’ll take a mile - at the expense of women and people in need of reproductive care all across the country.
So will you pitch in any amount right now to make sure we hold my seat and flip the House next November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=5]
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=10]
Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=20]
Donate other amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
I’m going to fight tooth and nail to continue representing you in the House, to support other pro-choice Democrats on the ballot in 2024, and to pass federal legislation that will protect reproductive freedom and abortion rights. But I can’t do any of it without your support.
Thank you so much.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: You’ll never believe who President Biden smuggled into the White House
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 21, 2023

You'll never believe
who President Biden smuggled into the White House
Joe Biden has been involved
in quite a few scandals over the years. But this one takes the
cake.

And you'll never believe who
President Biden smuggled into the White House.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Hillary Clinton knows
something about Joe Biden that will sink his campaign

Hillary Clinton made
a big mistake back in 2016. President Biden is making the same
one.
➞ Continue Reading

Trump is nowhere to be
found after abruptly canceling historic event

Former President
Trump was about to crack his election case wide open. Now he's
missing in action.
➞ Continue Reading

This Democrat Senator made
a massive mistake that has all hell breaking loose

The Democrat Party
seems to trip over themselves with every chance they get. There
might not be a recovery from this misstep.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: SmartAsset
subject: Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
body:
It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms.

| | | |
---
|
## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21994%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7AOuYZP%2b3QCnQeseHIqTTw&sysid=1 "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| Find up to three advisors that serve your area, free!
---
| | | [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21905%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4L40YZu%2bVIeu%2fffRnBf8sQ&sysid=1)
---
| It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms stack up so you can decide on the best fit for you.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21906%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RSRCCwWm3FX7f4mGg4sFcQ&sysid=1)
### Overview of Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
Vanguard made a name for itself by creating and offering low-fee investment products such as mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs). It still does this, and even non-Vanguard clients can buy Vanguard funds via a brokerage account. The firm has grown to now offer non-proprietary investment products and funds.

Fidelity is perhaps best known for its personal investment products, namely brokerage accounts that allow users to trade stocks. Clients can invest in a wide range of stocks, bonds and other investment products using a Fidelity brokerage account. Fidelity also makes an effort to provide investment resources to its clients and doesn’t usually charge fees on all trades, though more and more brokerages and broker-dealers are moving toward fee-free investment models.

Schwab has a number of passively and actively managed funds that you can invest your money into. You also have the option to trade individual equities. It also offers free robo-advisor services, and those who want to work with a real advisor will have that option as well. [Learn how the fees compare here.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21907%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZZPTEbStgEfcEmo6AT2P%2bQ&sysid=1)

### How to Speak With a Financial Advisor

If you’re interested in getting financial advice, consulting a fiduciary financial advisor can be a great first step. That’s why SmartAsset created a [free tool](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21908%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BCRm5Upfk5OZLRqOECk2AQ&sysid=1) to help match you with up to three financial advisors who serve your area. All advisors on the matching platform have been rigorously vetted through a proprietary due diligence process.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1 It's never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement.
### [See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21909%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J0PycMPR1pQ%2fN7e%2buP%2f97g&sysid=1)
---
|
---
|
### **Unlock Your Retirement Potential with a Professional**
Are you prepared for the retirement you want? This simple quiz matches you with up to 3 fiduciaries who can help you take steps toward a more comfortable retirement.
---
| [Get Started](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21900%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZDhhc1JH5e%2fPnEJGluXOKg&sysid=1 "Get Started")
---
| SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
|
---
|
---
| | | Unless otherwise indicated, information is as of 5/4/2023. SmartAsset has no obligation to update any content in this article. This article may potentially include a firm or firms that have a business relationship with SmartAsset, in which SmartAsset is compensated for lead referrals or cost per engagement. SmartAsset is not a client of the aforementioned firms. SmartAsset did not receive compensation for including any of the firms in the aforementioned article. This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. Sources:
1. ["Journal of Retirement Study Winter" (2020)](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21901%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7%2fTveWB8J7kOYFlj%2bCrwgA&sysid=1). The projections or other information regarding the likelihood of various investment outcomes are hypothetical in nature, do not reflect actual investment results, and are not guarantees of your future results. Please follow the link to see the methodologies employed in the [Journal of Retirement study](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21902%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0QLJDbKH%2bCpaY%2fQN6IyndQ&sysid=1).

Overview of Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab Vanguard made a name for itself by creating and offering low-fee investment products such as mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs). It still does this, and even non-Vanguard clients can buy Vanguard funds via a brokerage account. The firm has grown to now offer non-proprietary investment products and funds. Fidelity is perhaps best known for its personal investment products, namely brokerage accounts that allow users to trade stocks. Clients can invest in a wide range of stocks, bonds and other investment products using a Fidelity brokerage account. Fidelity also makes an effort to provide investment resources to its clients and doesn’t usually charge fees on all trades, though more and more brokerages and broker-dealers are moving toward fee-free investment models. Schwab has a number of passively and actively managed funds that you can invest your money into. You also have the option to trade individual equities. It also offers free robo-advisor services, and those who want to work with a real advisor will have that option as well. How to Speak With a Financial Advisor If you’re interested in getting financial advice, consulting a fiduciary financial advisor can be a great first step. That’s why SmartAsset created a to help match you with up to three financial advisors who serve your area. All advisors on the matching platform have been rigorously vetted through a proprietary due diligence process. While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1 It's never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement. | | Unlock Your Retirement Potential with a Professional Are you prepared for the retirement you want? SmartAsset has no obligation to update any content in this article. SmartAsset is not a client of the aforementioned firms. SmartAsset did not receive compensation for including any of the firms in the aforementioned article. This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Committee To Elect Stephen McDow
subject: A Frederick Post Column From Stephen
body:
A servants heart!
| | |
---
---
|
---
| | Greetings Friends!
Great few weeks of August. I attended the Frederick Fair and met really great voters. Team McDow did lots of door knocking and meeting with people from different aspects of the community.
Remember to support our efforts to bring commons sense solutions to our district, state, and country.

Check out my Frederick Post column.
Follow: [www.mcdowforcongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KjVtWiEJ_QgGxTGENdzHwMHp3NSHHa9fUigYOXcUyfp5oaavm05U93ngPsKyycsNjFIgaYCm7ispxi2iVhuhih_KEUhx6gYVbnw_D8B5CkmdDZhFYkMtCnR2Von-6lCfXNqtTjJGRn-JZiH-Mv7ImN5vmXSYlvlu&c=OYJyxpjPlWAbzHx6XHhnjqfvIv4ckEVr6P4cSBsFswYDYtYgg4TheA==&ch=bRma5f6evHZnS6zXXf8m7ppOOUQryUpWdUkzyZRVYKJTkuR96jUIkg==).

Best,
Stephen
---
|
---
| |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KjVtWiEJ_QgGxTGENdzHwMHp3NSHHa9fUigYOXcUyfp5oaavm05U91JzMIa1LSdySB96G_5cePrOGIWcV1r1hiD-pzHTcW3Yd8FDoPvtj2MoA9uD44iVUNcBTTlE4aQJqZsEoQi-XpFEe_uucfrdBzxpyUZ_btf0&c=OYJyxpjPlWAbzHx6XHhnjqfvIv4ckEVr6P4cSBsFswYDYtYgg4TheA==&ch=bRma5f6evHZnS6zXXf8m7ppOOUQryUpWdUkzyZRVYKJTkuR96jUIkg==)
---
| Before I decided to run for Congress in Maryland's 6th District, I asked myself if it was for vanity or serving people. After prayer and discussion with my family, I know it's because I have a servant's heart.
My body of work symbolizes my commitment to service. I understand that Main Street and small businesses need leaders to listen, not government leaders who tell communities what they want instead of asking what they need, while using people as talking points during elections.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BREAKING: Team DeSantis plan to attack Vivek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Ron DeSantis' Super PAC released a memo with plans to come after me at the debate. We need your help to build our rapid response.

|

Fellow American - I just got word that "Robot Ron" DeSantis and his Super PAC plan to come after me during next week's Presidential Debate.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664273%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QLSyJb2E8XwMqt7RH4cceA&sysid=1)
**Fellow American DeSantis is going to come out swinging.** **[Will you stand with me in the next 30 mins to help us build our rapid response team for debate night?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664274%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FfTD%2ftehB8GW25VMhYF6gg&sysid=1)**

| [Chip in $5 ➔](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664285%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zi9xS2s30I5Lt9SpHSDnUQ&sysid=1) | | [Chip in $10 ➔](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664286%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3YQdoPbnd4TvPiykGKCcTg&sysid=1)
---|---|---
[Chip in $20 ➔](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664287%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O7YwYziOuhWKjf2WsUOF4g&sysid=1) | | [Chip in $50 ➔](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664288%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=an7TJ%2fSs06T560WmrT6M5g&sysid=1)

Fellow American take a look at the memo the DeSantis Super PAC released today for yourself.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664273%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QLSyJb2E8XwMqt7RH4cceA&sysid=1)
The "hammer" is coming down, so we must be ready. I've been approaching debate prep in an unconventional manner, but we must be ready to respond to the attacks on debate night.

I wouldn't ask if this wasn't important, Fellow American. **[Please,_in the next 30 minutes_ , chip in whatever you can to help us build our Debate Night response team.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664289%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QibxwLhgIBJcP%2f90GjS7ow&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664273%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QLSyJb2E8XwMqt7RH4cceA&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** FIGHT BACK →**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664280%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C6PJ%2fcwdC8VBdBX1mdp5Og&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664281%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jr6WxaXmC4G24MAEmdRFAw&sysid=1)

---

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664282%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zJ9VcsMFO6De6zA7ARs55Q&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664283%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GaZil6XX8Z%2fj3HDpt7TmKQ&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664284%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gxrPaxV9cSmS%2f0L0sHWCMg&sysid=1)
---|---|---

name: SmartAsset
subject: Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
body:
It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms.

| | | |
---
|
## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4h9vlq2qlohgvgvupsp4humgo32ub3qttoshvvg_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdi6eob6c5h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| Find up to three advisors that serve your area, free!
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2od567161nudlpiajo4nj603kt1eqkv8803784g_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdi6eob6c5h2bs)
---
| It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms stack up so you can decide on the best fit for you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhm4fjjn1fful3q4kvsc9obhmupg7pqdmrlkv0n8_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdi6eob6c5h2bs)
### Overview of Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
Vanguard made a name for itself by creating and offering low-fee investment products such as mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs). It still does this, and even non-Vanguard clients can buy Vanguard funds via a brokerage account. The firm has grown to now offer non-proprietary investment products and funds.

Fidelity is perhaps best known for its personal investment products, namely brokerage accounts that allow users to trade stocks. Clients can invest in a wide range of stocks, bonds and other investment products using a Fidelity brokerage account. Fidelity also makes an effort to provide investment resources to its clients and doesn’t usually charge fees on all trades, though more and more brokerages and broker-dealers are moving toward fee-free investment models.

Schwab has a number of passively and actively managed funds that you can invest your money into. You also have the option to trade individual equities. It also offers free robo-advisor services, and those who want to work with a real advisor will have that option as well. [Learn how the fees compare here.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za67h1ms5hq7irs2kosf1enro8g8fj11ujritd4g_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdi6eob6c5h2bs)

### How to Speak With a Financial Advisor

If you’re interested in getting financial advice, consulting a fiduciary financial advisor can be a great first step. That’s why SmartAsset created a [free tool](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2dn6pnatfdsteglmndk59v3cfmuo55kg3qpj898_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdi6eob6c5h2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors who serve your area. All advisors on the matching platform have been rigorously vetted through a proprietary due diligence process.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1 It's never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement.
### [See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3lnce4g68adjuu8ef7e6447b904t833sv6gaeug_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdi6eob6c5h2bs)
---
|
---
|
### **Unlock Your Retirement Potential with a Professional**
Are you prepared for the retirement you want? This simple quiz matches you with up to 3 fiduciaries who can help you take steps toward a more comfortable retirement.
---
| [Get Started](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvg417ss86cott5886jn6gn8ka3hk37ekjrfv478_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdi6eob6c5h2bs "Get Started")
---
| SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
|
---
|
---

This article may potentially include a firm or firms that have a business relationship with SmartAsset, in which SmartAsset is compensated for lead referrals or cost per engagement. SmartAsset is not a client of the aforementioned firms. SmartAsset did not receive compensation for including any of the firms in the aforementioned article. This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. clean_body: It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. | | | | | Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab | "Take Retirement Quiz" | Find up to three advisors that serve your area, free! | | | | It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services. However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. Overview of Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab Vanguard made a name for itself by creating and offering low-fee investment products such as mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs). It still does this, and even non-Vanguard clients can buy Vanguard funds via a brokerage account. The firm has grown to now offer non-proprietary investment products and funds. Fidelity is perhaps best known for its personal investment products, namely brokerage accounts that allow users to trade stocks. Clients can invest in a wide range of stocks, bonds and other investment products using a Fidelity brokerage account. Fidelity also makes an effort to provide investment resources to its clients and doesn’t usually charge fees on all trades, though more and more brokerages and broker-dealers are moving toward fee-free investment models. Schwab has a number of passively and actively managed funds that you can invest your money into. You also have the option to trade individual equities. It also offers free robo-advisor services, and those who want to work with a real advisor will have that option as well. How to Speak With a Financial Advisor If you’re interested in getting financial advice, consulting a fiduciary financial advisor can be a great first step. That’s why SmartAsset created a to help match you with up to three financial advisors who serve your area. All advisors on the matching platform have been rigorously vetted through a proprietary due diligence process. While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1 It's never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement. | | Unlock Your Retirement Potential with a Professional Are you prepared for the retirement you want? This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Nassau County is NOT a sanctuary county
body:
Peter,

As you might have seen in the news, Queens Borough President Donovan Richards has proposed using the Nassau Coliseum as an emergency shelter for migrants. This move comes as we struggle to deal with the influx of over 100,000 asylum seekers since early 2022.

Nassau County is NOT a sanctuary county, and we must not let the failures of New York City officials spill over into our community. We cannot allow the Nassau Coliseum to become a breeding ground for 100,000 ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS!

I'm committed to fighting against this proposal and need your help. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Nassau+Not+Sanctuary+County+Email]

We need to mobilize support and resources to stop this plan from becoming a reality.

Help us protect our community from this misguided plan. Your support will help us launch an effective campaign against using Nassau Coliseum as a migrant shelter. DONATE NOW → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=second+button&utm_campaign=Nassau+Not+Sanctuary+County+Email]

In addition, I'd like you to share this message with at least five friends and family members. We must raise awareness about this issue and unite our community to oppose this proposal.

Your support is crucial in this fight. Together, we can stand up for Nassau County and ensure our community remains safe and secure. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Nassau+Not+Sanctuary+County+Email]

CHIP IN $10 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=10&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Nassau+Not+Sanctuary+County+Email] CHIP IN $25 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=25&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Nassau+Not+Sanctuary+County+Email] CHIP IN $50 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=50&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Nassau+Not+Sanctuary+County+Email] CHIP IN $100 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=100&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Nassau+Not+Sanctuary+County+Email] CHIP IN $500 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=250&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Nassau+Not+Sanctuary+County+Email] ANY AMOUNT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=other+button&utm_campaign=Nassau+Not+Sanctuary+County+Email]

Thank you for your time, consideration, and support.

Sincerely,

Anthony D'Esposito

Congressman, Nassau County

P.S. - Your support means everything to the people of Nassau County and me. Please consider making a donation and sharing this email with your network. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Nassau+Not+Sanctuary+County+Email] We must send a clear message that we will not let Nassau County become a dumping ground for New York City's problems. Unsubscribe https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-u-pkljrkl-dytjdljkkt-t/

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Joe Biden may start World War III with this awful decision
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 21, 2023

Joe Biden may start
World War III with this awful decision
The war in Ukraine has been
raging for almost two years. But this blunder might have
escalated the war to a new level.

And Joe Biden may start World War
III with this awful decision.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

You'll never believe who
President Biden smuggled into the White House

Joe Biden has been
involved in quite a few scandals over the years. But this one
takes the cake.
➞ Continue Reading

Hillary Clinton knows
something about Joe Biden that will sink his campaign

Hillary Clinton made
a big mistake back in 2016. President Biden is making the same
one.
➞ Continue Reading

Trump is nowhere to be
found after abruptly canceling historic event

Former President
Trump was about to crack his election case wide open. Now he's
missing in action.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

today@thefederalistwire.com

Navy Ensign Charles Hazeltine Hammann was one of the first U.S. military aviators who went to battle when the country entered World War I, so it's fitting that his heroics in the skies over Europe made him the first aviator to earn the Medal of Honor.

[**Will you make a generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more****today to help Turning Point Action build out this MASSIVE and URGENTLY NEEDED ballot chasing initiative -- starting in WISCONSIN?**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zijm255qgvkon68uddnjejhq315c4akfmgmi58b8_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdh64o76clh2bs) Your gift will help Turning Point Action:

* contact voters who have ALREADY received mail-in ballots to encourage them to MARK their ballots and make a plan to VOTE

* **become the DECIDING FACTOR with the KEY voters in the KEY precincts that we must mobilize to WIN BIG in 2024!**

And -- unlike too many Establishment "Leaders" in Washington, D.C. today -- I truly want GRASSROOTS PATRIOTS to win big and bring TRUE CONSERVATIVE PRINCIPLES to the White House and Congress. [**That's why I'm hoping that I can count on YOUR support today for Turning Point Action's BALLOT CHASING program, starting with our $5 MILLION commitment to WISCONSIN.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkusb5p8b6626vikvjnhuqkj0m6s0pk7t4utm2l0_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdh64o76clh2bs) I truly believe this effort will be a GAME-CHANGER in 2024 -- and ONLY Turning Point Action, with the support of grassroots patriots like YOU, can operate this program with the scale, sophistication, and plain old hard work necessary to WIN BIG. That’s why one of the first things I did after being elected was visit our southern border. Look - no matter what Joe Biden and Kamala Harris say, there is a real CRISIS at the border. I saw it with my own two eyes. I talked to people who actually live and work at the border including law enforcement, business owners, and ranchers. I spent time visiting with our brave border patrol officers and hearing about the challenges they face. Yet the Democrats in Washington refuse to do anything about it. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=abc824c16ded63f28eeb463a29e3fbb9efbe87790ed85ebbbb165faca77d72a35932b76d569b9e99d8f6ff9a895774ab451fa473dd4b2604 Border security is an American issue. campaign has the resources we need to keep fighting.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWGYgnqDN4

Friend,

I hate asking for money, but I need your help to make sure my
campaign has the resources we need to keep fighting. I have a
target on my back because the truth of my life disproves the lies
of the radical Left.

Can you help? I'm 17 donors short of my Daily Donor Goal and we
can't afford to fall short this close to the debate.

CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT

Seriously, anything you chip in today will help, whether it's
$3, $30, $300, or even $3,300.

We can't sit on the sidelines and let Biden win this election.
America's future is on the line!

So I'm respectfully asking one more time. Can you give a
critical $3 gift to support my campaign?

If you can afford to help, we could really use it.

CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT

Thank you so much,

Tim Scott

Friend, I
believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative
leadership.

It is
time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect
America. It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud
of our president.

That's
why I announced I am running for President of the United States.

SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE

The
Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness.
Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream
because I have lived it. My family went from cotton to congress
in a single lifetime.

This
isn't going to be easy. I'll need your help to win.

Can you
chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?

This
campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you.
Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden's America, so
even if it's just $5 I would be so grateful.

Thank you
for your support!

-Tim

## Trump May Skip Debate For Tucker Interview
Donald Trump will skip [Wednesday night's GOP presidential debate](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O6yAQRp_G7oiGARtTUNwmXW67pcXPkMwK24iQRHn7Vbbe8vtOc3S-LuvFc-H9-t9v5Ho-Vh87P2mFRaAUqFYck8tESGokJ2eLszQg1XhzoMFkTWRM1hIhgJ1JLkmpjF6lsIzsEFDBghKsMmhOGm2mzzEFMnrSgwZK3I92-j547zfK5X08qZ3isY3F3Xqv90H9G_A84NnXnV73D_qM1jkWGvCcjt2XJHp7bFU0qo9QOPpd1Mabb2-RKPhOwoY5GjI6mkgWlphgwZRVCNLipKY8Npfqi0vh-2wGDdfNc_n16H9n-QkAAP__QqdinQ) and is instead hinting that he'll counter-program the debate with a sit-down interview with Tucker Carlson. The Carlson interview isn't confirmed yet, though sources say it's already been taped. But if it does happen, a Trump-Carlson interview would be a direct slap at Fox News. Regardless, Republican National Committee chairwoman Ronna McDaniel said Sunday she's ["holding out hope"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAURb8Gb0TwIAYPDF28pWtHC-Nn8yoMiJBE_fsqnbvee6Qjna_bcvOUKB-f_kTX97L40OmJi7AcJAe1wLC5HRFQDejkOMEojZBqiE5oWIUXygarjBJXq0fcpV1XPyGK3QzkQIASFqSYlAFz0TDt-B6uKxp91UwL3KiXdvkulHvEPf2UJ7ZLKOeQXOy93pn6YDAzmHvESCm9PwZzLCdmfN0ZzMGf1dORGcxajlJoy1sOPERPjceSNsoHL4_OY6nIe3uclb8oJV596xSo-o6cMj9K5RuuviODeWhuq2-K7qNhWhynpz_30P_P9BsAAP__wIhpbg) that Trump will still join the stage Wednesday night.
## Russian Lunar Lander Crashes Into Moon
Russia's first moon mission in nearly 50 years failed Saturday when its [lunar lander crashed into the moon](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAUhH8N3rDggY0zMHTxlq4dLRweyaswWIBj9d9X7tztdCed7r6v-3J3FCk9P92GtoW8uEejNy5i4iA5qAU6bwMioOrQyvEGozRCqu5lzeSDB1xdCNJrp8Og_OTlOBiDE8DYkQUBSkwgxU0ZML2GW8DLGFY0etBMC_TUcum_M6X2whB_8htL_8hbF-2rtb0y9cFgZjCf59kXPBqWeuUM5vWolLBWBrPDkuvuHsg9BkwVGczlqJVc5VvOiW9UK-XEg4tXA3ehYeF7yWvEjWNqWCg9-V6QR5f8pXNZqfHrAr9oCAZzV6zfT4qR6miYFs_NUfxb2_6H9xsAAP__CK9yuQ) and all contact was lost. A soft landing had been planned for today. The Luna 25 spacecraft began [spinning out of control](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuhSAUxvGngU1zOCDIwNDF7XbtaFAPVxoUo_SSvn1j57v-vuRL_l-P8eFjivvz02_kSsijn0t80Qh9g6JBOSJfXCBCkpyc0Ba1MCAkX92kpPSLtX2warbk-wDUd2BA-6BF53l0CCihRwFWGjStQhvohm4iozrFFNASSz7b7xz3slJIv_lFZzvnjSe3lnJcTH4wHBgOtdZ2muZ7YzjsVK8b85mWhn7OfFCjdadRo-WnW44aU4qXNkzBc_Mx_X-W94l_AQAA__-pXFCK) as it moved into its pre-landing orbit, Russian officials said. The loss is a big blow to Roscocosmos, Russia's civilian space program. The mission was an effort to beat India to a landing on the moon's south pole. India's first lunar mission, moving more cautiously, is set to land on the moon this Wednesday.
## Tropical Storm Hilary Hits California
Tropical Storm Hilary is heading to Southern California, the first tropical storm to hit the area in 84 years, and residents are bracing for [flash floods, mudslides, high winds, and power outages.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOszAQhJ_GdEb22gFcUPwNXf72SrQxS7wnY0fGFy5vfyLFVdeN5huNRvNxna_IkdP9P2401jXP6Cs_aVaDBC3BzNAs40oEZBoadeeg073SpgmjRm9sh4DO0gDODWSss8o40ra_LLrhERQYNYBWzvTQtxbcSqdxuVFvL1ZYRQvXXNrPzKkGWuMrP6m0Pm9NHEOtj12YfwImAdNxHK1PN39CAdNZLWBSg4BJOwFT-CqFPSaSgSOWl6yhEFZKu_RYca8lPwJ7iWmRkVf65Zzuco05L6fgJDf6Zp_fOY-R11wSYxvqFpsyLo-DY-S964VV9w05vsfWv7_7CQAA__8PInDi) Hilary made landfall on Mexico's Baja California peninsula Sunday morning, downgraded from a hurricane to a [still-heavy Category 1 tropical storm](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71urDAQxfGnsTvQePyFCxe3odvbpkTGHhZHBq_AWZS3j0id9nekI_0_HtMj5JL35_-wkW9LnUJs-U0TDB2KDuWEPPmFCEly8sI4NMKCkHz1CLNaCJTWIHFAIV1MKSgI2jqZouHZI6CEAQU4adH2Ct1CN-iZrNKKKaCUWz36z5r3ttJSvuubjj7WjRe_tvY6mfzHcGQ4XtfVz3O8N4bjTtd5Yz1K6r7OLoY9pNAZo7UzKPnh0-vKpeTTWKbguYVcfm_b35U_AQAA__8001Dp). "This is a very, very dangerous and significant storm," said a California official. By Sunday, a number of baseball games were canceled, both Disney and Universal theme parks said they would close early, and a SpaceX launch was postponed.
* * *

➤** ****Hunter Biden 's lawyers **warned prosecutors last year that they would put President Biden on the stand to testify for the defense if the Justice Department brought charges against the president's son. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2P8yAQhH8N7jaC9SeFi7ehy9teaeGwxJwIINgkyr8_-eprZ0ajR8_XdbvaEEO6_7cPWtnnzd44vGiTC6AC7Dfs3OqJkPqOVjVpnNQsVd8d6zjLEZ3bLY29ncgtSu_aa60mNd-kVF1YUWIvF1RS9zPOlwG1pzMYd5qHcRCDJBc418t3DokP8vGTX1Qvt_zo4nowlyb6fwKNQJM-JTc-K4HmPBZo5CLQKC3QHM_EVGEPjlKDaN8fqg34qGSZEjngDOXJUCq1c8OQE_BB0NgmBzv5XAlKJAuObARPMYIttjJUKrmyQNPV1ZV3iDG0aRaDvD9siL-s_Le6nwAAAP__DzxwUw))➤ **Former Arkansas Gov.** Asa Hutchinson has qualified for Wednesday night's GOP primary debate. Hutchinson, a Donald Trump critic, said he would pledge to support the nominee because he's "confident" it won't be Trump. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAUAL8GNiL8wNgeGLp4S9eOFsEP8yoMriGJ8vdVOne9G066r-tydZQob59uR9tCWZxv9MBFjgI6AWoBvtqACKg42s5MYLpBdopHewujx1GDM6M20-RlH4L2YTUBTB9AcrIgQckROjmpAYaLhingG_Q3HHSvmZa4Uivn5btQbhFDepUHnhdfdp5sbO2oTH0wmBnMLWKklN6OwRzLjhmflcHs3X442jKDWXdGjmoQ8d58pFxLFtW9qogooqvi5-4SBcJVhHKKrRxixZtryGDmp12PJ6VE1QxMy2139Nfi7f8tvwEAAP__r3lj3g))➤ **Meanwhile, Miami Mayor** Francis Suarez says he's also qualified for the debates, but the Republican National Committee said he hadn't yet officially met the polling and fundraising criteria. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAURp_G3ojgggMMDF2ypWtH6wLXya3wjzBJlD595c4dv-8sR-frOl6RCy-3T5wptGkdMTV-0iidACVAj9DnMBEB6Z6COns4KyuV7u_BJJ-VIQkerfYKvInODjklRWaKmnoOIEFLB0p6bcGeDPiJjmOIZM1gOiMpc1vr6Xvlpd1pKu_1SfWU1rkv4d7atnf6o4NLBxfcFnrtBzpGbZwKdXCZKi6Jd7E_sNKPmBlnFjO-1yoqbY9YOOEiMkVsJLZKO2damhicd1E7GVUG7dGb7DPpwZEFGHS0fQ15e3EpvJ9tZ-RtRi5_Xu3_TL8BAAD__wfGaEw))➤ **Ukraine** will get its first F-16 fighter jets by January, supplied by the Netherlands and Denmark. The news comes days after the U.S. approved the delivery by the two countries. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyhCAURb8GOxx4oKwFRRq7TZvSQXmsZBEcwHU2X58xddpzm3PP1326Gx98fHyaDXV1aTJL9S-c2I0CpyAmaKx2iICiQc37AXquGBfNqmG2s-0d8E7OvWKqc8syOMWEcCC5xcZrYCDYDTgbhALVShgcXqCbUclOEsnQ-ppy-518rCu68E4vzO2Stibotda9EPFBYCQwnufZZjwq5nLtF0k5WAIjHjntSGA8ntn4iIX-YMBYnv5NI9YVczDRFrofZaVzSqVS4zO16DAuWOhlSa_DjMDYZG3304fgS6-IZI_N-PAnVP_v8xsAAP__xkFnYg))
* * *
_Flying together with:_ [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFu8yAUhZ8GtkSXCwE8MPzSL2_p2tHC5hLfFpvIJqn69pXTtduncz7pSOf9OlwjF15vb3Gh0HId4tT4SQP4E6oT6gFlCpkISUsKynZolQOl5RxiSsYncNFYQOUnP6Y4gbOAo0_UackBATV4VNBph-5ssMt0BJeRnLkYYYASt7qdPyqvbaZcvuuTtvNUF1nC3Np9F_qfwF5gv09zraXmtsXEjesay_7JpeyHffSPZeF2uLp_cBL6vwKBtv6iQBtzfrFxcgvp_sWl8G6dMHBbIpfXaPv7g58AAAD__zRZW5k) You can't eat gold. You've worked hard to grow your wealth and preserve your capital. But what happens:
* _If**inflation keeps climbing**?_ (The Fed's worried about 'upside risks'!)
* _If**Social Security tanks**? (The government itself warns about 2034.)_
* _If China 's **yuan replaces the dollar** as the world's reserve currency? (There are already rumblings...)_
* _If**lockdowns return**? (The CDC is tracking a "highly mutated" variant. Here we go again...)_
* _If ... if... if..._

Perhaps none of this will happen. But **the systems you grew up trusting can - and DO - break.** Modern life has made you dependent on those systems. It wasn't always this way. Chances are, your grandparents knew better. They were resilient. They had knowledge and wisdom. But they forgot to teach you the **Traditional Skills** that make you more resilient, no matter what is happening in the world. You can reclaim that knowledge. clean_body: Donald Trump will skip Wednesday night’s GOP presidential debate and is instead hinting that he'll counter-program the debate with a sit-down interview with Tucker Carlson. | | | | | | MONday, August 21, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date in 1858, Abraham Lincoln met Stephen Douglas in the first of their historic debates over the future of a divided United States. Lincoln lost that Senate election, but the debates helped make him President in 1860. If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Trump May Skip Debate For Tucker Interview Donald Trump will skip and is instead hinting that he'll counter-program the debate with a sit-down interview with Tucker Carlson. The Carlson interview isn't confirmed yet, though sources say it's already been taped. But if it does happen, a Trump-Carlson interview would be a direct slap at Fox News. Regardless, Republican National Committee chairwoman Ronna McDaniel said Sunday she's that Trump will still join the stage Wednesday night. Russian Lunar Lander Crashes Into Moon Russia's first moon mission in nearly 50 years failed Saturday when its and all contact was lost. A soft landing had been planned for today. The Luna 25 spacecraft began as it moved into its pre-landing orbit, Russian officials said. The loss is a big blow to Roscocosmos, Russia's civilian space program. The mission was an effort to beat India to a landing on the moon's south pole. India's first lunar mission, moving more cautiously, is set to land on the moon this Wednesday. Tropical Storm Hilary Hits California Tropical Storm Hilary is heading to Southern California, the first tropical storm to hit the area in 84 years, and residents are bracing for Hilary made landfall on Mexico's Baja California peninsula Sunday morning, downgraded from a hurricane to a . "This is a very, very dangerous and significant storm," said a California official. By Sunday, a number of baseball games were canceled, both Disney and Universal theme parks said they would close early, and a SpaceX launch was postponed. name: Morgan Luttrell
subject: Ending this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell
body:
I'm a combat veteran who served in multiple combat missions in defense of America.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1cc5d1427bed47888cf9f03bd3ab177c&_e=LIK4L1YjBih2tsgxYzwBJvbwcfsTOJeFtZ0bDRY2d_6Td3XF1assyw4Xhl5kha-tOrBPgRJMAhJKcwcfhSp1aGLbDVsYok-oMtS9miBr16fE2f4ENcH8MIDQehJRwmIfrarKJo6OGsg08yKBegSTxYhiWs3vYvQQvyA1C2q7rZExOztFnGcGy8FYUDMMUXzOP3HRZcvoa6YKdIHvpiC3g4Vye3omITvXw66lY30tj9hI9yPHgEPg7mBwv52vm3wzUaHCO4P9np8leLAekEJ3_kveQx9ECF_1APpUkx08VddA2Q2d5idV0fCNdTnyL5U3ab1gVaGh97eaRUgQvtTLHy5UtQ-2uVOmj63CKmPce9LfChYG21LxdsFUjj_xAQmdSXYhSGFG-swHFS3iQueznDHdI0tjRCyGuTsK0KxuKA_XljrjR1T5o5MFtBLJH8R0kHBjPef_0pxnzsLMOQFqzmjjhrLxqgevZujS6g4EQWE%3D)
---

Friend --

My name is Morgan Luttrell.

I'm a combat veteran who served in multiple combat missions in defense of America.

I've seen things I wouldn't wish on my worst enemy. Things I will never be able to unsee.

In 2009, I survived a helicopter crash that should've taken my life but, by the grace of God, I was given a second chance.

No matter how tough or brave you are, nothing is fully in your control. That's why we put our faith in God.

**But -- there are some things we CAN control, and that 's why I'm running for Congress. **

I have to just say it: Biden and the Radical Democrats want me GONE, they want me DEFEATED, they want to END my campaign for good.

But unlike the spineless career politicians, **I 'm not someone who EVER gives up.**

You see, the career DC politicians are living each day by their own agenda -- not thinking about those suffering the consequences.

After my time in the military, I knew that each day that I woke up in America was a gift.

_**The land of the free and home of the brave.**_

But the Biden regime has stripped our nation of our core values and turned us down a path that is leading us toward a dark future.

**So, Friend, I want to humbly ask you right now if you 'll stand with me in my fight for the America we all once knew and loved. **

It is patriots like yourself that have helped change the direction of our country before, but we still need you. Maybe now more than ever.

Please, stand up for America's liberties and freedoms by chipping in just a few bucks today?

---

Together, we can bring America back to her greatness before the Democrats send us further down the dark path we're currently on.

Thank you,

Morgan Luttrell

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Update on my imminent ARREST
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

| | | [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=121e362afc6f43e7ba68ed0f413ddd75&_e=NmjNegkqecpBjYtyJoO-bxf8ti_K1LMQ9XiH5WsbnJpXBPGhWd44KoYWVOJKOgVzOjZnjnJ3xa-u4jh4tOyhSEyLs_cQTXcnSsZ0eQH55m-WhYJdGECeSd4PnswSM75nP1zJYlUXFakAYmWPZKRywlcUqJIvgZd3EBDfP52nYjiwV03q-2oWCSWozh7KL3_hAHm3FOq84yyQ2lQNRnIW2Qz_WhsRwtP8Loz3fyewynbJk-rqiGM1bd7VXdegJMnCNjzCgcXLVeeWwuDK9dOOYRPherxF1NmsfRRpWKwS-pXlaVt-nxAu_qzlLD0b5PA49zKOI8W4vugMpBgd2gERy8MLn9Ogdl00oq7F3-dyKTS75PgZXb5OUIVhbSdSiXnBhxmHpxTALDZoH5Ck7uVDlA%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
Reports indicate that my upcoming _unjust_ **ARREST** in Atlanta will be **TELEVISED** for the entire world to see.
The Sheriff publicly declared that a **MUGSHOT** will be "ready" for me.
This is just like when the FBI **RAIDED** my home and staged it to look like a made-for-TV crime scene with police sirens and flashing red and blue lights.
And how can we forget the time when they tried to **FRAME** me as an asset of the Russian government and a traitor to our country?
_The pattern is undeniably clear._
The Deep State has done everything in their power to try and paint me as a villain - all while the _REAL_ villains, nestled deep within the Washington, D.C. swamp, quietly get away with bleeding our country dry.
And now, it's being reported that I could potentially face 1,000 YEARS in prison.
The Deep State wants to make an example out of me...
...They want to show the nation that these are the consequences of choosing to put a political outsider in the White House.
This is ultimately about instilling **_FEAR_** in the public.
**The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs. **
**The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their Public Enemy #1.**
Together, we will PEACEFULLY show the Deep State that their intimidation tactics cannot work on the American people.
No matter how much they attack our movement, we will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_If you are doing poorly due to the very sinister and corrupt people running Washington right now, please do not donate. I mean it._
Otherwise, I don't have to tell you how critical these times are for our country. America needs you now more than ever before.

body:
Mark's Monday Memo
| | | |
---
# Where I Stand
---
I'm frustrated with the direction of our country. I can no longer sit back and hope someone else will do something about it. That is why I have decided to use my 30 years of military service, my business experience, and my strong ties to our community to run for Congress in Nevada's First Congressional District. I'm asking to be your Representative in Washington, DC. Therefore, I want to be perfectly clear on what I stand for.
Mark Robertson on School Choice: Clark County Public Schools are failing our children. Vast portions of our children are not performing at grade level. Wealthy families have the option to send their children to private schools. I believe all parents, regardless of their income, should have the right to decide which education option is best for their children. That might be public, private, charter, co-op, or home schooling. As your Representative in Congress, I will fight to eliminate the US Department of Education and block grant the $86 billion they spend each year back to the States, in the form of vouchers so that all parents have access to the education funds needed to send their children to schools that are working. Mark Robertson on Inflation and the Economy: I have a degree in finance and an MBA. I've taught finance at UNLV. I know how the economy works, and I know how to balance a budget. We cannot allow the US Government to continue to print and spend money we don't have! Their reckless and out-of-control spending has caused high inflation which makes it hard for Nevada families to buy groceries and gas. As your Representative in Congress, I will fight to balance the budget. I will work hard to eliminate waste, fraud, and abuse so that we do not burden our children and grandchildren with trillions of dollars of debt. I will fight to reduce government regulations that strangle small businesses.
Mark Robertson on Crime: Crime is rising in cities and States led by liberal elected officials. Our brave men and women in law enforcement are under attack by radicals who call for defunding the police. Left-wing prosecutors are releasing criminals back into our neighborhoods. As your Representative in Congress, I will fight for laws that give law enforcement the resources they need to keep our community safe. I will support securing our border to stop the flow of drugs, gangs, and guns into our community. I will fight for legislation that holds prosecutors accountable for their reckless actions. As your Representative I will stand for SCHOOL CHOICE, for a STRONG ECONOMY, and for a SAFE COMMUNITY.
---
Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently:
Q: Clark County has one of the largest school districts in the U.S. Would you support dividing the district into smaller districts, separating Las Vegas from Laughlin, Henderson, etc.? -S.S. A. This is not a federal issue, so as a member of Congress I would not have input on this issue. However, as a parent and grandparent, I support dividing the district into smaller ones so they are more responsive to parents and the needs of students.
Q. What will you do to protect Social Security and Medicare? -B.W. A. Social Security and Medicare are both heading toward a financial cliff. Dina Titus says that she "will not touch your social security." This is like saying you "will not touch" the steering wheel of a car headed for a cliff. Anytime one party talks about the problem, the other party uses that to scare seniors. We must form a bipartisan panel to develop solutions. President Obama formed a blue-ribbon panel that came up with workable solutions, but he didn't have the integrity and courage to see it through. The longer we wait, the harder it will be to fix. We need to fix it now to deliver on the promise we've made the American people.
Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.
---

President Obama formed a blue-ribbon panel that came up with workable solutions, but he didn't have the integrity and courage to see it through. The longer we wait, the harder it will be to fix. We need to fix it now to deliver on the promise we've made the American people. Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question. | == | == *Mark Robertson retired from the Army. Use of his rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Military.* | | | | | | | Robertson For Congress | PO Box 750433, Las Vegas, NV 89136 | | Sent by mailto:mark@robertsonforcongress.com

body:

Friend,
Reports indicate that my upcoming _unjust_ **ARREST** in Atlanta will be **TELEVISED** for the entire world to see.
The Sheriff publicly declared that a **MUGSHOT** will be "ready" for me.
This is just like when the FBI **RAIDED** my home and staged it to look like a made-for-TV crime scene with police sirens and flashing red and blue lights.
And how can we forget the time when they tried to **FRAME** me as an asset of the Russian government and a traitor to our country?
_The pattern is undeniably clear._
The Deep State has done everything in their power to try and paint me as a villain - all while the _REAL_ villains, nestled deep within the Washington, D.C. swamp, quietly get away with bleeding our country dry.
And now, it's being reported that I could potentially face 1,000 YEARS in prison.
The Deep State wants to make an example out of me...
...They want to show the nation that these are the consequences of choosing to put a political outsider in the White House.
This is ultimately about instilling **_FEAR_** in the public.
**The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs. **
**The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their Public Enemy #1.**
Together, we will PEACEFULLY show the Deep State that their intimidation tactics cannot work on the American people.
No matter how much they attack our movement, we will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_If you are doing poorly due to the very sinister and corrupt people running Washington right now, please do not donate. I mean it._
Otherwise, I don't have to tell you how critical these times are for our country. America needs you now more than ever before.

body:
Friend, I would appreciate your feedback on this one. Does this message resonate with you? Do you think this issue important to voters? Please reply to me personally at bob@votedrbob.com, and let me know. Thanks. -Bob
fb.com/groups/womenfordrbob [fb.com/groups/womenfordrbob]
Standing proudly with hardworking Yoopers and Northern Michiganders, I'm committed to championing working-class values, not just because I'm a product of them, but because building the middle class is a moral imperative.
Doesn't this graph tell an important story?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
CONTRIBUTE TO CHANGE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
$51 trillion!
$51 trillion. This staggering amount of money has been transferred from hard-working Americans since 1975.
Friend, let me be very clear: Democrats, especially in Michigan, are doing great work to try to grow the middle class , but to overcome half a century of divestment in the American worker, we have a lot of work to do federally, and I need your help getting to Congress [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] to change the tide for rural Americans.
Can you imagine what it would mean for 90% of Americans if income for the everyday worker kept up with productivity? It would've been an additional $1,144 every single month. Month after month. Year after year.
What is redistribution from the working class?
This transfer of wealth, often referred to as a redistribution from the working class, occurs when economic policies devalue the American worker through income inequality, wage stagnation, and policies that disproportionately benefit the ultra-wealthy and giant corporations.
As a result, a significant portion of the wealth that the working class generates has been redirected to other sectors, contributing to the alarming wealth gap we face today.
But, it's time for a change...
I'm running for Congress because I firmly believe hardworking American workers have been robbed for far too long. I will advocate for policies that support workers, unions, and the American family. I understand the importance of standing with those who have been neglected because I've been fighting for low-income, rural families my entire career. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
➤ This is my story. ➤ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
I grew up in a union home with five siblings. My father was a railroad w orker. My mother; a nurse. Even though we overcame many obstacles with grit and tenacity on the lower end of the working class, I found success, and my childhood was filled with joy, laughter, and love.
But, my story is improbable in today's economy.
My opponent, the GOP Trump sycophant Rep. Jack Bergman, has consistently voted against the people and always in favor of the ultra wealthy and giant corporations. It's time for a working-class champion.
Friend, if you're able, a donation - no matter the amount - can make a real difference [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] in our campaign and help us unseat the person standing in the way of our district's success. Together, we can again rewrite the story and ensure a brighter future for all.
Thank you for your loyalty, generosity, and support.
-Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for Congress
Northern Michigan and the UP
Democrat, MI01

## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab

| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0a6bf3931e44bb0b2809a17ccb2be73&_e=MNjjmtIVu88bReDKNt5wpK07yYYAeqha8pDbHsHEvOTFcRpPV5BUfrOGdfLucH6KMW5c3K3aCoNUz14iIk2UVmqZQdpp3doS0sWRZfzq02fHtQc7wlBIVnyEV4L9BuQLgugsx5mNcPPzs0kKm5ONZjJft3CxWWbcwLEwwwg-YzOuM6aLa-IeA6EyFj3QLSzd6eUHrBzKfcaHuktt8iQhygUPQgkU7E4cUEmWBQ-VQq17I2SGihCOulS3MZSyI6rhadbdWx1ZeHq7yMeKS1Hny7vOZrp4wU9uk33eED2P-m0Jv6CKbk_IFA-1cMxih_tII3lE3kP_XoVDackyOt96boT5ubxx5qeNio-AWucwHrt0JuApaMWxX_GGGUlX5V2CldaWIsPbd9e9rT6t-55O94LBpNxoG2uH1pS6O-G925luVRW_yb44nfJS3yP0AUAco7CkUuBHJTTehQcMQET08w%3D%3D "Take Retirement Quiz")

| It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms stack up so you can decide on the best fit for you.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0a6bf3931e44bb0b2809a17ccb2be73&_e=MNjjmtIVu88bReDKNt5wpGkW5dnW4jDtmpvHIqoxYImtJa7Fn1cUt8ZC3zLNubYiTJpXmBAeoFfAXZ2gYo6tic5ue3dmIxaH5rA4MX_cwnZOvq-KdZ1fImECGxr09kdxsemIP4ChvVRPSySY2evpIg7ASnMR_SG5BhEfIS6bqmfvfV8dNfFoSarBRcjBV4qLRE-83DulcvoqDV1DKaUnppE8EwSRzmCGCdvey8zdCYD5LmKeW2spE_8OETzYsKi3kp3NZxZzrwHEIfeyQ_ok4ycceb4fBK3OJA6BUUQeywqbRbkxpG5XD5J-3RHn2B7cCDkEB1UyDA5uY8AITYDLuOk388CKodaDB3JgPt9UlJwHH-CRQmvaxbKWdv4S-HEQkHF0lhpjYTfTLIOcDbMi8-qZsoOSxXtuDOVpRA1VXbr-vUbZQAb3mR4S1Rvn-pv6sqLjY9_L6Ba9pviU21QVDva-c8Ueag5ZaDRwDlTe9s4%3D)
### Overview of Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
Vanguard made a name for itself by creating and offering low-fee investment products such as mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs). It still does this, and even non-Vanguard clients can buy Vanguard funds via a brokerage account. The firm has grown to now offer non-proprietary investment products and funds.

Fidelity is perhaps best known for its personal investment products, namely brokerage accounts that allow users to trade stocks. Clients can invest in a wide range of stocks, bonds and other investment products using a Fidelity brokerage account. Fidelity also makes an effort to provide investment resources to its clients and doesn't usually charge fees on all trades, though more and more brokerages and broker-dealers are moving toward fee-free investment models.

Schwab has a number of passively and actively managed funds that you can invest your money into. You also have the option to trade individual equities. It also offers free robo-advisor services, and those who want to work with a real advisor will have that option as well. [Learn how the fees compare here.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0a6bf3931e44bb0b2809a17ccb2be73&_e=MNjjmtIVu88bReDKNt5wpGkW5dnW4jDtmpvHIqoxYImtJa7Fn1cUt8ZC3zLNubYiTJpXmBAeoFfAXZ2gYo6tic5ue3dmIxaH5rA4MX_cwnZOvq-KdZ1fImECGxr09kdxsemIP4ChvVRPSySY2evpIg7ASnMR_SG5BhEfIS6bqmfvfV8dNfFoSarBRcjBV4qLRE-83DulcvoqDV1DKaUnppE8EwSRzmCGCdvey8zdCYD5LmKeW2spE_8OETzYsKi3kp3NZxZzrwHEIfeyQ_ok4ycceb4fBK3OJA6BUUQeywqbRbkxpG5XD5J-3RHn2B7cCDkEB1UyDA5uY8AITYDLuCsdx4DG0xvUcOz3T5lftVI0K7z3XKfHiAq9Bcya7CHnocFyMSxhSrdFWtLZjuvqLi-PJ7xCnXdCdhnrmidlwzTRuKR11wWKMTorT9mFSgzQwVDd86mkk4HXuGp5x5KIOFybGw0kXZRwH2rP48x7lCw%3D)

### How to Speak With a Financial Advisor

If you're interested in getting financial advice, consulting a fiduciary financial advisor can be a great first step. That's why SmartAsset created a [free tool](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0a6bf3931e44bb0b2809a17ccb2be73&_e=MNjjmtIVu88bReDKNt5wpK07yYYAeqha8pDbHsHEvOTFcRpPV5BUfrOGdfLucH6KMW5c3K3aCoNUz14iIk2UVmqZQdpp3doS0sWRZfzq02fHtQc7wlBIVnyEV4L9BuQLgugsx5mNcPPzs0kKm5ONZjJft3CxWWbcwLEwwwg-YzOuM6aLa-IeA6EyFj3QLSzd6eUHrBzKfcaHuktt8iQhygUPQgkU7E4cUEmWBQ-VQq17I2SGihCOulS3MZSyI6rhadbdWx1ZeHq7yMeKS1Hny7vOZrp4wU9uk33eED2P-m3poB7nDO0x0ZgsQ5G-9dZtegnLd1yz2MK3-6jqLxeqH3kY4nJUUOEmLwGzn6zIwRoy3vjzicrSC5bIrLOUp_8g9Ch9KBFgOs4BCK7mpojNRXC5wDw5auRoqosv9pcDiLCtsUe7azs9miXGv4Gq4uXTGmdKhdyE64W7LRQMdTuIUQ%3D%3D) to help match you with up to three financial advisors who serve your area. All advisors on the matching platform have been rigorously vetted through a proprietary due diligence process.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1 It's never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement.
### [See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0a6bf3931e44bb0b2809a17ccb2be73&_e=MNjjmtIVu88bReDKNt5wpGkW5dnW4jDtmpvHIqoxYImtJa7Fn1cUt8ZC3zLNubYiTJpXmBAeoFfAXZ2gYo6tic5ue3dmIxaH5rA4MX_cwnZOvq-KdZ1fImECGxr09kdxsemIP4ChvVRPSySY2evpIg7ASnMR_SG5BhEfIS6bqmfvfV8dNfFoSarBRcjBV4qLRE-83DulcvoqDV1DKaUnppE8EwSRzmCGCdvey8zdCYD5LmKeW2spE_8OETzYsKi3kp3NZxZzrwHEIfeyQ_ok4ycceb4fBK3OJA6BUUQeywqbRbkxpG5XD5J-3RHn2B7cCDkEB1UyDA5uY8AITYDLuHeqWSOb7idard-PKbKTpOeZGASkQgDKOiBB1CUl-VIbZ76n7itfQiZpdj5uoy7Anoplwq-5keoMR9oEZDR_4-d-9rWl38uLs-7XZAhpJniVXcFrlaYLkvYZHoJDl7LdxoOGXEvdwMJz4AXY0huhEqM%3D)

| This news couldn’t have come at a worse time, Peter: After The Cook Political Report called our race in Ohio a toss up, Mitch McConnell started coming after Sherrod as his top target for defeat. Now, a brand-new GOP opponent just jumped in the race to defeat Sherrod – and polls already show us in a dead heat. With Senate control on the line, we need an immediate surge of grassroots support to pull ahead and win. That’s why we just set a $30k rapid-response goal to make sure we have the resources to defend this must-win seat, and we need your help to get there by midnight: [Please, Peter, rush $10, $20, or whatever you can spare to help Sherrod Brown reach this critical goal so we can win in Ohio and defend our Democratic Senate majority!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ba126b4-fef9-4f63-8133-33ae4680433d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
