| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a5e1fca-bbab-46a1-89d6-f0e0b9a1383a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: If you care about health freedom
body:
An event you need to be at | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/podcast-8857391?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

If you care about health freedom and parental rights, you'll want to attend the Global Health Freedom Summit 2023 on September 30th. You can attend in person in Alexandria, MN or get virtual tickets to watch it from anywhere: [https://globalhealthfreedom.ticketspice.com/global-health-freedom-summit-2023-attend-today](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=7169b0d557&e=9828080a05)

I'm excited to be speaking - and there'll be many new and important front-line voices. [Don't miss it](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=71a691a350&e=9828080a05)! Click the flyer below to get more information about tickets:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=fde4f6f3fd&e=9828080a05)
---
| There will be many critical conversations happening during this event. This is the introduction from their website, "Our goal is to give uncensored updates from names you trust while discovering new and important front-line voices. We strive to offer only the best in the movement that will stand and deliver truth! This year you will learn to legally protect yourself from forced vaccinations, mask mandates, and other forms of medical tyranny."
[Make sure you get your tickets here!](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=2478797e84&e=9828080a05)

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor

name: Pro Life Update
subject: ‘Extreme Agenda’: Activists Are Turning To Constitutional Amendments To Enshrine Abortion Into Law In These States
body:
And State Board Determines Abortion Reversal Pills Are Outside ‘Generally Accepted’ Practice

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv6j1ttsnt88i503p5spsmn68ebesu7v64ek9bhg_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj60pb4sph2bs)

## [‘Extreme Agenda’: Activists Are Turning To Constitutional Amendments To Enshrine Abortion Into Law In These States](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5ic94gt910s4lc3eqaifi56mgu9cof35jsgsamo_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj60pb4sph2bs)
Kate Anderson on August 20, 2023 Pro-choice activists in several states are attempting to put abortion amendments on the ballot that could enshrine the practice into law. Lawmakers in multiple states have passed laws banning abortion at various stages since the overturn of Roe v. Wade. Pro-choice activists, however, are attempting to make headway to protect access in [...] | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7kqq11f2mlaud9fvte38tvdfa54lpmchk962g7o_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj60pb4sph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7k9r7b9jhe9qb0t9jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf9jhe9qb0t9nk9qj2d5iekr32tv66prtaddk6iorbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp66prtcsbieio7ad5h6ni64pj1chjm69hmevb7acth6iojboj0c9j60o72chg61op66prtfcpj6pqj2tf0ccj3ctul6po7bp5jm8rr1spkm9r72sh5u)
---

---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqirmkhv8hf3dt5e6tsecuge9pml8mkikvtoec1g_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj60pb4sph2bs)
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5gilldajm59lpo4pcejq4608a334p8leq0s97g0_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj60pb4sph2bs)

## [State Board Determines Abortion Reversal Pills Are Outside ‘Generally Accepted’ Practice](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvro7u18mk44ji0k6bflg7db5fjnc4s4sugj9390_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj60pb4sph2bs)
The Colorado Medical Board announced a new rule Thursday that argued the abortion reversal pill, progesterone, was outside of the “generally accepted” practice, according to the Colorado Sun. Democratic Gov. Jared Polis signed legislation in April that barred pregnancy centers from giving women the reversal pill after they have taken the first chemical abortion pill. Democrats had pushed the [...]
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeklljl5je9db5u3cuqu5jua8915c09hochttmc0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf8jmemj72sjkm1qj783ieuor9cpl6lo72d1hekpqcdtlmuj72sjkm1qjf8jl64qb4t9m65rucdjnqkqr8d5hmngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpicdjnqpon4t5gekqb2df4c9j62p33ccj3ctumekpr2d5h6nh60oj6c1ge4p30c3hicdjnqupj6djl65qu0op66prtadjgenib7chnm3pj9cjme5p238h1e8he4933cjh66pj0cliecoh5u)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Reverse Trump’s attacks on bedrock environmental protections
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1938537?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **_REVERSE TRUMP’S DAMAGE:_ Help fix the bedrock environmental law that Trump broke! >>** The National Environmental Protection Act (NEPA) protects you and me from greedy corporations who want to put some of the **dirtiest polluting projects in our communities.** But Trump GUTTED this law of its most critical protections – _**and the damage remains today!**_ **President Biden could restore these protections – and good news: he’s considering changes to NEPA right now.** **[We don’t have a moment to waste! Please, Friend, help restore this bedrock environmental protection before more companies push through dirty fossil fuel projects!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1938538?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1938539?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Big Oil and Gas is already pushing polluting projects into communities across the country – Black, Brown, Indigenous, and low-income neighborhoods are disproportionately targeted.
Take a moment to think about what it’s like to live near an oil refinery or coal plant. The people in these communities _**breathe in toxins**_ from air pollution, unknowingly _**drink contaminated water**_ , and suffer from increased rates of health issues like _**cancer and asthma.**_
NEPA is supposed to help protect communities from these challenges – but it’s not strong enough in its current state. [**Don’t waste a moment: tell the Biden Administration to fix NEPA and protect our communities from toxic pollution! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1938540?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1938539?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Hallie Templeton
Legal Director & Senior Campaigner
Friends of the Earth**

name: Weston D. Imer
subject: The RNC Summer Meeting Starts Tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Weston D
body:
I am wheels up for the Republican National Committee's Summer Meeting and Presidential Debate in less than 24 hours...
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001stajnZRUxMuaq0pouiyR_rEHpFqOMz6g07U7SoYpTdOmNZtPgkMIAain3iQEMXOOAcikLV1knAfjWj1Ye69_T0NSUpPxq4GIP_18c7skSv8oRSsY8YU_B8CmJpWSwg21HAsLzOAkwB8=&c=ilKG-0RYo7Xvhum6cM0oFrQgh-Kkq1Ufn2oxuD3VxeJvW_xlQqhgow==&ch=FnkjpPtoQf_8s46DPyI6OHaLdkL088o5gaEEyaCUCgotetmEZHHLVg==)
---
| |
---
| Friend,
I am wheels up for the Republican National Committee's Summer Meeting and the Presidential Primary Debate in Milwaukee, WI in less than 24 hours.
As a member of the Youth Advisory Council, it is important to me that I represent my fellow grassroots conservatives to the best of my ability.
Tomorrow kicks off 4 days of meetings of the Republican National Committee. While at the Summer Meeting, the members, myself, and many others will be attending the first Republican Presidential Primary Debate at the Fiserv Forum in Milwaukee.
I am excited to be in attendance with some of my fellow Youth Advisory Council Members for both the meeting and the debate!
If you were not fortunate enough to get one of the coveted tickets to the debate and you do not want to watch it all alone at home, I would like to encourage you to attend the Colorado GOP's Watch Party at Wide Open Saloon in Sedalia, CO on Wednesday starting at 6:00 PM MDT, or, find a watch party to attend in your area!
(Don't worry, the Colorado GOP will also show President Trump's interview with Tucker Carlson at the event!)
You can purchase tickets to the Colorado GOP Watch Party by clicking the image below or the button that says "Get Tickets Here!".
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001stajnZRUxMuaq0pouiyR_rEHpFqOMz6g07U7SoYpTdOmNZtPgkMIAY7vrRoyKbYACb0FcqN_cfj3ati1IGS9rO3oFCwkvqYag-QZZw-JwfGGb63B28ic4XSWJFhgHxOoLn7a-_Rpvb8k1WLN57PItYssSAygbDxs72q96oHTpsIoLXPDvo2aGD9w7Uh-y-IYjxcBUiFsUro=&c=ilKG-0RYo7Xvhum6cM0oFrQgh-Kkq1Ufn2oxuD3VxeJvW_xlQqhgow==&ch=FnkjpPtoQf_8s46DPyI6OHaLdkL088o5gaEEyaCUCgotetmEZHHLVg==)
---
| | | [Get Tickets Here!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001stajnZRUxMuaq0pouiyR_rEHpFqOMz6g07U7SoYpTdOmNZtPgkMIAY7vrRoyKbYACb0FcqN_cfj3ati1IGS9rO3oFCwkvqYag-QZZw-JwfGGb63B28ic4XSWJFhgHxOoLn7a-_Rpvb8k1WLN57PItYssSAygbDxs72q96oHTpsIoLXPDvo2aGD9w7Uh-y-IYjxcBUiFsUro=&c=ilKG-0RYo7Xvhum6cM0oFrQgh-Kkq1Ufn2oxuD3VxeJvW_xlQqhgow==&ch=FnkjpPtoQf_8s46DPyI6OHaLdkL088o5gaEEyaCUCgotetmEZHHLVg==)

| Next week, you can expect a full report from me on the Summer Meeting and any important updates from the Youth Advisory Council!
I want to thank you for your continued dedication and support of your County, State, and National Republican Parties. Your support of the GOP is crucial to so many paths to victory in 2024, including the White House.
If you are not already, I would like to encourage you to support your County and State Republican Parties financially, only if you are able to with the crippling pain that Bidenomics is causing on all of us.
The Colorado GOP needs your help and you can donate to them by clicking the button below.
---

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Democrat Governor sends Donald Trump gross and shocking threats
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 21, 2023

Democrat Governor
sends Donald Trump gross and shocking threats
It's no secret that Donald
Trump is target number one for the Democrats. And they aren't
done yet.

Because this Democrat Governor
has sent Donald Trump gross and truly unhinged threats.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Joe Biden may start World
War III with this awful decision

The war in Ukraine
has been raging for almost two years. But this blunder might have
escalated the war to a new level.
➞ Continue Reading

You'll never believe who
President Biden smuggled into the White House

Joe Biden has been
involved in quite a few scandals over the years. But this one
takes the cake.
➞ Continue Reading

Hillary Clinton knows
something about Joe Biden that will sink his campaign

Hillary Clinton made
a big mistake back in 2016. President Biden is making the same
one.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: Tucker Carlson Destroyed a Dirty Democratic Strategy With These Three Words
body:
Democrats have a horrifying way to avoid responsibility for their insane policies. [unsubscribe](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=6zs1j7skt6bmn2rn7ij7hdwtfrfp6wbzj6apbnu6xl9jaspl4n39950nsu3twynhesy6dqawul8fttfc1e1u2qghqraa2r4fwbcb14fam79oc5cu5x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|

Dear Fellow Patriot,

The United Nations’ “Small Arms Treaty” has been the Gun Control Lobby’s crown jewel for decades.

They’ve been waiting for an anti-gun President, like Joe Biden, to take the White House **so they can launch an all-out effort to ratify it in the U.S. Senate**.

Now, they think they finally see their opportunity to _ram it through_!

But you and I have a chance to stop them cold -- **[as long as we take IMMEDIATE action to help dismantle this dangerous Treaty](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5gg4qurhsxklfgggmg9w8ayol5awmy25s8lxlbw7wfb3ajdj6yob5ug28v5kkbnviqfcp2yxt04ct6wvykabt0cwrz6vdgktlvazbrzfgrigcxa83u2kgx945n6ro9ddurcfirroc8e8xkgjteppxo33qhe303vxnm2ljxysv8s5js9bif2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)**.

As Dudley Brown, President of the National Association for Gun Rights, explains in the email below, it’s absolutely critical we act now!

**Sincerely,

The Hon. Rand Paul
U.S. Senator (R-KY)**

* * *

Fellow Patriot,
**“BIDEN AIMS TO SIGN ON TO UN'S GLOBAL GUN REGISTRATION TREATY.”**
That was the headline in the _Washington Examiner_ shortly after President Biden’s State Department spokesman told international bureaucrats of “the continuing commitment of the United States” to the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” during the gun control Conference of State Parties in Geneva, Switzerland.

Just a few weeks later, President Biden himself spoke before the United Nations in New York City, stating: _“We’ll continue to uphold the long-standing rules and norms... Bedrock commitments,**like support for arms control measures** to reduce the risk and enhance transparency.”_ Fellow Patriot, anyone hoping that President Biden wouldn’t use his bully pulpit to RAM the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” down the throats of Americans just got those hopes CRUSHED.

The battle over implementation of the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” -- the crown jewel in the gun grabbers’ designs for the globe -- is about to reach a fever pitch.

**[That’s why I’m counting on you to please sign your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to tell your U.S. Senators “NO UN GUN BAN” at once](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5gg4qurhsxklfgggmg9w8ayol5awmy25cug8b3y8my1nt9kyj4nrjw6vbkvqkye439j1ybdad0y02b4fknm3qmaivuxrg1nk9i7jwdq4i35aamycn73xofwq6uaah5knvtkwmu6qm80i1x269xz6gq5ofqma35og70g4s9ejlzabczy4v1y&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)**!

As you’ll see, this survey insists that your U.S. Senators do everything in their power to oppose the UN “Small Arms Treaty” in the U.S. Senate.

_If there’s anything we’ve learned, it’s that globalists have been telling LIES about the supposed “need’ for the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” for years_.

From the beginning, gun grabbers have claimed the purpose of the Treaty is keeping arms out of the hands of terrorists, insurgents, rogue states, and gang members.

But at the very same time the Biden Administration was pledging their support for the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty,” they were leaving $83 BILLION in U.S. military weaponry to the Taliban!

They don’t care about keeping guns out of the hands of terrorists.

_They care about keeping guns out of the hands of law-abiding Americans_!

Reading through the details of the UN “Small Arms Treaty,” it’s hard to see how our Second Amendment could survive, if ratified.

For starters, the Treaty text demands the U.S. identify “end users” (gun buyers), document “the quantity, value, and model/type” of firearms and ammunition, and develop “national control standards” to regulate transfers.

_In other words, by design it’s an International Gun Registry that’ll include detailed information on American gun owners just like you -- the first step toward outright CONFISCATION_.

Worse, all that information would be made accessible by despots and foreign governments including the Treaty's largest signer -- Communist China.

**[As you can see, it’s vital you sign your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to your U.S. Senators demanding they reject this scheme](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5gg4qurhsxklfgggmg9w8ayol5awmy260eahqta90qpv9y5ozym6bxv17pigkw8am50oioie1139a7b49zhtnwz8zq0ni7bqw8d7s34rjcquxlx8ui47h1ha7c6kq24hww6mawjrg79vt79r1qj03s7y7if967632dx8kjlrs2j9vgkv591&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)**!

Once a nation signs on, the UN’s goal is to quickly impose “International Small Arms Control Standards” (ISACS) on them. Introductory language already includes: *** _Mandated national “screening” for those seeking to own guns_ , giving bureaucrats the final say on whether or not you’re “competent” enough to own a firearm; *** _Restrictive licensing for gun and ammo sales_ , and perhaps even bans on anything from semi-auto rifles to shotguns and handguns; *** _Restrictions on the number of guns and amount of ammo any “properly-licensed” individual may legally own_ ; *** _Bans on magazines holding more than ten rounds_ ; and *** _Bans on owning a firearm for self-defense_ \-- unless a citizen can somehow get government approval (which will only happen if you’re “connected” -- or paid half-a-million dollars for one of Hunter Biden’s paintings). Believe me, the United Nations has no intention of slow walking any of this.

To them, your Second Amendment freedoms are a threat to their grand “utopian” designs.

Enemies like Red China are so eager to see every American disarmed, they’re pouring money into the UN “Small Arms Treaty” hand-over-fist.

_So, it’s no wonder why they’re hell-bent on forcing the U.S. to submit to this globalist gun control scam -- and why we must defeat it_!

**[I’m counting on you to help beat the UN by signing your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to your U.S. Senators](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5gg4qurhsxklfgggmg9w8ayol5awmy26n2vu3hc9c6bd1ko2q48jtyhuafmmktb8t03a601hn1wv9c9qx0sh8gxwd9r7kq2ggxmtnqgclpzovavccx4gpm6k8jb7iknrxyq12zatq6u6ifszf86fou9hyrng98lnkuopty5iiu5fp2mjdt5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)**.

As soon the gun grabbers have 67 votes to ratify the Treaty in the U.S. Senate, you can bet Biden’s pal, Sen. Chuck Schumer, will call for the vote.

But we can’t wait until then to fight back because even now, one-world bureaucrats are pushing these gun controls deep into every part of government.

_On top of Biden’s ATF anti-gun executive actions, a headline from _The Hill_ shows how “Democrats’ latest backdoor plan to limit gun ownership” involves new State Department “sanctions” designed to drive the price of ammo by BANNING imports_.

That’s the same State Department which NAGR caught red-handed trying to siphon your tax dollars into funding the UN “Small Arms Treaty.”

_Worse, since day one of the COVID-19 outbreak, our court system has said yes to almost any politician cooking up any unconstitutional idea so long as it’s under the guise of “public health_.”

So now Biden’s Center for Disease Control (CDC) is pushing a new Euro-centric gun control framework that says _“Using a public health approach is essential to addressing firearm violence and keeping people safe and healthy.”_

That’s why insisting that your U.S. Senators OPPOSE the ratification of the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” is not enough.

We must insist that the U.S. Senate ensures that NOT ONE TAXPAYER CENT is spent by Biden on implementing any part of this Treaty or what it stands for.

But I’m counting on your help to send that message -- before it’s too late.

**[First, please sign your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to tell your U.S. Senators “NO UN GUN BAN” at once](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5gg4qurhsxklfgggmg9w8ayol5awmy2ir3i7z3h39bdvwjqt8e1ld23ktpkse1mvj10f6ntb99srsqfyrufdnzpoxxdbtx9d5sm2rc7fzkxray91ma81bqgknuyrrclomd1xgzqja8ld3chsu4yzh90e0twruofqz0mok2zm58q638o38ff&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)**.

Second, please agree to your most generous contribution to help the National Association for Gun Rights mobilize a grassroots firestorm against the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” -- using everything from _U.S. Mail_ , to _phones_ , to _email_ , _blogs_ , and _guest editorials_ , _hard-hitting video_ and even _paid media_ if we can raise resources.

If at all possible, I’m hoping you’ll agree to $100.

I know that’s a lot to ask for, believe me. But the fight is here, Fellow Patriot. It’s on. There’s no time to wait.

**[But if $100 is just too much -- even given the urgency of the situation -- please agree to $30, or at least $15 TODAY](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4h4eqvvqvjrnvocwaeiba1fnymjyy96n1vpl9an3wg031ik1g9bicpzbqkghbmkxcoltssnyjsw0xoczicmc5coc6ugnsq15sebs1csp0023gpr67j5pc99rc5xmw8v0v4c2rj6wsn85xgmhsu1g7huxwmeftqf64xsm49ui745d128ydzrb7rahmwpd1gitpxwy6rnvcalcm4yljx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)**.

Whatever you can do, please act IMMEDIATELY. There’s no time to waste.

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights**

P.S. Reports say the Biden Administration will be signing on to the UN “Small Arms Treaty” any day, setting up an all-out fight over ratification and implementation here in the United States.

Please help fight back.

**[So will you please sign your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY IMMEDIATELY along with your most generous contribution of $100 TODAY](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5gg4qurhsxklfgggmg9w8ayol5awmy2ibpcgotj3lu3dp9x6lm0cv3srkfnidkd43i44rkyev9jb1jpichr58jnabt6xvdz7refon1k4bxg9yn7vup8a7z68oc4akz5inf9o8c5l888qvp2b9jit4n31r030xqyzud1tscfdxzybirath1j&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)**?

**[Whatever you can give, even just $30 or $15 will go a long way towards helping NAGR defeat this unconstitutional Treaty once and for all](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4h4eqvvqvjrnvocwaeiba1fnymjyy96nm2xhqr4hsjpx8urldhnpfzzcwah36isu9uhqxfx1xq5of5c2q7gd4m96mv2uvvtmxrsw47yx4hednd5fzp6s40pj809oajpiv9anq6askmkqbrchwz6odwmlskfvv78k8kdk29t3ibas9ajxb9oslrn0co4yp3ktc1gqth6lddy87jqztu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)**.

---

---

[](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=u38g1uvbuysrneaqsrmnqoddesgcxip5mtlyuaeq26w5a3uh4ddc5h9nr1ng8m8h6m5l3mrxirkpz6zeob7u7sj52ct3j1tfmgv2bbvuampxse68oqigql2exuewkt3bpu6qji1wbwp5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) [](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=3wz2fydi5sraelhjueebp22ftyrgx7c5wdtgg39927apfati7lgg56500npuzl4byvsndilnpdsha8wcwyx2hrchbvd9ag7r6qxguhuxsc3x9m15xqdtd89ecetuiilx66xxlqgpjoy0pz&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) [](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=3gkqcbb3qjm3gkeg3126r26ujdcayw7zkb2g85d80e70eq9x55hmo0roun4lbsalal12nskvp2ql2dysx2ht236q5szmvd1ex2477ydk1ai7tgoymh71hqgg87af59z9i5hytisnm8bt8onl2mdx7f8hd5glopy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) [](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=ayxleyqlrpkf5c8v8woxk06b2zgcd5km05mz1eci7i5mp51yjvsuf0fthfwe0dybl4ls7klod9hbvcpkwxa47zux5mewv9fkc3uki2nuldv7ghdnhxd4yiszp7x7tuueulcy848ko4odl1gvqqbtev5kxaeu9opfsqgcpbltf5yg6zd8t73zljhj6x2mhsq5uz1g4x8kl5ficvja&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) _The National Association for Gun Rights, Inc. is a non-profit tax exempt advocacy organization under Section 501(c)4 of the IRC. They can be contacted toll-free at 1-877-405-4570. clean_body: Democrats have a horrifying way to avoid responsibility for their insane policies. Please read the message below from our sponsor. Steve Thompson, Editor | | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, The United Nations’ “Small Arms Treaty” has been the Gun Control Lobby’s crown jewel for decades. They’ve been waiting for an anti-gun President, like Joe Biden, to take the White House so they can launch an all-out effort to ratify it in the U.S. Senate. Now, they think they finally see their opportunity to ram it through! But you and I have a chance to stop them cold -- . As Dudley Brown, President of the National Association for Gun Rights, explains in the email below, it’s absolutely critical we act now! Sincerely, The Hon. Rand Paul U.S. Senator (R-KY) Fellow Patriot, “BIDEN AIMS TO SIGN ON TO UN'S GLOBAL GUN REGISTRATION TREATY.” That was the headline in the Washington Examiner shortly after President Biden’s State Department spokesman told international bureaucrats of “the continuing commitment of the United States” to the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” during the gun control Conference of State Parties in Geneva, Switzerland. Just a few weeks later, President Biden himself spoke before the United Nations in New York City, stating: “We’ll continue to uphold the long-standing rules and norms... Bedrock commitments,like support for arms control measures to reduce the risk and enhance transparency.” Fellow Patriot, anyone hoping that President Biden wouldn’t use his bully pulpit to RAM the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” down the throats of Americans just got those hopes CRUSHED. The battle over implementation of the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” -- the crown jewel in the gun grabbers’ designs for the globe -- is about to reach a fever pitch. ! As you’ll see, this survey insists that your U.S. Senators do everything in their power to oppose the UN “Small Arms Treaty” in the U.S. Senate. If there’s anything we’ve learned, it’s that globalists have been telling LIES about the supposed “need’ for the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” for years. From the beginning, gun grabbers have claimed the purpose of the Treaty is keeping arms out of the hands of terrorists, insurgents, rogue states, and gang members. But at the very same time the Biden Administration was pledging their support for the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty,” they were leaving $83 BILLION in U.S. military weaponry to the Taliban! They don’t care about keeping guns out of the hands of terrorists. They care about keeping guns out of the hands of law-abiding Americans! Reading through the details of the UN “Small Arms Treaty,” it’s hard to see how our Second Amendment could survive, if ratified. For starters, the Treaty text demands the U.S. identify “end users” (gun buyers), document “the quantity, value, and model/type” of firearms and ammunition, and develop “national control standards” to regulate transfers. In other words, by design it’s an International Gun Registry that’ll include detailed information on American gun owners just like you -- the first step toward outright CONFISCATION. Worse, all that information would be made accessible by despots and foreign governments including the Treaty's largest signer -- Communist China. ! Once a nation signs on, the UN’s goal is to quickly impose “International Small Arms Control Standards” (ISACS) on them. Introductory language already includes: * Mandated national “screening” for those seeking to own guns , giving bureaucrats the final say on whether or not you’re “competent” enough to own a firearm; Restrictive licensing for gun and ammo sales , and perhaps even bans on anything from semi-auto rifles to shotguns and handguns; Restrictions on the number of guns and amount of ammo any “properly-licensed” individual may legally own ; Bans on magazines holding more than ten rounds ; and Bans on owning a firearm for self-defense \-- unless a citizen can somehow get government approval (which will only happen if you’re “connected” -- or paid half-a-million dollars for one of Hunter Biden’s paintings). Believe me, the United Nations has no intention of slow walking any of this. To them, your Second Amendment freedoms are a threat to their grand “utopian” designs. Enemies like Red China are so eager to see every American disarmed, they’re pouring money into the UN “Small Arms Treaty” hand-over-fist. So, it’s no wonder why they’re hell-bent on forcing the U.S. to submit to this globalist gun control scam -- and why we must defeat it! . As soon the gun grabbers have 67 votes to ratify the Treaty in the U.S. Senate, you can bet Biden’s pal, Sen. Chuck Schumer, will call for the vote. But we can’t wait until then to fight back because even now, one-world bureaucrats are pushing these gun controls deep into every part of government. On top of Biden’s ATF anti-gun executive actions, a headline from The Hill shows how “Democrats’ latest backdoor plan to limit gun ownership” involves new State Department “sanctions” designed to drive the price of ammo by BANNING imports. That’s the same State Department which NAGR caught red-handed trying to siphon your tax dollars into funding the UN “Small Arms Treaty.” Worse, since day one of the COVID-19 outbreak, our court system has said yes to almost any politician cooking up any unconstitutional idea so long as it’s under the guise of “public health.” So now Biden’s Center for Disease Control (CDC) is pushing a new Euro-centric gun control framework that says “Using a public health approach is essential to addressing firearm violence and keeping people safe and healthy.” That’s why insisting that your U.S. Senators OPPOSE the ratification of the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” is not enough. We must insist that the U.S. Senate ensures that NOT ONE TAXPAYER CENT is spent by Biden on implementing any part of this Treaty or what it stands for. But I’m counting on your help to send that message -- before it’s too late. . Second, please agree to your most generous contribution to help the National Association for Gun Rights mobilize a grassroots firestorm against the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” -- using everything from U.S. Mail , to phones , to email , blogs , and guest editorials , hard-hitting video and even paid media if we can raise resources. If at all possible, I’m hoping you’ll agree to $100. I know that’s a lot to ask for, believe me. But the fight is here, Fellow Patriot. It’s on. There’s no time to wait. . Whatever you can do, please act IMMEDIATELY. There’s no time to waste. For Freedom, Dudley Brown President National Association for Gun Rights P.S. Reports say the Biden Administration will be signing on to the UN “Small Arms Treaty” any day, setting up an all-out fight over ratification and implementation here in the United States. Please help fight back. ? **. The National Association for Gun Rights, Inc. is a non-profit tax exempt advocacy organization under Section 501(c)4 of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to NAGR are not tax-deductible for IRS purposes. The National Association for Gun Rights' mailing address is P.O. Box 1776, Loveland, Colorado 80539. name: AOTL Organizing Alert
subject: Don't miss out!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
TONIGHT: Democracy On The Line!
|
---

As summer draws to a close, the heat of redistricting continues to sweep across our nation. Amidst special elections, Supreme Court decisions, and potential map redraws, the evolving redistricting landscape demands our attention. subject: DeSantis Super PAC Debate Memo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Ron DeSantis' Super PAC released a memo with plans to come after me at the debate. We need your help to build our rapid response.

|

Fellow American - I just got word that "Robot Ron" DeSantis and his Super PAC plan to come after me during next week's Presidential Debate.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb1d6g30gelc9cmnfelgllk6ha5hipaooedq0o6o_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj6cor6c1h2bs)
**Fellow American DeSantis is going to come out swinging.** **[Will you stand with me in the next 30 mins to help us build our rapid response team for debate night?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2cbcj8ot8fpr2o4vadqpu0theh2sqqm787fdlpg_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj6cor6c1h2bs)**

| [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm3vt0jj481utv174pu3k8kiv3jklm7mspf1sug0_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj6cor6c1h2bs) | | [Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu86c4r1fhdflgp6qg951050uef8lrh9qo13q418_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj6cor6c1h2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $20 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z38531lbrqavq7gq4jeu1ah55tmm3d7678il8qs8_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj6cor6c1h2bs) | | [Chip in $50 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z25bfa7uerl5j7rstvt7oahmhcb169fl3utsbpmo_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj6cor6c1h2bs)

Fellow American take a look at the memo the DeSantis Super PAC released today for yourself.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1lmqqbc9bs0c78khptnm5al9bn30qq8soe07o80_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj6cor6c1h2bs)
The "hammer" is coming down, so we must be ready. I've been approaching debate prep in an unconventional manner, but we must be ready to respond to the attacks on debate night.

I wouldn't ask if this wasn't important, Fellow American. **[Please,_in the next 30 minutes_ , chip in whatever you can to help us build our Debate Night response team.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zahp4lrs122preraa57fclmbre5huv37dhd1gja0_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj6cor6c1h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zndprrlsgf0ggnsge2opmnga4vqusv6q02saoca8_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj6cor6c1h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** FIGHT BACK ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7lc7h39bi1pbtublm700n64d3tgv4vqmch3n02g_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj6cor6c1h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

subject: Charting the County’s future…
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/baa8b805a42d/charting-the-countys-future?e=c0babbc643)

| |
---
| | Dear friend,

I trust this email finds you in excellent spirits. On August 25th, from 1:30 PM to 3:00 PM, I'm inviting you to the Doelger Center in Daly City at 101 Lake Merced Blvd. This pivotal event is your chance to influence how San Mateo County should best deliver services to residents.

Your insights are invaluable in charting our county's course forward. I'm looking forward to hearing your input on the most crucial matters that matter the most to you.

Kindly RSVP soon, and reach out at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org?subject=RSVP%20August%2025th%2C%20Daly%20City) or 650-363-4572 for any queries.

In friendship,
David

---

|

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi team,

I'm Mondaire Jones and I’m running to flip NY-17. In a moment, I’ll
introduce myself more, but first, I have some exciting news to share:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19013?t=1001&akid=3513%2E346206%2EInaKmq ]I’m running for Congress. If you’re fired up and ready to flip this
district and take back the House majority, make a donation of $20 to
Charles Booker and my campaign today.

Let me introduce myself and share why I’m running to represent the Hudson
Valley in Congress.

Growing up poor, Black, and gay, I never saw anyone like me running for
office, let alone the U.S. House of Representatives. In fact, someone like
me had never been elected to Congress—whether from the Hudson Valley or
anywhere in America.

But I decided to run anyway—to be a voice for working families like my
own. And with the help of our grassroots, people-powered movement, we
shocked Washington’s political establishment and won.

I was proud to be part of the most productive Congress in modern
history—rescuing the American economy during COVID, lowering prescription
drug costs for seniors like my grandma, negotiating passage of the
infrastructure law, creating millions of jobs, defending our democracy,
and fighting for the freedom to have an abortion.

But despite this and the other progress we made, New York redistricting
and political machinations pushed me out of Congress.

For the past few months, I have watched with the rest of America as the
extreme MAGA Republican majority has passed policies that hurt everyday
people. And they have rallied behind a twice-impeached, serially indicted
criminal defendant, Donald Trump, who threatens to further undermine our
democracy.

Right now, Mike Lawler represents my district after winning by only 1,820
votes. A career political operative, Lawler will say anything you want to
hear, but do whatever Kevin McCarthy and the extreme MAGA Republicans tell
him to do. He’s slick like the Big Oil industry he used to lobby for. And
he must be defeated in order for Democrats to retake the House.

That’s why I'm not done fighting. I'm getting back in the ring.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19013?t=1002&akid=3513%2E346206%2EInaKmq ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19013?t=1003&akid=3513%2E346206%2EInaKmq ]We've got a chance to send Lawler packing. In 2020, President Joe Biden
won this House district by 10 points. If we don’t flip NY-17, Democrats
are simply not taking back the House in 2024. So we’ve set a huge $500,000
online launch goal to get my campaign off the ground. Split a donation
between my campaign and Charles Booker today.

Here’s the thing; I didn’t have it easy growing up. But it was the lessons
I learned from my family and Hudson Valley neighbors that got me here
today.

My grandfather was a janitor, and my grandmother cleaned homes. Mom
struggled with mental illness, and we often relied on government
assistance to put food on the table. But thanks to the support and
encouragement I received from my family and Rockland community, I went
from East Ramapo public schools to Harvard Law and the halls of Congress.

As a key player in the most productive Congress in history, the policies
we enacted were personal to me. But there’s more work to do for the
American people, including:

* Lowering the cost of prescription drugs for everyone, even those not
on Medicare
* Codifying Roe v. Wade into law and protecting the freedom to have an
abortion
* Banning assault weapons and enacting universal background checks to
keep our communities safe
* Defending our democracy from the Republican assault on voting and fair
elections
* Protecting Social Security and Medicare from Republican cuts

Our country is at a crossroads, and I refuse to sit on the sidelines.

We still need leaders in Congress for whom policy is personal — leaders
committed to creating real opportunity for all.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19013?t=1004&akid=3513%2E346206%2EInaKmq ]This race isn’t about me; it’s about the people of the Hudson Valley.
With your support, we’re going to flip this district and take back the
House majority—are you ready? Watch my launch video, then split a donation
between Charles Booker and my campaign by making a donation of $20 or more
today >>

Let's do this,

Mondaire

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230821-3513-footer&t=1005&refcode2=3513_346206_InaKmq&akid=3513%2E346206%2EInaKmq

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3513%2E346206%2EInaKmq

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Let me introduce myself and share why I’m running to represent the Hudson Valley in Congress. Growing up poor, Black, and gay, I never saw anyone like me running for office, let alone the U.S. House of Representatives. In fact, someone like me had never been elected to Congress—whether from the Hudson Valley or anywhere in America. But I decided to run anyway—to be a voice for working families like my own. And with the help of our grassroots, people-powered movement, we shocked Washington’s political establishment and won. I was proud to be part of the most productive Congress in modern history—rescuing the American economy during COVID, lowering prescription drug costs for seniors like my grandma, negotiating passage of the infrastructure law, creating millions of jobs, defending our democracy, and fighting for the freedom to have an abortion. But despite this and the other progress we made, New York redistricting and political machinations pushed me out of Congress. For the past few months, I have watched with the rest of America as the extreme MAGA Republican majority has passed policies that hurt everyday people. And they have rallied behind a twice-impeached, serially indicted criminal defendant, Donald Trump, who threatens to further undermine our democracy. Right now, Mike Lawler represents my district after winning by only 1,820 votes. A career political operative, Lawler will say anything you want to hear, but do whatever Kevin McCarthy and the extreme MAGA Republicans tell him to do. He’s slick like the Big Oil industry he used to lobby for. And he must be defeated in order for Democrats to retake the House. That’s why I'm not done fighting. I'm getting back in the ring. [ ][IMG] [ ]We've got a chance to send Lawler packing. In 2020, President Joe Biden won this House district by 10 points. If we don’t flip NY-17, Democrats are simply not taking back the House in 2024. So we’ve set a huge $500,000 online launch goal to get my campaign off the ground. Split a donation between my campaign and Charles Booker today. Here’s the thing; I didn’t have it easy growing up. But it was the lessons I learned from my family and Hudson Valley neighbors that got me here today. My grandfather was a janitor, and my grandmother cleaned homes. Mom struggled with mental illness, and we often relied on government assistance to put food on the table. But thanks to the support and encouragement I received from my family and Rockland community, I went from East Ramapo public schools to Harvard Law and the halls of Congress. As a key player in the most productive Congress in history, the policies we enacted were personal to me. But there’s more work to do for the American people, including: Lowering the cost of prescription drugs for everyone, even those not on Medicare Codifying Roe v. Wade into law and protecting the freedom to have an abortion Banning assault weapons and enacting universal background checks to keep our communities safe Defending our democracy from the Republican assault on voting and fair elections * Protecting Social Security and Medicare from Republican cuts Our country is at a crossroads, and I refuse to sit on the sidelines. We still need leaders in Congress for whom policy is personal — leaders committed to creating real opportunity for all. [ ]This race isn’t about me; it’s about the people of the Hudson Valley. With your support, we’re going to flip this district and take back the House majority—are you ready? Watch my launch video, then split a donation between Charles Booker and my campaign by making a donation of $20 or more today >> Let's do this, Mondaire Contribute to Charles Booker:

Friend,

I hate asking for money, but I need your help to make sure my
campaign has the resources we need to keep fighting. I have a
target on my back because the truth of my life disproves the lies
of the radical Left.

Can you help? I'm 17 donors short of my Daily Donor Goal and we
can't afford to fall short this close to the debate.

Seriously, anything you chip in today will help, whether it's
$3, $30, $300, or even $3,300.

We can't sit on the sidelines and let Biden win this election.
America's future is on the line!

So I'm respectfully asking one more time. Can you give a
critical $3 gift to support my campaign?

If you can afford to help, we could really use it.

Tim Scott

Friend, I
believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative
leadership.

It is
time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect
America. It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud
of our president.

That's
why I announced I am running for President of the United States.

SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE

The
Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness.
Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream
because I have lived it. My family went from cotton to congress
in a single lifetime.

isn't going to be easy. I'll need your help to win.

Can you
chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?

This
campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you.
Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden's America, so
even if it's just $5 I would be so grateful.

Thank you
for your support!

-Tim

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfdbhhvtih8kvopdc8oibg9fa3pte5ohrgt6ckfo_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj6apj4c5h2bs)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country – but there’s one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**...You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed.
But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: “ _I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily – _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake..._
...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8cvcptfvhlnjq9okrkvqdtfasgrk7gomsvacov0_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdj6apj4c5h2bs)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man – _**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Conservative Policy is not dead
body:
It's been a little over a week since the primary elections and conservatives across our state are still reeling from their losses. Media outlets across our state have gleefully reported that conservative policy is dead in Mississippi. It is easy to get caught up in their predictions of the demise of conservative policy and join the courus of doomsday singers. But, while the election may not have gone the way many of us hoped, conservative ideology is not dead in Mississippi.

It's been almost two weeks since the primary elections, and conservatives across our state are still reeling from their losses. Media outlets have gleefully reported that conservative policy is dead in Mississippi.
It's easy to get caught up in their predictions of the demise of conservative policy and join the chorus of doomsday singers. But, while the election may not have gone the way many of us hoped, conservative ideology is not dead in Mississippi.
There are hundreds of thousands of us who believe that the basic conservative policy outlined by our Republican Party platform is the best way to govern our state. We believe the conservative principles that built our nation are the principles that best serve every citizen of Mississippi.
Our fight is not with individuals, our fight is for policies that make Mississippi a better place for everyone to live, raise children, and serve God. Our fight is worth fighting and one we never give up on.
How we conduct ourselves now, post election, will determine how strong Mississippi can grow. If we become angry and lash out at those elected, if we become vindictive, then we could kill any chances of conservative policy moving forward.
That is why the [Conservative Candidate Fund](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d50d91c7-4039-417e-b368-a5f7f3a49c8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has been created. We need your help and your commitment to raise money over the next four years so we will never be outspent by lobbyists and establishment politicians again.
This is the only way average citizens will ever have a voice in Mississippi politics. We must act together with our voice, our vote, and our money.
Please do two important things:
1. Subscribe at [www.ConservativeCandidateFund.com](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d50d91c7-4039-417e-b368-a5f7f3a49c8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) so we can communicate with you directly
2. Make a [monthly donation](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2e425388-732f-47b7-b7e8-ce473b0171c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the Conservative Candidate Fund

Together, we can win.
Dana
**Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi**
[Pledge your support](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFuYWNyaXN3ZWxsLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wb3N0IiwicCI6MTM2MTE5ODcxLCJzIjoxNTI2NzgxLCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNjkyNjIyNDQ3LCJleHAiOjE2OTUyMTQ0NDcsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.FGvUMeTona7Pig9rwrnxW_mSg-3sHX69Y1e_I03hJFM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=136119871)

clean_body: It's been a little over a week since the primary elections and conservatives across our state are still reeling from their losses. Media outlets across our state have gleefully reported that conservative policy is dead in Mississippi. It is easy to get caught up in their predictions of the demise of conservative policy and join the courus of doomsday singers. But, while the election may not have gone the way many of us hoped, conservative ideology is not dead in Mississippi. | | ---|---|--- | | | ? ? from the desk ofDana Criswell | | | Aug 21 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- It's been almost two weeks since the primary elections, and conservatives across our state are still reeling from their losses. Media outlets have gleefully reported that conservative policy is dead in Mississippi. It's easy to get caught up in their predictions of the demise of conservative policy and join the chorus of doomsday singers. But, while the election may not have gone the way many of us hoped, conservative ideology is not dead in Mississippi. There are hundreds of thousands of us who believe that the basic conservative policy outlined by our Republican Party platform is the best way to govern our state. We believe the conservative principles that built our nation are the principles that best serve every citizen of Mississippi. Our fight is not with individuals, our fight is for policies that make Mississippi a better place for everyone to live, raise children, and serve God. Our fight is worth fighting and one we never give up on. How we conduct ourselves now, post election, will determine how strong Mississippi can grow. If we become angry and lash out at those elected, if we become vindictive, then we could kill any chances of conservative policy moving forward. That is why the has been created. We need your help and your commitment to raise money over the next four years so we will never be outspent by lobbyists and establishment politicians again. This is the only way average citizens will ever have a voice in Mississippi politics. We must act together with our voice, our vote, and our money. Please do two important things: 1. Subscribe at so we can communicate with you directly 2. Make a to the Conservative Candidate Fund Together, we can win. Dana Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi | | | | | | | (C) 2023 Dana Criswell 530 George St., Suite 200, Jackson, MS ? ?

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: January 23, 2023. Do you remember it?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
That was the day we launched this campaign.
#

January 23, 2023. Do you remember it, Peter?
I do.
That was the day we launched my campaign for Senate in Arizona.
It was a big day.
Since we launched this run for Senate, more than 100,000 people have made a donation.
100,000 people who have chipped in to hold the Senate.
100,000 people who are helping to keep a MAGA radical like Kari Lake out of the Senate.
100,000 people with skin in the game.
I need you to join them.
We had a huge surge of new grassroots support when we launched. But over the last few months that support has slowed down a lot.
Our numbers show it. I won’t lie to you — we’re behind.
**And I wish I didn’t have to do it, but I need to ask you to make that first donation.**
If we catch up, if we hit our goals, we can win. But if we don’t catch up, if we keep missing goals, we’ll lose our momentum. And that could cost us the Senate.
What you do here could make all the difference.
[**Rush your first donation of $3 today. $3 to crush our goals, $3 to win in Arizona, and $3 to hold the Senate. Please. I would not ask if it were not critically important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230821-1-f&t=1&akid=971%2E734936%2Ejt3-JL)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1393?c0=ruben-em-aug23.Z5YpbK&refcode=em230821-1-f&t=2&akid=971%2E734936%2Ejt3-JL)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-aug23.91DAaM&refcode=em230821-1-f&t=3&akid=971%2E734936%2Ejt3-JL)**
---
****
I don’t take it for granted, Peter. I know times are tough. But your donation really improves our chances.
Thank you.
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: ROLLAN ROBERTS FOR PRESIDENT
subject: Minorities Flock to Roberts in Virtual Town Hall
body:
Minorities Flock to Roberts in Virtual Town Hall21 Aug 06:00 AM ROLLAN ROBERTS FOR PRESIDENT hosted a Virtual Town Hall with several thousand attend
| | |
---
##
# [Minorities Flock to Roberts in Virtual Town Hall](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/12836?id=163.72.1.5682b546bcc0279cd30bbb5e44ac6acb)
21 Aug 06:00 AM
|

subject: I have a message for you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | [](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=cb111347ee304179ab9cdd8b07c41f3b&_e=yjLu986JUGS2RmvKEzbW_TzNJ3GERzjt97SvK2aH9ftAmYmJjBQk_vKNmgm5x4PJuT9tJqJcaLFRw4uau6kgb0BP1Oo-Z8NmCTOLLJVuqII_kZiRIyORJSZ0Gl2YAC6x716Fi-DMhNEmsA9fzGUnyospqrYcalkqLZZFFvY15wEoudxFe1bt4qEJq8usSMqysjiSpQAEX12ffsgPzwom2lSUAxotsXo8OfjexzJNd12uEg2EwNPKz9vV0RImoFdGGoJ0RAmlbg95-rpif5Bum3bbjPjlrLHMGMODE0N1UwHhPxel4IOLlkDBqGhttgOkfwRXlaS8pPzBxem1BzdP7MBoE8GGw0UXDDmdBc6_cgPxnKJAZk20D23ZpyHg3TY0)

Peter, it's Kellyanne Conway, President Trump’s former Campaign Manager. **I pride myself on knowing real conservative leaders when I see one, and I am PROUD to endorse my friend, Rick Scott.** Rick is a proven leader in Washington trying to drain the swamp and fight for conservative solutions to get our country back on track. Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer want nothing more than to get rid of Senator Scott and turn the state of Florida BLUE in 2024 – **[but with your support, we won't let that happen.](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=cb111347ee304179ab9cdd8b07c41f3b&_e=yjLu986JUGS2RmvKEzbW_TzNJ3GERzjt97SvK2aH9ftAmYmJjBQk_vKNmgm5x4PJuT9tJqJcaLFRw4uau6kgb0BP1Oo-Z8NmCTOLLJVuqII_kZiRIyORJSZ0Gl2YAC6x716Fi-DMhNEmsA9fzGUnyospqrYcalkqLZZFFvY15wEoudxFe1bt4qEJq8usSMqysjiSpQAEX12ffsgPzwom2lSUAxotsXo8OfjexzJNd12vxMTM6BYMX-ejv4Nss6Ft0bXH2MzkISR5OZi3EaXEzjf0zhMGlljW2yiqO8BiWeoGtNXS8iK0XlAt7yOnKyzgcleN5r5H3xnCxNvBVAnyRc1Yhz-1GsuFhgmlctc-TvEdV-xL-WODZKWis4lyNA8S)** **The Florida Senate race will be one of the TOP races this cycle and MILLIONS will be poured into attacks against Senator Scott by the liberal left. We MUST keep up.** Can you join me and help send Senator Rick Scott back to Washington? Use my secure link here to donate: **[CLICK HERE](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=cb111347ee304179ab9cdd8b07c41f3b&_e=yjLu986JUGS2RmvKEzbW_TzNJ3GERzjt97SvK2aH9ftAmYmJjBQk_vKNmgm5x4PJuT9tJqJcaLFRw4uau6kgb0BP1Oo-Z8NmCTOLLJVuqII_kZiRIyORJSZ0Gl2YAC6x716Fi-DMhNEmsA9fzGUnyospqrYcalkqLZZFFvY15wEoudxFe1bt4qEJq8usSMqysjiSpQAEX12ffsgPzwom2lSUAxotsXo8OfjexzJNd11_fF0u8_T5fqO-84Sbdd3nEkVrGgZlPYQRy_bO2jS4cuAqOZ2E3xW86jPNzxTsDqsEKOwgMKHlNii-DKpFE2H_iVSz2ePl9GM23JKa5JzFfsMj_OgGXuHXqHjuJiazQDesRakMr9k-UTFCmx-nivzV)**

Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. Peter, It’s Hung Cao, Retired U.S. Navy Captain. I’m going to cut to the chase: **I need your help****.**

I know this race has just begun, but we’ve already been flooded by attacks from Tim Kaine and the liberal establishment in Virginia.

It only takes two minutes to pitch in, but if you’re not convinced yet, let me explain to you why our grassroots donors are so important: ** **
* **We** ’**re fueled by grassroots contributions.****** I don’t have years of experience in politics like Tim Kaine. I was defending our country while Tim Kaine was busy voting for tax increases on the middle-class. This is why I need grassroots patriots like you.
* **Virginia is a HOT PURPLE state.****** We’re seeing a new conservative wave here, and this seat could be the one that decides control of the U.S. Senate in 2024.
* **The Democrat establishment is hot on our tail.****** They’re launching countless attacks and lies against my campaign and me. If we’re going to set the record straight, we need resources to get the word out, YOUR word.

**[You may think just $10 or $20 doesn’t make a difference, but all those contributions add up quickly.](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=fae65d00b74840109c8533687bb8300e&_e=pJPT_8uehw4fkjIawU_o_NDQIOPk7ibuDRPfxEhTrWy8GEhj0fFdNFVY7Qojti7vuTMdv3hBKC0yI2_n5tLaJlmq8VXs0AIjWaOZoDWfl8ZoT8Dm1eAd7hAeLHUF7sgcUyMaKF27UaZ54kkgUQgAP08A96nJEKFhtAX8s0ecEDqavBcggX22X2hqvVHxBbww_HCMnNaTHMYCor8VrUC-pcDmtEsunaOPHdk9ydbnl4jO_7lMk2oXeY5C8NSEurVMjyC0kFdngRIp-VGukSYBTJSqTtV83-iTjcSqrPBFz2cCZXaHwg7ym_LAFmGG_ircTNBd8mncXmeuiF0LsNZ_Foi9tdA4SXBz-xwIydmXlp7KcxR1UtJq34S6oT_JIsKP)**
Together, we can build the war chest we need to win this thing, Peter.

clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s Hung Cao, Retired U.S. Navy Captain. I’m going to cut to the chase: I need your help. I know this race has just begun, but we’ve already been flooded by attacks from Tim Kaine and the liberal establishment in Virginia. It only takes two minutes to pitch in, but if you’re not convinced yet, let me explain to you why our grassroots donors are so important: We ’re fueled by grassroots contributions.**** I don’t have years of experience in politics like Tim Kaine. I was defending our country while Tim Kaine was busy voting for tax increases on the middle-class. This is why I need grassroots patriots like you. Virginia is a HOT PURPLE state.** We’re seeing a new conservative wave here, and this seat could be the one that decides control of the U.S. Senate in 2024. The Democrat establishment is hot on our tail.** They’re launching countless attacks and lies against my campaign and me. If we’re going to set the record straight, we need resources to get the word out, YOUR word. ** Together, we can build the war chest we need to win this thing, Peter. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) Please mail checks made out to "Hung Cao for Virginia" to this address: PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
| | | Fellow conservative,[](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=829cd4c31b014eb5ba5634512ba8e7bb&_e=ltaHNsFPtwhmSYvJnv0o3bvYhmSBwmx0ncTvulYw58VgkRk9i_H0ulSgtXsq6No28YzRVdLAABSLyeS1J78Le-R9sEW_-YQM3wfbQCn-jaWbDNNWmX_yh36G8NePlLBg5bSWz0x7iX18_CmDxk88YwU2n6LD0FwqiBftV-CQX7fG-AsWP0F70Mw1LBa5tN6LN9K1GBeNfS6oLPNqq_1unNsQPtvr8JMkNIsAvLidZ9fvLaHzY3CXjG_r3mZmwL-rfZJ757oe1zL4K2aXBxJ_E52ITAWS_QHu33-oWiyC4nHl5g_tM3ob9CM89qBea5TusYpD-86BjRZwfwUu58N5CrqX0mrEovIK7cerNWY4n7QHm8wN_WRTCx-09keo5VUrx80G47VwlpBQqswVKwoOnzCsDBqpXULfQhTMleCt0AXB6ST1c0-1Alhx_ni7n7bbUaxzbPJDCYA2a3kpKimT9Adq4eE2veDrQm1wj_ilvGE%3D) It’s Speaker Kevin McCarthy. I’m spearheading the effort with my fellow Republicans to save America every day in Washington, but all Democrats want to do is drag us down to the depths. Instead of working for the greater good of the country, the Democrats’ top priority has been to undermine our work at every turn, setting us back substantially. And they’ve already begun plotting their takeover in 2024. This is unacceptable, Fellow conservative. That’s why I need your help to ensure Maria Elvira Salazar wins in 2024. I’ve been working with Maria since she was first elected in 2020, and let me tell you there’s no one who loves the American Dream more than her. Maria’s parents fled communist Cuba at the height of Castro’s tyranny, coming to America with just $5 in their pocket. We've developed a strong working relationship over the years, and I can confidently say that Maria is the **_staunchest_** anti-socialist Republican in Washington. She’s one of the few remaining conservatives roadblocking the Dem’s radical-left agenda: they want her wiped off the map. **We can’t let that happen, Fellow conservative, and I need your help to stop it.**
Her district in Miami has been rated as a TOP TARGET by the DCCC. We need fighters like Maria in the House who aren’t afraid of speaking out against their destructive agenda.**[Will you stand with me and support Maria’s reelection efforts?](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=829cd4c31b014eb5ba5634512ba8e7bb&_e=ltaHNsFPtwhmSYvJnv0o3bvYhmSBwmx0ncTvulYw58UqNg4cSYn_mh8Fb1cGThKOEKJiRwTnlGUqHxQaMS5XwalZoHf3IdLl_oD0xKYuMAC_6iOZJ6L1K5yN55VolkUQ9hAbUX-73QYRZbojPJAn5wRp66-sm98klBF3CcqTPHlT4jOoBF3lvt296mlfl959moTqKRiUrXXgYzI4TPKnRos9yKOvocsScbd6EKl15Ey5BIMm6bYl2nYF-XoB7qUuI1XmuQnis_xvxgNrwoU_1vVdu8pk68CX1ZeIg0oMW1wT6JvHiOYA_calQpiysAv66UXcCbc2HpbzCbNsUNZNVlWqV9yI_PLUEMs9set8X9HoBCu_IxFP8-A2krgHH8lqXuCoQ0k8lmW2SIMO1Uh4CA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Fellow conservative, It’s Speaker Kevin McCarthy. I’m spearheading the effort with my fellow Republicans to save America every day in Washington, but all Democrats want to do is drag us down to the depths. Instead of working for the greater good of the country, the Democrats’ top priority has been to undermine our work at every turn, setting us back substantially. And they’ve already begun plotting their takeover in 2024. This is unacceptable, Fellow conservative. That’s why I need your help to ensure Maria Elvira Salazar wins in 2024. I’ve been working with Maria since she was first elected in 2020, and let me tell you there’s no one who loves the American Dream more than her. Maria’s parents fled communist Cuba at the height of Castro’s tyranny, coming to America with just $5 in their pocket. We've developed a strong working relationship over the years, and I can confidently say that Maria is the staunchest anti-socialist Republican in Washington. She’s one of the few remaining conservatives roadblocking the Dem’s radical-left agenda: they want her wiped off the map. We can’t let that happen, Fellow conservative, and I need your help to stop it. Her district in Miami has been rated as a TOP TARGET by the DCCC. We need fighters like Maria in the House who aren’t afraid of speaking out against their destructive agenda. You have my word, Maria Elvira Salazar is a true American patriot. We must defend her from the radical left and show the Democrats that we will not be intimidated. Thank you, | | | | Speaker Kevin McCarthy | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Founded on TRUTH.
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWG-z_qDNO

Vivek 2024

Somewhere along the way, America forgot it was founded on
truth. The politicians and media don't want you to be reminded of
these facts.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWG-z_qDNO

Fellow American,

TRUTH. There's only one. Not
yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic
political climate where spin is all the Administrative state
knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to
say them:

God is real.
There are two
genders.
Human flourishing
requires fossil fuels.
Reverse racism is
racism.
An open border is no
border.
Parents determine the
education of their children.
The nuclear family is
the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
Capitalism lifts
people up from poverty.
There are three
branches of the U.S. government, not four.
The U.S. Constitution
is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.

CHIP IN
IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH

America was founded on these
truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths,
our standing as a nation would mean nothing.

If you agree with these 10
TRUTHS, I need you on my team.

This is about more than a
campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. Will you
join me today by chipping in $1 or more?

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

STAND WITH THE TRUTH

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. name: Sarah Longwell
subject: We can't abandon them
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER
body:
"If we back off at this point ... Putin may very well decide Ukraine is not enough."
|
---
Friend, It's become conventional wisdom that the Republican Party doesn't support Ukraine's fight for freedom. It's true that the MAGA wing of the GOP has long been soft on Putin, but that's not the whole story. Millions of American conservatives still believe in the traditional values of the party—that America is at its best when it defends democracy at home _and_ abroad. That’s why we've launched [Republicans for Ukraine](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWSTr78HvkxbW68Cx-t31_8NvW20x2Jc52tXcpN1RGL-Y3qn9gW7lCdLW6lZ3lCN4r1y5zscnQzW21fMz22T0B_8W61lnz44WxQldW51KcZM34cYDbN5BSNGRXwp73W927cVq4hDqKJW1YhCwq8cwbCZN5r8jmDpbL4mW3clYjd2D7tC0W2chqs76HHzv2W6fktC23jxh4BVKj31k6c9j1xV5C1HB1l2Xz6VXn8md58Jg4TVt3-q54ps_p8W4mTLhC4QsRv1W2LMzn_14J2mlN2QHdWjS2MRqW89R-PQ70Y_DNN7DnGW67BRvHW1252HY1pV6R5W1TfXgJ1-8mz4N7WXzv38hv2DW44Kglp2sv6YZf8m-k1q04), a $2 million TV, digital, and billboard campaign aimed at persuading GOP voters and elected officials to stand with Ukraine against Russia. The project features dozens of testimonials from real Republican voters making first-person appeals for the party to support Ukraine.
---
[ ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWSTr78HvkxbW68Cx-t31_8NvW20x2Jc52tXcpN1RGL-Y3qn9gW7lCdLW6lZ3m0W4BMXW_3HDYYjW4f8b3W9ctrPkW7Pl9Q67mPM5tN4NHHXp6m8KwW3LLMKL1-YbPvW3XSWfG9fnkc_VdbtjG6HCY_qW5T76Rr7tlxxgW5Mq0Yk95bkM3W3Gxw3x7XTWBVW7CKMBl727HZNW7XVxb23TbPkzW1lLbBK73ZynSW2-6_Jw30v47RW1CxrRP7Yn9-3W81RncS7gWv_RW3vz6Kj3h5L1RW8qdRhd4G6qf_W1Yq7W98WCgbbW26NMvD51Bg1rW8dZ98v7xdm5bW8qynkZ4HcHxwVc826-6fJ2BXW2jpz2Q8cR11df43N2qd04)
---
Listen to what some of them have to say:
* "If we back off at this point ... Putin may very well decide Ukraine is not enough." - Lisa
* "It's long been the Republican party tradition and history to support democracy around the world." - Steven
* "Nobody's going to stand up to Russia and China unless we do." - Jason

Visit [www.gopforukraine.com](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWSTr78HvkxbW68Cx-t31_8NvW20x2Jc52tXcpN1RGL-Y3qn9gW7lCdLW6lZ3nfW5t_p_f7XsGHYW4Gw-4T86G5sHW9kJDxP184j1CW14K2zK1ZjtX7N7-p44-1MpGJMMLVfvmCKV7N6PM5F71yblkW2dGWDq51Hb_JW5YFQ0X81q256W4bXp1N60NwqpW7pLZQZ8_c1skW4grknr47mpckW3-z-kp1CYMF6W8g0w5N5VNbPTVHB83M5fxgbCW2C80DN2qtXRvW7nKwzt5jbRkkW8Dss3Z2PRl-fN4CRtXn_BFPtW3j3JT05n-vgZW6BQFB76Z3SRgW3jtM3s2Lh5FxW89G5W81cwQRvW2kvMvT2PM31jdxdQLv04) to listen to these stories in full. Ukraine needs our help more than ever, and it is our duty as Americans to support them. Thank you for your support. Sarah Longwell Executive Director, Defending Democracy Together
---
| [ **Support Us** ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWSTr78HvkxbW68Cx-t31_8NvW20x2Jc52tXcpN1RGL_d3qn9gW7Y8-PT6lZ3k-W6kQk4662r5rdW3fCBdK2pdZH5W1fft3q29RFrQW8XWbNw6B_QcnW1zgPJL3qnPbyN83VpLtz6_LYW3THBHN2HNzknN3WcSGHskcfvVX4tm58_sbFmW8Fc2p-2HYh63W7MJQHc3gnJPsW11w0Xj3PRWrMW5Zjyg164VM3HW35kkN77QVqJPW9bY-6W8zpq-4VXS3WQ4ZTmkKW8NVf-G98lZfvW50HD705B5wW6W3yZCTT4DrMgDW5zl8k937RynJW7GQ2N05-2vrNW7Yq0wR5SMQdHW70k6w57_RlfZW8BDDPw2f7KjZW8s6PJf2Ng0HnW74TKvH1pC_3Df7S-lHj04)
