name: Al Franken
subject: another big announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend,

A month or two ago I wrote to you with a big announcement: my friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District – one of the most competitive races in the country.

**Now I’m back with an even bigger announcement: Josh is running for Congress in one of the most competitive races in the country... AND his wife just had a baby!**

[**While Josh is catching sleep in 30-minute increments and cleaning up spit-up, I’m pitching in to make sure his fundraising doesn’t look like a dirty diaper. So I have to ask, will you split a contribution between the Voter Protection Project and Josh’s campaign today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51681?t=6&akid=9981%2E878179%2Eunf9Na) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51682?t=7&akid=9981%2E878179%2Eunf9Na)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51683?t=8&akid=9981%2E878179%2Eunf9Na)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51684?t=9&akid=9981%2E878179%2Eunf9Na)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51685?t=10&akid=9981%2E878179%2Eunf9Na)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51681?t=11&akid=9981%2E878179%2Eunf9Na)
You know who’s probably getting a full night's sleep? Josh’s opponent, Marc Molinaro. In fact, he’s probably dreaming about taking away someone’s rights, rolling back gun safety legislation or blocking progress on clean energy – he’s only been in Congress a couple of months and he’s already done all that and more!

We need someone like Josh in Congress – he’s the real deal.
[ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51681?t=12&akid=9981%2E878179%2Eunf9Na)
(The really tall guy is Josh.)
After graduating from Harvard Law School, Josh worked on a landmark civil rights lawsuit to help kids from low-income families get access to healthcare. When I was in the Senate, Josh and I passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. And since then, Josh has fought in the Supreme Court to block the Trump Administration’s Muslim Ban and plans to deport Dreamers.

**Even before he was a dad, Josh was always looking out for the little guy.**

[**So what do you say? Will you split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between the Voter Protection Project and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51681?t=13&akid=9981%2E878179%2Eunf9Na)

Thanks,

Al

P.S. I like the P.S. because it’s one more opportunity to ask for a donation. [**So donate now!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51681?t=14&akid=9981%2E878179%2Eunf9Na)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9981%2E878179%2Eunf9Na). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9981%2E878179%2Eunf9Na).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9981%2E878179%2Eunf9Na) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=9981%2E878179%2Eunf9Na). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=9981%2E878179%2Eunf9Na)
---

Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | We want to hear from you >> Friend, The first Republican presidential debate is next week, and there are sure to be fireworks! Under Biden’s presidency, there’s obviously no shortage of pressing issues to address... So imagine, for a moment, if you were the moderator. | | | | | | Thank you for making your voice heard,** Friend. We’ll share the**MOST COMMON** answer with all the survey respondents in a follow-up email next week. –Team Cassidy | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. | Bill is working for all of Louisiana | DONATE BY MAIL Bill Cassidy for US Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 Can’t donate?** Don’t worry - There are other ways you can help! | Team Cassidy PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 - \- =

subject: America's future is in your hands today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
I need to ask for your help

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3063780b9cbe4e749bb6f05793e38cb8&_e=5vM5Ylel0mbwa0GEJaSXMcDZofeJk1TfeSwV3P2hZh5kLdHXw-1GJJslHz-gkmabF1ZH-V9qL--E5IiW2jtxqNlKU7NNGcelz3S304KmSRP3BAIwXbl6WfyaX6MvRaIYFw24CT4P-wgPUBn0ufYbRT-y8A4hDOdJfA1atuWxqvEssc0_Z7oldCRNLUyDXDc0CDWOBWC-9CFcADqYHDeWxEDZC2AitQ-eQzB774-pjkoxtMFWHuGo81pRwVhT0ebH5MtB0qKdCI8unxDCNs51tIfdRHQVR56gm8f-5GU-0eSmgAa3cRcpn2UDXh4sHQA1)
---
I used to defuse underwater mines big enough to sink an aircraft carrier, so a mob of radical-left Dems doesn't even make me flinch.

Fellow Patriot, this is Captain Hung Cao, retired Navy Special Operations Officer & I need to ask for your help.

One month ago I announced that I'm officially running for the U.S. Senate in Virginia. But Fellow Patriot, I didn't see your response.

Truth is, I'm running again because I'm not done fighting for this country.

I fled communist oppression in Vietnam and forged a life for myself through the American Dream.

I owe this country my life. Serving as a U.S. Senator would be the least that I could do. But the Democrat establishment doesn't want to see that happen.

**They HATE that I 'm an immigrant who made a name for myself without their victim mentality. I'm a threat to their entire narrative, which is why they'll spend MILLIONS of dollars to shut me down.**

But Fellow Patriot, I didn't see your response. Truth is, I'm running again because I'm not done fighting for this country. I fled communist oppression in Vietnam and forged a life for myself through the American Dream. I owe this country my life. Serving as a U.S. Senator would be the least that I could do. But the Democrat establishment doesn't want to see that happen. They HATE that I 'm an immigrant who made a name for myself without their victim mentality. I'm a threat to their entire narrative, which is why they'll spend MILLIONS of dollars to shut me down. My campaign could be over before it even gets off the ground. I'm not someone who normally asks for help, but everything rests on this. America's future is in your hands today. Team -- Experts are calling it "the most important case in our country’s history."

Donald Trump and his allies attempted to overturn American democracy, and now he’s been indicted for his actions. **EVERY American needs to hear the facts of the case -- but right now,_no one knows_ if cameras will be allowed in the courtroom!**

We’ve launched an URGENT Live Poll to find out if Americans want to see Trump's upcoming trial for themselves -- but we’re still missing your response, and the deadline to respond is midnight! **Please tell us now:**

**Should Trump's trial be televised?**

|

Gerrymandering + right-wing campaign cash = unsafe communities for everyday Tennesseeans. **Let me break down how we got here, Peter.** **FIRST:** Right-wing lobbying groups worked for years to gerrymander Republican supermajorities in states across the country, including right here in Tennessee. body:
Once they’re done with Trump...you could be next.| | | Peter, _Want proof that political prosecution is alive & well in America?_
---
[ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7e5d0235f56b40348b274e62f074378c&_e=CrEkrlaQegpLjirHhNz3xU13_ojyZuAFP1CgCaXvoyraCFz2-x5W46iMHhv7c3zqRvJYTheMHeHiSg8HGa6_fUJkGxxN7T5B2dGPQQtlOwi_GLZnE581ipnJNSepvhrdhr5NyH5euMaw5QkjXPWDvUz_JEBERvGO9hUkfRP0F1KxJ8bXlmCfLHGOHs8gJRyrGuezc3cibHCLhPc8sf9tU8NRzVtQg5gGcCDjyXc0ChmE9QEvFCbJzLS9PfFBEgcy_qEWzoBjoFHeDUElxm0_gBjj1KKJr0ax9FP_QRRe8EvYTrBfUTey17qUN7Roua5E2SgfCRpPGdIAzpienzyCnvoohElWIrQMF5jYyD6_B7f8NZ5PFKBxIbeHo-Q6upx7vM6AlpPIAGIInz3aIeTXFg%3D%3D)
---
Radical leftist prosecutors across America promised that they would stop prosecuting theft & drug crimes—and they have, unfortunately, kept that promise, leading to a massive crime wave in our country. Meanwhile, four separate left-wing prosecutors have been BUSY, filing **91 different charges** against President Trump. **_[Prosecutors should be focused on prosecuting crime, not their political enemies.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7e5d0235f56b40348b274e62f074378c&_e=CrEkrlaQegpLjirHhNz3xU13_ojyZuAFP1CgCaXvoyraCFz2-x5W46iMHhv7c3zqRvJYTheMHeHiSg8HGa6_fUJkGxxN7T5B2dGPQQtlOwi_GLZnE581ipnJNSepvhrdhr5NyH5euMaw5QkjXPWDvUz_JEBERvGO9hUkfRP0F1KxJ8bXlmCfLHGOHs8gJRyrGuezc3cibHCLhPc8sf9tU8NRzVtQg5gGcCDjyXc0ChmE9QEvFCbJzLS9PfFBEgcyVajq-J5M4w4dX_UOUHSGYkW1KSJc4zg3eLPUMFbN1f4XUlAbixypLID0k16TXBiBJZ1HtO0y2N5neEer5qehO4cE9JTYFU55tHgc2b8fhsjgYln1uMq72jLNf4bdATULEtuMCk7qFFb81IKmy4_AXg%3D%3D)_** It is sad that we have to say that. And it’s scary what an uphill fight it is to restore a free & fair judicial system in this country. **This story perfectly illustrates why our organization,_[Fair Courts America](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7e5d0235f56b40348b274e62f074378c&_e=CrEkrlaQegpLjirHhNz3xU13_ojyZuAFP1CgCaXvoyraCFz2-x5W46iMHhv7c3zqRvJYTheMHeHiSg8HGa6_fUJkGxxN7T5B2dGPQQtlOwi_GLZnE581ipnJNSepvhrdhr5NyH5euMaw5QkjXPWDvUz_JEBERvGO9hUkfRP0F1KxJ8bXlmCfLHGOHs8gJRyrGuezc3cibHCLhPc8sf9tU8NRzVtQg5gGcCDjyXc0ChmE9QEvFCbJzLS9PfFBEgcyNfgxAViByVMEYr5m6i6IB07M7ZUK3w24sxxLewhV4o-MbLWmp-kfgY5wndxeWgYDfCgh6ReSjXoEIcoWmTUj5EgjV3JlaIMT4uT41juOVFcFF0MW2-ght9iSc4zx066M-AEzZ4IlbLNpxKOiyDqzYA%3D%3D)_****, exists. ** _We fight to get good judges and prosecutors elected to ensure people pay the price for committing crimes — not for holding the wrong political views._ That’s what the rule of law is all about. And that’s what America is all about. **We’re working hard now to secure solid judges and prosecutors in races across America and bring political prosecutions to an end. Want to join us in the fight for free & fair courts?**
---
[**DONATE TO FAIR COURTS AMERICA TODAY**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7e5d0235f56b40348b274e62f074378c&_e=CrEkrlaQegpLjirHhNz3xU13_ojyZuAFP1CgCaXvoyraCFz2-x5W46iMHhv7c3zqRvJYTheMHeHiSg8HGa6_fUJkGxxN7T5B2dGPQQtlOwi_GLZnE581ipnJNSepvhrdhr5NyH5euMaw5QkjXPWDvUz_JEBERvGO9hUkfRP0F1KxJ8bXlmCfLHGOHs8gJRyrGuezc3cibHCLhPc8sf9tU8NRzVtQg5gGcCDjyXc0ChmE9QEvFCbJzLS9PfFBEgcy98I2YvHlCkncXAdx12WsbXnCy0NRtp_TQDoeVUlQRimBt9k5HM7PqPym9itpl8GyClgDXrCLF8kPqZX-iALzQBvGL9ixMpF0exfKRso0MKFR6Vk_fYskGem5OH666ue7CFbCmp0oxbfnxsLa9KOExg%3D%3D)
---
Thank you, Andrew Wynne Executive Director | Fair Courts America

We believe that united voices can create lasting change, and we're rallying to petition the bosses and decision-makers to prioritize their employees' welfare. We're standing up for workers' rights by collecting signatures for petitions that demand fair wages, safer workplaces, reasonable hours, and respect for all workers. By joining our movement, you'll be part of a force that's challenging corporate norms and working to bring about tangible improvements for working people. [Join us in making the Hot Labor Summer of 2023 a turning point for workers everywhere. Be a part of history by signing our petition now now! Let's ignite change together and ensure that workers' rights are no longer negotiable. Stand with us and make a difference this summer.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlpLl86IECduXPdHpOOxhj--4k8Gv9X3Cjs17jXPkRT2J1P1W7izzBO82Esce-RYvrncilyci02srU-8J-spxLHaZGhaiRtrJPjFfQsPu99Av8dm3KzfDOi-nw-_5s3dzt4hPV5QrguXXsz2-aZdtqZrUAY00EM1Xzr-PKyZNKofyMFPzfeJZbGxnfdc1TVsjNmAtuA4ZnYWP8KCMsWMDtZoICpEPj9Xag5jsiQHkHwWUBMsdj-YIdnQwly_0HzIlpjlw6bsZMZju3CJwLc7Izxkv6brLzIC2gyUZsFgN6NxA0kqNAVzKRgtTG1uFA_ZaM/3yx/61EJE_yoSxOpwPGFT9NfEw/h3/Ldsyxw1jZkViXLTNAt5LPWbDbKEfi5byiPVj3qk2bgw) In solidarity, The Young Democrats of America

In solidarity, The Young Democrats of America | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Young Democrats of America, please .

New revelations point to Hunter Biden's questionable business ties, and the silence from mainstream media is deafening.

**Questionable Business Associations:** It's distressing to see __Hunter Biden__ leveraging his father's status for personal gain, accepting money from foreign oligarchs in Russia, Kazakhstan, and Ukraine. The connection even goes so far as to share meals at Washington's Café Milano, raising serious concerns about conflicts of interest.

**Burisma Scandal:** We cannot ignore the fact that __Hunter Biden__ received substantial payments, up to $1 million annually, from Burisma Holdings, a Ukrainian natural gas company, while his father, Joe Biden, was overseeing matters related to Ukraine.

**Opaque Financial Activities:** A staggering $3.5 million transfer from Russian billionaire Yelena Baturina to __Hunter's__ business raises significant questions about the true nature of these financial dealings, with funds appearing to move in a puzzling shell game.

**Sanction Evasion:** The connections between individuals associated with the Bidens and their ability to avoid sanctions under both the __Obama and Biden administrations__ warrant a closer look and demand accountability.

Peter, we cannot ignore Joe Biden's response to these allegations during the 2020 Presidential Debate – an outright denial that warrants our skepticism and insistence on transparency.

I refuse to stand idly by as these concerns are swept under the rug.

But to address these challenges and confront powerful interests, I need your support.

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | Will you join our fight? Peter, The Biden family's foreign ties are troubling and disheartening. I will not stand with this growing mess of foreign entanglements that threatens to compromise the integrity of our great nation. Our state and our Nation are not commodities to be sold to the highest bidder. | New revelations point to Hunter Biden's questionable business ties, and the silence from mainstream media is deafening. Questionable Business Associations: It's distressing to see Hunter Biden leveraging his father's status for personal gain, accepting money from foreign oligarchs in Russia, Kazakhstan, and Ukraine. The connection even goes so far as to share meals at Washington's Café Milano, raising serious concerns about conflicts of interest. Burisma Scandal: We cannot ignore the fact that Hunter Biden received substantial payments, up to $1 million annually, from Burisma Holdings, a Ukrainian natural gas company, while his father, Joe Biden, was overseeing matters related to Ukraine. Opaque Financial Activities: A staggering $3.5 million transfer from Russian billionaire Yelena Baturina to Hunter's business raises significant questions about the true nature of these financial dealings, with funds appearing to move in a puzzling shell game. Sanction Evasion: The connections between individuals associated with the Bidens and their ability to avoid sanctions under both the Obama and Biden administrations warrant a closer look and demand accountability. Peter, we cannot ignore Joe Biden's response to these allegations during the 2020 Presidential Debate – an outright denial that warrants our skepticism and insistence on transparency. I refuse to stand idly by as these concerns are swept under the rug. But to address these challenges and confront powerful interests, I need your support. As I prepare for re-election, I am reaching out to you, my fellow conservative Texans, to join me in this fight for accountability and integrity. | Thank you, Rep. Roger Williams TX-25 | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. CADDO ST. PMB #174 CLEBURNE, TX 76031 Stay connected with our campaign and be part of the movement. Follow Roger on social media for updates, volunteer to support the cause, or reach out to him directly. By joining Team Williams, you will make a difference in your community. | A Note For You, From Roger My commitment to our great state and country is unwavering, and I am grateful to have my wife Patty, our two daughters, and YOU standing beside me on this journey. | Roger Williams 10 N. Caddo St, PMB #174, Cleburne, TX 76031 ==

body:
I am ready to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress.

| | _You’re receiving this message because of your past support for Democratic candidates and causes. Sam Eppler is running for Congress in TX-24 to bring education to the forefront of our politics. We need your support to elect Sam, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/rFdANnZs90i0dixqTJIyTA2?unsubscribedata=oaAV347ZvuGIRZ%2BKWj9VRAGqMrk1ffgYWj9XaCvl5xBOuzWcjfvMQeVLPMOPnKRRAELVo0RUidMDiWLqMUWeSzWLWPM9ExGP8qhAVGSknBRaCUGMpn0CyXDlVq3R6N7Sy1df5cXsdtVlvW%2BQIRGEV3WQ2pdCLlJI9BxWQjJ%2FVNrL2c8YftNNtr%2BeU8kLrJOvPFbJom0XFZPSad97WbNsfBvpeD0BbhKU%2F6ti%2FnhmmsM73aqPoN9w4Ym5W1R5uusBR2%2FXbnM2OQ2jvl1De27W%2BC7%2BdOvK3wI4IxtlUc2JbmEiIShaPztxghEXo2bfMzpFqooHDE109RPGft84YdrBFdmL8pIYZnIVUOwsmFykDW%2FWbgVM%2BCaGKU6IEty1VknVaC6IQL9SqySBjVIiVrGtdEWWNCkozKS9PrY6Ifo485QduPREZpVbRMTNv2MSpYcF) here._

| My name is Sam Eppler, high school principal and Democrat running against Beth Van Duyne in Texas’ 24th Congressional District.

I am ready to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress. Texans deserve a leader in Washington committed to ensuring affordable healthcare, providing quality education, curbing gun violence, and protecting Social Security.

[_**Before I continue, I must ask: will you add your name to our expanding list of supporters and personally endorse my campaign for Congress today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68425846/422993990/827598237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNTEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGZiYTY0YzAtMzM0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L8d-BQ1BPPXwI7y47uqxk2U8CAnkgrHPm_zFXoN1G4E=&emci=5af91f0d-4b2d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=0fba64c0-3340-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7032708)

| | | [ADD MY NAME ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68425848/422993992/827598237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNTEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGZiYTY0YzAtMzM0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L8d-BQ1BPPXwI7y47uqxk2U8CAnkgrHPm_zFXoN1G4E=&emci=5af91f0d-4b2d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=0fba64c0-3340-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7032708)

As a proud product of public education and a high school principal, I’m committed to education above all else. My mother pulled herself out of poverty and into the middle class through education, and because of her, I joined Teach for America after college.

I taught math in one of Dallas’ most challenged high schools before advancing to become the youngest principal in Dallas ISD. Right now, we’re facing a crisis in our schools – our teachers are underpaid, our schools are underfunded, and our students and teachers are fearing for their lives in the wake of gun violence.

Our country is in crisis, too – women have lost the right to make their own healthcare decisions, and our economy isn’t working for regular folks like you and me. **I’m running because I know with the right leadership in Congress, we have the power to fix these problems.**

But listen, team – this isn’t going to be easy. We have a tough election ahead of us, and my opponent has the backing of President Trump and his MAGA Republicans.

[_**I need all the help I can get, especially in these early days, to get our campaign off the ground. Will you stand with us and add your name to personally endorse my campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68425850/422993994/827598237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNTEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGZiYTY0YzAtMzM0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L8d-BQ1BPPXwI7y47uqxk2U8CAnkgrHPm_zFXoN1G4E=&emci=5af91f0d-4b2d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=0fba64c0-3340-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7032708)

clean_body: I am ready to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress. | | You’re receiving this message because of your past support for Democratic candidates and causes. Sam Eppler is running for Congress in TX-24 to bring education to the forefront of our politics. We need your support to elect Sam, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can here. ---|--- | = | My name is Sam Eppler, high school principal and Democrat running against Beth Van Duyne in Texas’ 24th Congressional District. I am ready to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress. Texans deserve a leader in Washington committed to ensuring affordable healthcare, providing quality education, curbing gun violence, and protecting Social Security. | | | As a proud product of public education and a high school principal, I’m committed to education above all else. My mother pulled herself out of poverty and into the middle class through education, and because of her, I joined Teach for America after college. I taught math in one of Dallas’ most challenged high schools before advancing to become the youngest principal in Dallas ISD. Right now, we’re facing a crisis in our schools – our teachers are underpaid, our schools are underfunded, and our students and teachers are fearing for their lives in the wake of gun violence. Our country is in crisis, too – women have lost the right to make their own healthcare decisions, and our economy isn’t working for regular folks like you and me. I’m running because I know with the right leadership in Congress, we have the power to fix these problems. But listen, team – this isn’t going to be easy. We have a tough election ahead of us, and my opponent has the backing of President Trump and his MAGA Republicans. | | | Thanks, Sam * | | = Paid for by Sam Eppler for Congress Sam Eppler for Congress 3419 Westminster Ave Box #268 Dallas, TX 75205 United States | | ---|--- = = Communicating by email is a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with you, but if you no longer would like to receive emails, you can click here to

name: =?utf-8?Q?Suzanne=20Crouch?=
subject: A View from the Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
What an eventful week it has been on the campaign trail! I️'m thrilled to share some of the exciting moments from the past week.

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7e4abad559-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_20_10_27&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7e4abad559-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

What an eventful week it has been on the campaign trail! I'm thrilled to share with you some of the exciting moments and meaningful experiences I've had in the past week.

Let's keep the conversation going. Please reach out to share your questions, comments and concerns about Indiana as I️ run for Governor.
EMAIL ME (https://crouchforindiana.com/connect/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7e4abad559-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_20_10_27&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7e4abad559-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Friend of Local Government Award
------------------------------------------------------------
On Wednesday evening, the Indiana County Commissioners honored me with the Friend of Local Government Award.

This award holds special significance as it recognizes leaders who stand as trusted partners to our local governments. It shines a light on the vital relationship between our local communities and state government.

It's a privilege to be acknowledged for prioritizing collaboration and engagement with local government leaders.

** Connecting with Hoosiers
------------------------------------------------------------
The Perry-Spencer GOP Picnic was a resounding success, with a packed venue that showcased the robust presence of Republicans in southern Indiana.
The turnout of hundreds of dedicated individuals was a testament to the shared values that unite us and drive us forward.
The event truly energized our campaign and it was an incredible opportunity for me to address the crowd and share my vision for the future of our great state.

Plus, it was great to see so many wearing red!

** Community Engagement
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7e4abad559-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_20_10_27&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7e4abad559-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Attending the Hancock County Republican Party's Elephant Open golf tournament was a wonderful way to connect with fellow Republicans and honor the party's former chairman, Steve Leonard.

This year's event was dedicated to Leonard, who passionately led the Hancock County Republican Party and held this event annually.

** Celebrating Women in Politics
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7e4abad559-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_20_10_27&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7e4abad559-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

It was an honor to be part of the Indiana Federation of Republican Women's Tribute to Women dinner.

This event was not only a celebration of remarkable women but also a testament to the power of unity within the Republican Party.

Recognizing the contributions of women in politics is essential, and I am humbled to stand alongside so many accomplished and dedicated individuals.

** Meeting with Dearborn County Republicans
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7e4abad559-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_20_10_27&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7e4abad559-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

On Saturday, I had the pleasure of speaking to a packed house at the Dearborn County morning meeting.

Engaging directly with the people of Dearborn County and discussing their concerns and aspirations is a fundamental part of my campaign.

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------

As we continue this journey together, I'm reminded of the incredible energy and passion that our campaign is built upon. Your unwavering support fuels my commitment to serving the people of Indiana. Together, we can create a brighter future for our great state.

Thank you for standing with me.

Onward and upward,

** Get Involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more.
GET INVOLVED (https://crouchforindiana.com/get-involved/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7e4abad559-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_20_10_27&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7e4abad559-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
You can also attend one of my fundraisers (I️ would love to see you there!)
or make a donation by clicking the "Donate" button at the bottom of this newsletter.
https://mcusercontent.com/db6332b918877c0167cdddb48/files/3f465566-bc26-b24a-e538-7485d8cbc339/Crouch_List_of_2023_Fundraising_Events_as_of_7.20.23.pdf?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7e4abad559-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_20_10_27&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7e4abad559-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at:
heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) .
https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/web?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7e4abad559-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_20_10_27&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7e4abad559-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: American Action News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztb2iu1qr53q4b9udbvqb0qv69v9vtm041uvn6go_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdgm6oj2clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpjsd8ul96eebbgh6rhu4upq9n8mrghlvqu632ag_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdgm6oj2clh2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2hmfijdir4q3a5phkamifn5ogqcajrfu3rdkhq8_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdgm6oj2clh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zltfg3haorc6nhfma47u1ugkgfdvsg9ub7veaoao_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdgm6oj2clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34clgm9oj4s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z10m3re3hjqhkfs3jtc8s6bnoc9tdatgifin04do_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdgm6oj2clh2bs)_

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: the beast in Idaho
body:
👹👹👹 |
---
| | Idaho's got a beast on its hands, and it's growing out of control.

This beast is Medicaid, and it's feasting on our budget, ready to gobble up everything in its path.

The alarming part?

The "Idaho Main Street Caucus" (moderate and liberal Republicans) not only ignored the problem but also fed this monster by voting for HOUSE BILL 369.

While the Governor may be bragging about the Idaho economy... _the situation is dire._

name: American Briefing
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9q9bf1asmmuk26fc4bb916uh6o54o2p3a7qsk4o_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdgm6p74slh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr1ejmr1t7cd1oa614969r78kc2nghet00h5hpog_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdgm6p74slh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0oo5sakiail1qoic0hntibr9grpauhfcvmg3nh0_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdgm6p74slh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8e927vtp1phi705d6hrrlv24c790ij141gugvao_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdgm6p74slh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfq0h7jolb9asqq6ocv5q42o3omatkdi9dkm0flg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chim2p76cph238h1e8he4933cjh66ob3cjieaoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zks4ioqg696401h1r5n810c3kpe2jphom7qlnfko_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdgm6p74slh2bs)_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Elder?=
subject: FINAL HOURS TO MAKE THE DEBATE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
Just a few more donors needed to secure my spot.
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=bbd59eb9ac&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# FINAL HOURS TO MAKE THE DEBATE
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Fellow Patriots, I’ve sent you two emails, and so many folks have already answered my call for help.I need just a few hundred more contributors to meet the RNC’s donor threshold for participation in the GOP presidential debate. We have already surpassed the national polling requirement. So, all we need is a few hundred supporters making donations of **ANY SIZE** to earn my spot.[**Please contribute what you can – even just $1 - TODAY so that we can hit our goal before the RNC debate this week.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=8ae6b67cf4&e=0be619cbaa)**And you can help me spread the word, too! Don’t forget you can FORWARD THIS EMAIL to all your friends and family who can help us in our fight to restore common sense and sanity in Washington!** Thanks to your support and the hard work of our campaign and volunteers, we have already come so far. Our “long shot” campaign is performing better than those of career politicians with massive war chests.That’s why we can’t stop now. We are so close to the debate stage. With just a few more donations, the RNC will have no choice but to include me in Wednesday’s debate!The political establishment may not like it, but I’m an outsider candidate proposing bold reforms that will rein in out-of-control bureaucracy that is more interested in enriching the politically connected than they are serving the ordinary Americans who make this country work – people like you and me.Together, we can open the doors for a new Golden Age of America – where prosperity and freedom are unleashed, where the law still matters, and where America’s position as a global leader is restored.[**So please, contribute to my campaign – ANY AMOUNT will do – and send this to EVERYONE you know so we can make it to the debate in Milwaukee on Wednesday and share our vision for America’s future.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=7bfc0d5c0b&e=0be619cbaa) We’re nearly there. Don’t give up now! I’m not. And I need your support.Thank you,
Larry Elder
GOP Candidate for President
---
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |

Hi, it’s Roland Gutierrez, the Democratic TX State Senator running for U.S. Senate against Ted Cruz.
Everyone already knows what defeating Ted Cruz would mean for the people of Texas.
But not everyone realizes that it would also be a massive victory for the American people – for many reasons:
1) Defeating Cruz would guarantee Democrats control of the U.S. Senate, expand our majority and keep Mitch McConnell out of power.
2) Defeating Cruz would send a powerful message that our country is ready to move on from his divisive brand of politics.
3) Defeating Cruz would allow us to pass life-saving gun violence prevention legislation that will stop tragedies like Uvalde from happening in the future.
Put simply, defeating Ted Cruz is a win for everyone – except him.
I know Cruz is beatable. And with your help, we’ll send him packing. Will you pitch in $25 or more to help me defeat Ted Cruz? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

Friend,

Ron DeSantis' Super PAC released a memo with plans to come after me at the debate. We need your help to build our rapid response.

|

Fellow American - I just got word that "Robot Ron" DeSantis and his Super PAC plan to come after me during next week's Presidential Debate.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Ron DeSantis' Super PAC released a memo with plans to come after me at the debate. We need your help to build our rapid response. | Fellow American - I just got word that "Robot Ron" DeSantis and his Super PAC plan to come after me during next week's Presidential Debate. Fellow American DeSantis is going to come out swinging. | | | ---|---|--- | | - Fellow American take a look at the memo the DeSantis Super PAC released today for yourself. The "hammer" is coming down, so we must be ready. I've been approaching debate prep in an unconventional manner, but we must be ready to respond to the attacks on debate night. I wouldn't ask if this wasn't important, Fellow American. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. **Meet Ron DeSantis**

| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2dc86773d1f442fc86e408f48f9c7a53&_e=A7QVyav4qYN_WkgUE2FhyGtni3dU2VS8JVhJqkTNqjrf_DUb4pyC76S5kj9H_MwDG_NmUkj8PnuaCxsGmlRT7vY92PUqPuMSnhGff3Fedhtr7Pv74ArMbLZ09WnHbZk6T8dvDnnblwbu0rt87GAQ45Fbw1r2jLvroQeBI41aCmuyUyBzrazDoXR1LBEecUS2IE5BXxeoJnkfRY8G4kBsO_ISSt0T4qpKXEKjICS8QyNZi3ZMfvMi1vV_HB638NKvmS-HqJmi1T-xIvA4sFxzEvogP5kU4mGzFL6KjOap1b3saE5PnJggFzDSzmKuE5swBE4yQFV3ls3HNDWA2rMPbVF-0BEthhxwsgoWhCLZJoJqhh1BRo7EmFOAsN694VarC6C2h_SKNsSeAXFrDkOfklZ3LJgOkg0FRl8HyqqTz5Y%3D)

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

It's important to me that ALL Americans get the chance to fight for our Great American Comeback. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | I am EARNING your support so that I can win and bring this energy to the executive. I believe our country is ready to begin our Great American Comeback. I feel a responsibility to lead it, and I know I am not entitled to your support. I want to earn your help, Peter. In Freedom, | Ron DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

We need your help to build our rapid response. | Fellow American - I just got word that "Robot Ron" DeSantis and his Super PAC plan to come after me during next week's Presidential Debate. Fellow American DeSantis is going to come out swinging. | | | ---|---|--- | | Fellow American take a look at the memo the DeSantis Super PAC released today for yourself. The "hammer" is coming down, so we must be ready. I've been approaching debate prep in an unconventional manner, but we must be ready to respond to the attacks on debate night. I wouldn't ask if this wasn't important, Fellow American. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Ron Wyden
subject: The reproductive choice news you might have missed
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68430163/423009194/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmMxNTc1Yy0zYzQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fBVqEXZzJXyKG72WfGnIMH95-vaGdEQf-UM7m-r3S4c=&emci=db96a238-3940-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=9fc1575c-3c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | A quick recap: Earlier this year, I stood on the Senate floor and sounded the alarm on the far-right's next target in its war on reproductive freedom: the abortion medication, mifepristone. This spring, a radical right-wing judge in Texas handed anti-abortion fanatics the ruling they'd been hoping for, effectively banning this critical pillar of reproductive care nationwide. **And just last week, three anti-choice judges in a federal appeals court ruled to further restrict access to mifepristone, second-guessing the scientists and medical professionals at the FDA, and ignoring decades worth of research demonstrating this medication to be safer than Tylenol.** Echoing anti-abortion activists' rhetoric, the judges argued that the FDA's decisions to increase access were illegal. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68430165/423009196/-2044921950?refcode=2023-08-21-mifepristone&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9fc1575c-3c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmMxNTc1Yy0zYzQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fBVqEXZzJXyKG72WfGnIMH95-vaGdEQf-UM7m-r3S4c=) These restrictions won't take effect right away, and this case will likely come before the Supreme Court sometime next year. **That means that for now, mifepristone remains legal and on the market.** But if the Supreme Court upholds this week's ruling or declines to hear the case, doctors will no longer be able to prescribe mifepristone through telemedicine appointments, and patients wouldn't be able to receive it by mail like other prescriptions. This will be a crushing blow to women around the country, especially in rural areas. This ruling – if it's allowed to take effect – would bury access to mifepristone under red tape, making it even harder for women across the country to access this critical pillar of reproductive care. **This isn't the first time the far-right has used the courts – and right-wing judges in particular – to attack reproductive rights, and it won't be the last.** Unfortunately, this case is yet another example of the far-right's war on reproductive freedom, and its obsession with controlling women's bodies and infringing on Americans' right to privacy. I'm going to be fighting it every step of the way. Now, it's more important than ever that our progressive movement rises up to defend and expand reproductive rights for all. I held the first Congressional hearing on protecting access to mifepristone. Over 30 years later, I am still fighting with everything I've got to protect access to reproductive care. More updates soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

subject: Elected, but Out of Touch? Your Invitation to a Candid Conversation
body:
Peter No Doubt About It Podcast Episode 29 is LIVE | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d654a4dcca&e=567664f14c)
Dear podcast enthusiasts,

In this [**latest edition**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=38bde1424d&e=567664f14c), we're delving headfirst into a critical question, “ _**do our elected leaders even live here”?**_ Do they have any concept of what we actually go through from day to day? **Judging by their inane tweets the answer is no!**
| | | | | | | | | [](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ccea262909&e=567664f14c)
---
# WATCH EPISODE 29:
We dissect the local political scene and hammer Congresswoman Melanie Stansbury's recent tweet, questioning her grasp on crime and the fact that she is more interested in being a congresswomen than serving the people.

We're not holding back when it comes to expressing our thoughts about the Republican presidential debate either.
| [WATCH EPISODE 29](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c02a660b4d&e=567664f14c)
---
But that's not all – we explore the genuine disconnect between our elected leaders and the realities of living in New Mexico. From the crippling effects of inflation on local families to the scrutiny of the state's criminal justice system, particularly its impact on communities who rely on leaders to make decisions with them in mind, not some inane political statement removed from the struggles most of us face. **We’ve had enough of the Washington elite having zero concern for life here. That starts with Rep. Stansbury and Senator Heinrich.**
| [WATCH EPISODE 29](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b1dd54bef8&e=567664f14c)
---
The conversation continues with a spirited debate about the Republican presidential hopefuls, Trump's absence from the first debate, and analyzing North Dakota Governor Doug Bergam's strategic maneuvers. We also reflect on the role of local news and media, shedding light on their cozy kowtowing to political power.
| [WATCH EPISODE 29](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=dcdf8caab5&e=567664f14c)
---
Whether you're intrigued by politics, interested in local issues, or simply seeking engaging discussions, this episode has it all.

So, here's what we're asking from you:
* **Listen and Review:** Tune in to the latest episode on your favorite podcast platform. Your listens and reviews mean the world to us and help us improve!

* **Subscribe on YouTube:** If you enjoy our content, don't forget to hit that subscribe button on our YouTube channel for even more engaging discussions.

* **Consider Donating:** If you find value in our podcast, please consider supporting us by making a donation on our website, [nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6642323d84&e=567664f14c).

➡[**WATCH and SUBSCRIBE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=00eddb6571&e=567664f14c)**

**Thank you for being a part of our podcast journey.

Your support fuels our passion, and we can't wait for you to join us on this fascinating exploration of politics, local dynamics, and everything in between. Stay engaged, stay curious, and keep listening!

Krysty & Mark
No Doubt About it Podcast
_**P.S. Chupacabra sightings, bigfoot tales, and political intrigue await – buckle up and embark on this exciting journey with us!**_
|
