body:
for this critical donor drive

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68430680/423010895/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGI4N2RkYS0zYzQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KSJsawYo8OmdFZ4bY60e9QQkdFUa1xx6t10pSklIWLQ=&emci=0e12769d-3c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=adb87dda-3c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | **Peter, we’re not going to sugarcoat it: We absolutely need you on board for this critical, one-day donor drive if we’re going to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. If that’s all you need to hear,[_pitch in now._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68430681/423010896/-1313339816?refcode=20230821.1_DMTG_8AG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGI4N2RkYS0zYzQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KSJsawYo8OmdFZ4bY60e9QQkdFUa1xx6t10pSklIWLQ=) If not, keep reading.**

You might be asking yourself – _the next major election is a year and a half away, why is today so critical in our efforts to stop MTG?_

Here’s your answer:**The GOP is not taking a single second off, so neither can we.**

Right now, the GOP is working furiously to flip Georgia back to **RED.** The Koch network is dispatching a massive field army to Georgia. Donald Trump and other GOP presidential candidates are furiously raising money to defeat us. Every single second, their MAGA movement is _growing stronger._

Enter Marjorie Taylor Greene. **She’s a leading contender to be a VP pick for the GOP.** She has spots on some of the most important House committees. And she’s using her megaphone to spread baseless conspiracy theories, accuse the Bidens of sex trafficking, attack mothers, and more.

**If we can’t flip back the House, keep the White House, and boot Marjorie Taylor Greene from her committees, she will ascend to an even higher level of power, and we will be very limited in what we can do to stop her!**

[**_Pitch in right now to flip the House, keep the White House, halt Marjorie Taylor Greene’s rise to power, and defeat MAGA extremism! Every dollar you give will benefit our critical organizing programs that will keep Georgia blue!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68430682/423010897/-1313339816?refcode=20230821.1_DMTG_8AG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGI4N2RkYS0zYzQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KSJsawYo8OmdFZ4bY60e9QQkdFUa1xx6t10pSklIWLQ=) | [STOP MTG](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68430683/423010898/-1313339816?refcode=20230821.1_DMTG_8AG&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGI4N2RkYS0zYzQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KSJsawYo8OmdFZ4bY60e9QQkdFUa1xx6t10pSklIWLQ=)

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Re: Hunter Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Friend, Hunter Biden is an embarrassment to America. He allegedly sold our information to the Chinese Communist Party, uses his dad’s position to get away with crime, and would probably betray our country again at the drop of a hat. Even with a new Special Counsel, the Biden DOJ has made themselves perfectly clear that there is a two-tiered Justice System in America and Hunter Biden has found himself on the right side of it. We can’t trust this administration for anything, friend. It is up to us to demand accountability. **[Can Republicans count on you? We need your support NOW.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=d58c0d17025748248fe20448d9a821a2&_e=BoMDQ5isZiK549Os2yAuqMnS5LCBDfcQ0jVTw3F8clqS0pvmLwAKvoH0DonEZx3Lps1_-Fcc40EpH6SzGNj--9lM_jaX9erCRcr-6t8VAu-iBbOqjjNlEsCEBq-1N0CZx-f_-1cOYrQIetNlP9EaqtetoEjz_PfsKaAf0PbfVCC3P8f_NIVTgcX02Yqp7ZV85RTzBFzlHbTHGCBhzkS76i31noCFzU7B1hosKAetmKSrmXsmC7dAwQUMsj1Ejrq9KJIPGAtUJ3HMcJUv4yqeDhF2w0kHPdO-OJ_HhpwjhATMDyOBPMhc0DJPlOxAqHwFzvMLDEQWx-ncKIYMq63dlB8qsi-1IB3GbTMYNlS9MVfb_FgkjCmMeA91CZq2csWjsRxpvSi45r6V4uoErqv1nStomuNL_T7OiDOU3Aqs8KsR4tLZft-bFh6PKfIntaaP)**

name: Morgan Luttrell
subject: Ending this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell
body:
I'm a combat veteran who served in multiple combat missions in defense of America.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d07a48ff4fe84025a5f31d28da1c1531&_e=ZkyjusOfLn6FjdIcL84FPzHtRaQq3SobdpUR37iHpvh9G-oFXXqr33mFNQ2yzBOkiFyzDgCfOXUc4dRP0gey--3A3uEFtr2SX3gCPbq1tC8vBbS0xmj2Dxr8hHskAynIL7t3n5hnoU6IkAAWMwNzU-7gq_huQZDuvd91ajFM3q1VaASTkF6L2x1uOXIArzEiOM3xcEWIqcCGs4vPVUXHBk4GGgtcA-NwaAv8YnZoKjiOFAFi_5rI8vxm324WN8d5FKP1uBrzbqCyJnHVJRzahSrTX-lDwgZ8WeVciH8Q0c13mKHq4LsTYJl5i2dElk7jwZJh89sh5KmzAvwzJP1DX09iDcreriI1HzJ8iTppL3v6SmyH9ZEcrWxQ7-BiQPo1R0WX8GuyeRVRSBVS1t4FsSkF3vTnSsauzl8Kh_uFlH3YaMTL8G_8G4PK8qOxoRcM_wxE5KUDSD0s9M-Z4W3xDpYtyQWvJ5UUQv2vktthLzh6iumzYttfC_Y81H9BPkED)
---

Friend --

My name is Morgan Luttrell.

I'm a combat veteran who served in multiple combat missions in defense of America.

I've seen things I wouldn't wish on my worst enemy. Things I will never be able to unsee.

In 2009, I survived a helicopter crash that should've taken my life but, by the grace of God, I was given a second chance.

No matter how tough or brave you are, nothing is fully in your control. That's why we put our faith in God.

**But -- there are some things we CAN control, and that 's why I'm running for Congress. **

I have to just say it: Biden and the Radical Democrats want me GONE, they want me DEFEATED, they want to END my campaign for good.

But unlike the spineless career politicians, **I 'm not someone who EVER gives up.**

You see, the career DC politicians are living each day by their own agenda -- not thinking about those suffering the consequences.

After my time in the military, I knew that each day that I woke up in America was a gift.

_**The land of the free and home of the brave.**_

But the Biden regime has stripped our nation of our core values and turned us down a path that is leading us toward a dark future.

**So, Friend, I want to humbly ask you right now if you 'll stand with me in my fight for the America we all once knew and loved. **

It is patriots like yourself that have helped change the direction of our country before, but we still need you. Maybe now more than ever.

Please, stand up for America's liberties and freedoms by chipping in just a few bucks today?

---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d07a48ff4fe84025a5f31d28da1c1531&_e=ZkyjusOfLn6FjdIcL84FPzHtRaQq3SobdpUR37iHpvh9G-oFXXqr33mFNQ2yzBOkiFyzDgCfOXUc4dRP0gey--3A3uEFtr2SX3gCPbq1tC8vBbS0xmj2Dxr8hHskAynIL7t3n5hnoU6IkAAWMwNzU-7gq_huQZDuvd91ajFM3q1VaASTkF6L2x1uOXIArzEiOM3xcEWIqcCGs4vPVUXHBk4GGgtcA-NwaAv8YnZoKjiOFAFi_5rI8vxm324WN8d5FKP1uBrzbqCyJnHVJRzahSrTX-lDwgZ8WeVciH8Q0c13mKHq4LsTYJl5i2dElk7jwZJh89sh5KmzAvwzJP1DX09iDcreriI1HzJ8iTppL3sHlN3KLDMmrIh8lBHPuL0W6PGQz7_a-aIDR5crj066oGF7GR4Z76tLTBpCMB5MDnUgf4rIJisyKqK0YuMdzD5AbS78WGNMfELlezujgfRKT3aicLy483PDCFIzV5DioyOwaNcWvzP29R5RlVxy_mWt "CONTRIBUTE")
---

Together, we can bring America back to her greatness before the Democrats send us further down the dark path we're currently on.

Thank you,

Morgan Luttrell

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: I'm fighting for election integrity
body:
My opponent is trying to stop it. |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter, election Integrity is one of the top priorities for me in this campaign...ensuring we have free and fair elections that voters can TRUST.

One common-sense way to do that is requiring an ID to cast a ballot. Another is to monitor drop boxes with security cameras to ensure they aren't tampered with.

**_Well, the city of_ _Huntington Beach unveiled new proposals to do exactly that in their elections ... but my Democrat opponent Dave Min is trying to stop them._**

[_That's why I wrote an op-ed in the OC Register to __support Huntington Beach and call out Dave Min's false attacks on Election Integrity.

**I hope you have a minute to read it.**_](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=217d076fd9&e=86e91e802d)

It's alarming to see Min resort to disproven attacks about voter suppression. Do you remember what happened after Georgia passed an Election Integrity law? _They broke an election turnout record!_

Min attacked that law as a "blatant attack on the Constitution." He was wrong then...and he's wrong now.

If Sacramento refuses to do anything to boost confidence in our elections, then I believe Huntington Beach should be applauded for doing what they can in their own city.

[_That's why I'm standing up in support of Huntington Beach and calling out Dave Min's false attacks on Election Integrity._](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=42dadbb2cf&e=86e91e802d)

Check it out and spread the word so more conservatives know what's going on!

Max Ukropina

Elevating healthy discourse and policy contrast with other candidates isn't an attack, but will be an opportunity to see who will actually stand up to Xi Jinping as well as the Deep State. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Elevating healthy discourse and policy contrast with other candidates isn't an attack, but will be an opportunity to see who will actually stand up to Xi Jinping as well as the Deep State. In turn, less voters will head to the polls to vote for their local leaders. However, these elections are integral to our country’s foundation. A representative democracy makes sure that all levels of government are a government by the people for the people. Some countries aren’t so lucky. We are hoping every conservative reading this today will take our 1-click pledge to vote in their local elections. Will you check the box below to pledge to vote in 34223’s elections? 1-Click Polling is ACTIVATED: https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=19c67f8062cf0d7dd180ab352388a678c9e6d3aa2722352e39541935f04f50f265360b7da3afd386081b4d123fb5714bffa08fbc4fa86cdca324f0758f1b9856 ⬜ I WILL VOTE IN 34223's ELECTIONS. name: The Federalist Wire
subject: CNN gets SHUT DOWN live on air after being asked this one question
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 21, 2023

CNN gets SHUT DOWN
live on air after being asked this one question
The Big Media outlets like
CNN think they can control Americans with narratives. And
sometimes that's true.

But CNN just got SHUT DOWN live
on air after being asked this one critical question.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Democrat Governor sends
Donald Trump gross and shocking threats

It's no secret that
Donald Trump is target number one for the Democrats. And they
aren't done yet.
➞ Continue Reading

Joe Biden may start World
War III with this awful decision

The war in Ukraine
has been raging for almost two years. But this blunder might have
escalated the war to a new level.
➞ Continue Reading

You'll never believe who
President Biden smuggled into the White House

Joe Biden has been
involved in quite a few scandals over the years. But this one
takes the cake.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Ron DeSantis' Super PAC released a memo with plans to come after me at the debate. We need your help to build our rapid response. | Fellow American - I just got word that "Robot Ron" DeSantis and his Super PAC plan to come after me during next week's Presidential Debate. Fellow American DeSantis is going to come out swinging. | | | ---|---|--- | | Fellow American take a look at the memo the DeSantis Super PAC released today for yourself. The "hammer" is coming down, so we must be ready. I've been approaching debate prep in an unconventional manner, but we must be ready to respond to the attacks on debate night. I wouldn't ask if this wasn't important, Fellow American. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. The Final Round Of Tell It Like It Is PAC’s 10 Reasons Donald Trump Won't Debate | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f1fcbb373dbc/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13559988?e=d0a9afa930)

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** August 21, 2023
Contact: [press@tellitlikeitispac.com](mailto:press@tellitlikeitispac.com)
**The Final Round Of Tell It Like It Is PAC’s 10 Reasons Donald Trump Won’t Debate**
**ARLINGTON, VA —** Tell It Like It Is PAC today launched the final ad in its campaign targeting Donald Trump for his refusal to commit to participating in the first Republican National Committee (RNC) debate. The campaign featured a series of [10 unique videos](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=86df7c0930&e=d0a9afa930) which highlighted Trump’s shortcomings, broken promises, and failures.
The new video affirms what Tell It Like It Is PAC has been saying all along: Donald Trump is afraid to debate because he knows that Governor Christie will bring the fight directly to him. Unlike the other candidates in the race, Governor Christie is not afraid to prosecute his failures and disqualifying behavior.
It turns out that Trump’s “tough guy” persona is nothing more than a facade, and that Trump is [afraid](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=984493a75b&e=d0a9afa930) to go toe to toe with Governor Christie on the debate stage.
On Wednesday, Governor Christie will be on the debate stage, answering the questions directly and telling it like it is.
**The Final Round**

name: =?utf-8?q?Mandela_Barnes=E2=80=99_The_Long_Run?=
subject: We are proud to endorse Lisa Blunt Rochester to become Delaware’s first Black Senator!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends -
We have exciting news! We are proud to endorse Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester for U.S. Senate in Delaware. She would be the state’s first Black U.S. Senator and potentially the only Black woman in the Senate.
**If you are ready to support her historic campaign, please use this link to split a $5 contribution between her campaign and The Long Run today.**
[**https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/Endorse-Lisa-Blunt-Rochester**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.1yl6wL&refcode=em230821-1-t2&t=1&akid=4754%2E196590%2EyKpRJx)
Lisa began her career in public service as an intern for Senator Tom Carper while raising a baby and a toddler. But no obstacle could stop her effort to create a more inclusive future that works for all Americans.
She made history in 2016 when she became the first woman and person of color to represent Delaware in Congress, but that was just the beginning.
Lisa is in this race to better the lives of all Americans — in Delaware and beyond — and will fight to protect our democracy, expand abortion rights and access, implement more gun safety laws, protect the climate, and make sure Americans are empowered to vote safely.
The reality is, this Senate seat is open, and we can’t risk it falling into the hands of Republicans.
We must rally behind Lisa to ensure she can defend this seat and our Democratic Senate majority, make history once again as Delaware’s first Black Senator, and bring representation for Black women back to the Senate.
[**So please, join us in supporting Lisa Blunt Rochester’s historic campaign today and split a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford between her campaign for Senate and The Long Run.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.1yl6wL&refcode=em230821-1-t2&t=2&akid=4754%2E196590%2EyKpRJx)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll split your contribution between Lisa Blunt Rochester and The Long Run instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.cp-6e9&amount=5&refcode=em230821-1-t2&t=3&akid=4754%2E196590%2EyKpRJx)**
---
****
| **[OTHER](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.cp-6e9&refcode=em230821-1-t2&t=4&akid=4754%2E196590%2EyKpRJx)**
---
****
Let’s make history,
The team at the Long Run

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=4754%2E196590%2EyKpRJx). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=4754%2E196590%2EyKpRJx)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=4754_196590_yKpRJx&akid=4754%2E196590%2EyKpRJx)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=8&akid=4754%2E196590%2EyKpRJx)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

# What’s Happening with True the Vote?
Lots. You may have noticed we’ve taken particularly harsh incoming for the past several weeks. The Georgia State Election Board sued us (making it the third lawsuit we’re fighting in the state.) Next came a much discussed Wall Street Journal editorial that repeated the same inaccuracies we’ve heard so many times before (though it was the first time from the Journal.) Then there were the Michigan and Georgia alternate elector indictments. All leading, of course, to the indictments leveled at President Donald Trump.
It’s a difficult time to be a truth teller. Or to debate. Or even ask questions.
Which is exactly why we cannot stop.
There was something, many things actually, very wrong with the 2020 Election. And as Americans, we have the constitutional right to talk about election integrity without fear of retribution like indictments, lawsuits, prison, or any other form of persecution. But yet ... here we are.
Only if we keep praying and working will this situation get better. Let’s go!
## Eyes on Georgia.
This week we're Atlanta-bound, accompanying our all-star legal team to present an important argument in one of our cases. This one involves the movie “2000 Mules” and a recent Supreme Court ruling concerning the definition of _intimidation_ , which is (of course) what we’re being accused of. That's all I can say for now, but I’ll keep you updated. This could make for a legal tidal wave in contemporary jurisprudence.
Additionally, we’ve filed our response in the Georgia State Election Board suit. [**Here is our Motion to Dismiss, hot off the press.**](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/4xkviejVe2bcNHdbmWFEFkd9r7GYCwyhORTHbGFAJSoWFdNfINvJNSpqjs3NRIZwQ90xRE6aqr6-tr_aGZFZKQ3MKPP8foAkCEDDsI6ERk8PSrYX0hX2xYEUDE0lcZOFifc8W95VbyOJ-ZfMpPAw2VSm6vaXT-GuD-amvpUnbwlkMubMEN43FQscVp0Bs5qJnQytf9jt4af5cXtbeka3OhWpLC3yvcsb_4n_gbYDHqCe12C2rIusRoHFWFVZlSjn/3yx/jX77NntwRTGISaEn3vMf7g/h4/ka9RVqmwvZfNNeyVMuDf5Vt3HBPHIHbwimpmN3lUly0)
And, tonight we’ll tell our side of the story of Georgia - a story no one has heard before. Please join us if you can.
| [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/TSJrbp_ITb99OtMH475Js1BmSbajfDO6Ewx_G_LlijpqNcMFFt0KredSzO3U--wPGVDt0da4eNHjbfRRiEE05jrg0wy4M1mXXqoLH0EoOa85cmu6n64aw3kr8Q_AOzmlBGHtXRO51-43oeN2nGo0MzsZxOmy_1s_44MLd8QP9TkNWrGRvTpcxXUgXj8YL3GQ/3yx/jX77NntwRTGISaEn3vMf7g/h5/6YXzU63viuFvSm-UddPTeRgauw8MuxTTJUqR-HGKMwg)
---
## Keep Foreign Influence Out.
Though [Konnech withdrew their lawsuit](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/Qvk83lMrxpyahZ2UDrJlsZW5IPxjrfSIj36W354rCDAXtOwUypB8V-dhnTp8HKtKRFFrqkCWK1zzAxeqIZwv7uQd9Azyw_nvbNDP5EsY6ITDdDp2r4T_RhUnyyAoFHdOlJrT_mltiKmhWoPbQxgfG1qONOYpHAcoHfCp65AV7MHJhxu7Hxfj9RCaaIVrL4fHy9Vb-SWmjCBFdBaq88n0nQ/3yx/jX77NntwRTGISaEn3vMf7g/h6/YpEYB29IreQ05v_pStR7fWqi7MaGqxnCwemSHQe1jNU) against us, it's essential to remember that situation is far from resolved. We're pushing on both federal and state fronts to ensure foreign orchestrated software breaches are stopped and those who knew and remained complicit are now held accountable. Our aim is to make sure this never happens again.
## A Whole New Look Is Coming Soon.
We’re also preparing to reveal a whole new look and feel for True the Vote; one that celebrates the greatness of our republic and the commitment to representation through the voice of the vote. We’ll be sharing new tools to use for everything from voter registration to election day support. 2024 will be the biggest election of our lives. We aim to be ready!
## We need you.
It is hard to put into words how great our need is. [To fund these many critical initiatives ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HfjZt-BPNqgA3ijwg_5Jj_OlHnCTnA95yf3sUe8HbeyMcSJ-6s4zE6j7cXPO7LStuMPWP9ysirak2NstXCAaOEeFCApHadEg3osZTOLgU4YS59gih396278NTcb--TYbDUMNBLiV8Uj6vWljwVPAQ8DVq8NJF_nwrhCfD14vH6uuIqBWLugW_HZJlcMHo0qxhg/3yx/jX77NntwRTGISaEn3vMf7g/h7/PbR-NuqaOkh3DdyGl3S2QywpFkBjcf45m417S6y4hao)is expensive, yes, but to ward off constant, daily attacks while preparing for 2024 initiatives - it is both financially and emotionally very costly. We are staying the course, our spirits are strong, but we need your help. [Please consider joining with us. Help strengthen us to make a shared impact in the future of our beloved republic](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HfjZt-BPNqgA3ijwg_5Jj_OlHnCTnA95yf3sUe8HbeyMcSJ-6s4zE6j7cXPO7LStuMPWP9ysirak2NstXCAaOEeFCApHadEg3osZTOLgU4YS59gih396278NTcb--TYbDUMNBLiV8Uj6vWljwVPAQ8DVq8NJF_nwrhCfD14vH6uuIqBWLugW_HZJlcMHo0qxhg/3yx/jX77NntwRTGISaEn3vMf7g/h8/fwduRxY2eMLW09o_cQJ8OzkFkJzkknsDGSQshCPLQko).
Keep the faith. Never quit.
Ever onward,
|

There's no mistaking Paul's rebuke. They were using the law as a weapon to exact revenge or gain control. Sound familiar? Paul cross examines those who are so eager to engage in lawfare, encouraging them to remember who judges all things in the end. We are battle weary, but we won't forget! clean_body: All the latest news from the front lines of True the Vote | | | August 21, 2023 | | True the Vote Responds in a Big Way All the latest news from the front lines of True the Vote | | | | | | | | | mailto:?subject=Post%20from%20True%20the%20Vote&body=True%20the%20Vote%20Responds%20in%20a%20Big%20Way%3A%20All%20the%20latest%20news%20from%20the%20front%20lines%20of%20True%20the%20Vote%0A%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fnewsletter.truethevote.org%2Fp%2Ftrue-the-vote-responds-in-a-big-way ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | What’s Happening with True the Vote? Lots. You may have noticed we’ve taken particularly harsh incoming for the past several weeks. The Georgia State Election Board sued us (making it the third lawsuit we’re fighting in the state.) Next came a much discussed Wall Street Journal editorial that repeated the same inaccuracies we’ve heard so many times before (though it was the first time from the Journal.) Then there were the Michigan and Georgia alternate elector indictments. All leading, of course, to the indictments leveled at President Donald Trump. It’s a difficult time to be a truth teller. Or to debate. Or even ask questions. Which is exactly why we cannot stop. There was something, many things actually, very wrong with the 2020 Election. And as Americans, we have the constitutional right to talk about election integrity without fear of retribution like indictments, lawsuits, prison, or any other form of persecution. But yet ... here we are. Only if we keep praying and working will this situation get better. Let’s go! Eyes on Georgia. This week we're Atlanta-bound, accompanying our all-star legal team to present an important argument in one of our cases. This one involves the movie “2000 Mules” and a recent Supreme Court ruling concerning the definition of intimidation , which is (of course) what we’re being accused of. That's all I can say for now, but I’ll keep you updated. This could make for a legal tidal wave in contemporary jurisprudence. Additionally, we’ve filed our response in the Georgia State Election Board suit. And, tonight we’ll tell our side of the story of Georgia - a story no one has heard before. Please join us if you can. | Keep Foreign Influence Out. Though against us, it's essential to remember that situation is far from resolved. We're pushing on both federal and state fronts to ensure foreign orchestrated software breaches are stopped and those who knew and remained complicit are now held accountable. Our aim is to make sure this never happens again. A Whole New Look Is Coming Soon. We’re also preparing to reveal a whole new look and feel for True the Vote; one that celebrates the greatness of our republic and the commitment to representation through the voice of the vote. We’ll be sharing new tools to use for everything from voter registration to election day support. 2024 will be the biggest election of our lives. We aim to be ready! We need you. It is hard to put into words how great our need is. expensive, yes, but to ward off constant, daily attacks while preparing for 2024 initiatives - it is both financially and emotionally very costly. We are staying the course, our spirits are strong, but we need your help. . Keep the faith. Never quit. Ever onward, | P.S. A friend recently pointed out a significant lesson in Paul's letter to the Corinthians -- in Chapter 6, he calls out the Corinthian church for bringing frivolous legal cases against one another. There's no mistaking Paul's rebuke. They were using the law as a weapon to exact revenge or gain control. Sound familiar? Paul cross examines those who are so eager to engage in lawfare, encouraging them to remember who judges all things in the end. We are battle weary, but we won't forget! May God continue to bless and keep America. | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) True the Vote 12333 Sowden Rd Ste B, PMB 73476 Houston, Texas 77080-2059, United States

name: American Defense News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqi2mmau75hn14rolr3n1k92tbst7p2ecu1ogtto_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdim8or6cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhgtdr5718ubjfrdd9ie28j44rpet2hre6qdgg6o_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdim8or6cdh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmr32b2d0pm0m4aatscn0qa3c5ra3803jqt4nc7o_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdim8or6cdh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: just the thought sends shivers down my spine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Today, we’re digging into the cold, hard truth.

| |

---
| | | **I’ll give it to you straight:**

The Democrats just squeaked ahead in the polls... They're beating us in fundraising... And they're attacking a dozen of our top GOP recruits...

_**[So now I’m forced to ask you for a small donation of ten or twenty bucks so we can catch up before it’s too late.
](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664383%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RG8%2fbYeP9QGuc8Xxcb11cQ&sysid=1 "So now I’m forced to ask
you for a small donation of ten or twenty bucks so we can catch up before it’s too
late.")**_
Look,

Radical Democrats are throwing our country to the wolves - can you imagine what would be in store if they won again next year? _Just the thought sends shivers down my spine. _

**What are we up against?** The Biden campaign just raked in $77 MILLION from their army of Liberal donors. Top Democrat Hakeem Jeffries raked in over $29 MILLION to annihilate the only firewall we have in Washington.

**So what are we to do about it?** I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - my buddy from the Bayou - to ask Conservatives to kindly put their money where their mouths are before we lose everything. _**[If everyone reading this kicked in ten or twenty bucks, we’d have the resources we need to save our House Majority and take back this country of ours.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664384%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4jtzZ95FN%2b49ltwUp36UCw&sysid=1 "If everyone reading this
kicked in ten or twenty bucks, we’d have the resources we need to save our House
Majority and take back this country of ours.")**_

WITH YOUR HELP: We have a fighting chance to sweep the next elections.

WITHOUT YOUR HELP: We might as well pack it up and enjoy our House Majority while it lasts... because we’ll be crushed by the Democrats.

I apologize for crowding your inbox but I hope you take my words to heart.

_**[So can we count on you?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664398%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WLxDbO251WJv0NmMDMtAOA&sysid=1 "So can we count on
you? ")**_

For God and Country,

Senator John Kennedy

Teammates, Patrick from the finance team here. Normally, this is the time in the month where I'd be giving you an update on our fundraising and asking you to make a one-time donation. **But I'm going to do something a little bit different today.** Instead of asking you for a one-time donation, I want to encourage you to become a monthly recurring donor. Monthly donors are the backbone of our team. It's funding we know we can count on _every single month_ to cover our costs – which aren't huge, but we still have to pay for things like the tools we use to send this email and keep our supporter records up-to-date. **Will you help keep building a Maryland where no one is left behind by becoming a monthly donor today?** **[Yes, count me in for $5 every month.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68434259/423023386/-2109446099?refcode=EM_FL_WES_20230821_fr_monthly_fd_mf_90da_xx_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDFlNWExZi00NTQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WQ21iRGFk3---IMNHkKeKQmWTr77fZ2oSyFBOL0Qvd8=)** **[Sorry, I can't commit to every month. clean_body: | = Teammates, Patrick from the finance team here. Normally, this is the time in the month where I'd be giving you an update on our fundraising and asking you to make a one-time donation. But I'm going to do something a little bit different today. Instead of asking you for a one-time donation, I want to encourage you to become a monthly recurring donor. Monthly donors are the backbone of our team. It's funding we know we can count on every single month to cover our costs – which aren't huge, but we still have to pay for things like the tools we use to send this email and keep our supporter records up-to-date. Will you help keep building a Maryland where no one is left behind by becoming a monthly donor today? = = As always, thanks for having Wes and Aruna's backs. Patrick Denny Finance Director, Team Moore-Miller | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your governor! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind. body:
#
You probably already know about the Republican Debate this Wednesday. We’re looking forward to it as much as you are — which is to say, not at all.
Before it happens, we have an urgent request: We need to ask you to make a donation to VoteVets.
If that’s all you need to hear, click the link below and make that contribution. But if you want to hear a little more about why, let us explain.
CHIP IN: **[https://act.votevets.org/go/GOP-Debate](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august23.WcYsFQ&refcode=em230821-1-15&t=1&akid=15697%2E3013755%2EiniwaJ)**
We can expect to hear a bunch of nonsense at the debate, to be sure. But arguably the most important thing that’s going to happen is the donations that will start flowing to these candidates.
They’re going to raise millions of dollars on debate night and in the days to come.
But here’s why your donation is so important: These campaigns are going to spend that money just as fast as they raise it. It costs millions of dollars to run a presidential campaign, even in a primary. They’re going to have to spend every dollar fighting amongst themselves (or paying their legal bills in Trump’s case).
That means your donation today goes twice as far. We can put every dollar we raise this week away, saving it for the right moment, the right opportunity.
It's a fundamental Military strategy: When your adversary is distracted, you take the initiative. You advance.
This is our opportunity to run up the score, Derek. We can’t let it slip away.
**[Make your first donation to VoteVets. Make it for $3. Make it so we can put it to use winning the most important election of our lifetimes — the one we’re in right now.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august23.WcYsFQ&refcode=em230821-1-15&t=2&akid=15697%2E3013755%2EiniwaJ)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arizona Democrats**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68434653/423024936/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230821_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFhYzBlMWYtNDY0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y-pR0t8felaEgngqRG4kOu1ClLj1zRKi7Fcnqzaa6mg=)
---
This guy is at it again with his extremist, right-wing agenda that hurts Arizona’s students. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68434658/423024943/-864030063?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230821_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFhYzBlMWYtNDY0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y-pR0t8felaEgngqRG4kOu1ClLj1zRKi7Fcnqzaa6mg=) This is Tom Horne — our current Superintendent of Public Instruction. [**If you’re already ready to unseat him, pitch in right now. But if you still need convincing, here are a few reasons we could use your help today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68434669/423024953/-864030063?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230821_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFhYzBlMWYtNDY0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y-pR0t8felaEgngqRG4kOu1ClLj1zRKi7Fcnqzaa6mg=) Instead of fighting for good-faith policies that support Arizona’s students, he’s worked in lockstep with the right-wing majority in our state legislature to stoke culture wars that have targeted trans students, English immersion students, and have banned diverse studies courses in classrooms in Glendale. **Tom Horne isn’t working for Arizona students — he’s working to satisfy an extremist, loud minority on the right. **BAD NEWS:** These are all open seats and MAGA Republicans are going to fight like hell to try and pick them up in 2024.

**GOOD NEWS:** We’re no strangers to tough races. In 2020 we provided over 70,000 rides to the polls in the Georgia runoffs. In 2022, we contacted 3.1 MILLION Black voters and invested over one MILLION dollars into Black Democratic candidates.

**BAD NEWS:** Doing that work costs money, and we’re already starting to fall behind on our August fundraising goal. If we can’t pick up the pace now, we might not be able to power ANY of our endorsed candidates to victory.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Linda=20Beigel=20Schulman?=
subject: Why I’m all in for Jim Gaughran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Gaughran for Congress _
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5cc360841102/party-12740930?e=a6aa651d40)
---
| | [ ](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=beb469ba9f&e=a6aa651d40)
---
| |
**Dear Friend** ,

Reasonable and comprehensive national gun safety reform is an issue I believe in with all my heart. My son Scott was the teacher who died, saving the lives of 31 of his students, in the Parkland High School massacre five years ago. From the unspeakable pain of losing Scott, I drew resolve to do what I could to prevent other mass shootings. That’s when I began reaching out to state officials to see what could be done to get reasonable and effective gun safety legislation passed here in New York.

**Jim Gaughran took up the cause of reasonable gun safety immediately.** From his first day as State Senator, Jim was a champion for passing major reforms in our state’s gun laws. Without hesitation, Jim fought hard to make the people of Long Island safer.

**That’s why I’m so proud to serve as the chairwoman for Jim Gaughran’s campaign for Congress** : Jim is the real deal. Jim’s work in the Senate has made shootings far less common in New York than in many other states. In Congress, Jim will bring that same commitment to passing critical and necessary national legislation on this issue. You can rest assured Jim Gaughran will work to make America, and Long Island, a safer place.

[Please join me in donating to Jim’s campaign for Congress – any amount helps.](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=66a726bc6b&e=a6aa651d40)

Jim knows how to build coalitions to find common ground on issues that can be filled with mistrust on all sides. I not only believe, but I know, as does Jim, that most people in this country want to reach real solutions to prevent gun violence while preserving constitutional rights. To accomplish this we need trustworthy, experienced leaders whose hearts are in the right place – **there is no one better than Jim Gaughran.**
---
|
---
Linda, Jim, and Linda’s husband Michael have been partners in battling gun violence.
| If you care about the lives of your children, your partner, your family, your friends, or your co-workers, being victims of senseless and preventable gun violence, please donate to Jim’s campaign.... It will be an investment you won’t regret.

[In order to get Jim’s campaign off to a strong start, I ask that you consider making a donation today. ](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=df0d11f18a&e=a6aa651d40)

I know if we keep focused, we can make America a safer place for everyone. Jim Gaughran is my partner, and should be yours, in making that America a reality.

Sincerely,
Linda Beigel Schulman

[P.S. Even a small donation helps. Please consider giving what you can. ](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=d2e7a3335d&e=a6aa651d40)
---
|
---
---
| |

Paid for by Jim Gaughran for Congress _._

**Our mailing address is:**
PO BOX 20574
Huntington Station, NY 11746
[Add us to your address book](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=028c195386&e=a6aa651d40)
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=ca7cef8f27&e=a6aa651d40&c=421d295051) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=ca7cef8f27&e=a6aa651d40&c=421d295051).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20For=20Congress?=
subject: UFCW Endorses Dave Min For Congress
body:
Essential Food and Commercial Workers Join Police Officers, Teachers, Health Care Workers, And Coalition of Unions Supporting Min | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3b8395880759/ufcw-endorses-dave-min-for-congress-15660688?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For immediate release** : August 21, 2023
**Contact** : press@davemin.com
**UFCW Endorses Dave Min For Congress** _Essential Food and Commercial Workers Join Police Officers, Teachers, _ _Health Care Workers, And Coalition of Unions Supporting Min _
**IRVINE, CA —** Today, the United Food and Commercial Workers International Union Local 324 announced their endorsement of Dave Min for Congress, adding to a diverse coalition which includes labor and national advocacy groups, as well as local, statewide and federal elected officials. UFCW Local 324 joins International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) Local 47, International Brotherhood of Teamsters Joint Council 42 and International Union of Painters and Allied Trades (IUPAT) District Council 36–as well as the statewide arm of SEIU and the California Federation of Teachers–in supporting State Senator Dave Min for US Congress. “**Throughout his career, Dave Min has been a champion for working families,** ” said Andrea Zinder, President of UFCW 324. “**As State Senator, he has consistently stood with our members, whether it’s supporting them in our organizing actions or by voting for legislation to improve the livelihood and dignity of workers in our grocery stores, our pharmacies, or elsewhere. He has spent his life in public service advocating for a fair economy, starting out at the SEC to hold Wall Street accountable and pushing for family-first economic policies in the U.S. Senate and while at the Center for American Progress. We need Dave’s voice in Congress and we’re thrilled to support him.** ” UFCW Local 324 represents more than 22,000 workers in Orange County and parts of Los Angeles County, pulling from a number of industries: grocery, retail, drug store, banking, food processing, packaging, and cannabis industries. As a State Senator, Dave Min has stood with members of UFCW Local 324 on the picket line, as they came together to advocate for better wages, hours and working conditions. While approaching $1 million raised, Min has consolidated support from local, state, and national endorsers. Min entered the race with support from current CA-47 Representative, Katie Porter. In recent months, Min has announced the endorsements of California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, State Treasurer Fiona Ma, Insurance Commissioner Ricard Lara, Superintendent of Public Schools Tony Thurmond, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, more than 50 local Orange County government officials, and more than 60 state legislators. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=ad4f6751d6&e=7017cc100e). Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on hate crimes, gun violence prevention, family safety, and women’s reproductive rights. In the wake of the 2021 Huntington Beach Oil Spill, he stood up to the oil industry and led efforts to end offshore drilling. Min serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. He previously chaired the Senate Cybersecurity Select Committee. Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout.
#####
_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---
| | **Our mailing address is:**
PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Min serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. He previously chaired the Senate Cybersecurity Select Committee. Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout. California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. | | Our mailing address is: PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616 | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Dave Min For Senate PO Box 5959 Irvine, CA 92616-5959 * USA

subject: Our ability to supply our national armory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler]( "Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler")
body:
MUST be addressed | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/741790e0f8af/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-6144349?e=d6699466fe)
---
| | [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=cba4bbed1c&e=d6699466fe)
---
| Peter,
---
| | Our increasing inability to manufacture weapons and ammo domestically puts our national security at risk.

We must take action to strengthen America's economic prosperity, bolster our national security, and ensure the readiness of our military and civilian population.

We've become heavily reliant on China and Russia for critical minerals like antimony, which is vital to ammunition production. This dependency jeopardizes our ability to produce everything from armor-piercing bullets and explosives to military equipment and even nuclear weapons.

**As such, I’m advocating for this 3 pillared initiative:**

**_More Jobs for Americans_ :** By revitalizing our domestic weapons and ammunition production, we can create well-paying jobs across our nation.

**_National Security_ :** We need to bring ammunition production back to American soil, preventing adversaries from controlling our supply chain and safeguarding our defense capabilities from potential disruptions.

_**A Better Armed Military and Civilian Population:**_ By reestablishing our domestic production capabilities, we can ensure a reliable supply of weapons and ammunition, enhancing our ability to face any challenges.

Recent efforts by the House Armed Services Committee to address the grip that China has on the antimony supply chain are promising steps in the right direction. I commend these initiatives and am committed to working with congressional leaders to advance these efforts!

**As Ohio's Congressional Candidate** , I promise to tirelessly work to prevent our defense capabilities from being compromised by external dependencies.

**Peter, your support is crucial to achieving these goals.** [**Join me in this fight for a stronger economy and enhanced national security by making a contribution to our campaign today.**](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=5e369763c5&e=d6699466fe)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Fwd: Do you actually want a secure election?
body:
| | |
---
---
I wanted to make sure you saw my email about poll worker recruitment day happening on Wednesday, August 23rd. In that email, I said, “Honest poll workers make or break election security.” This is a serious truth. [**Please sign up today**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to let us know you are interested in working the polls and ensuring the next election is secure. And I also wanted to share one of the responses we got from a supporter named Pat after the first email went out. _I have been a poll worker every election for several years. I want to lend support to your request - the classes ahead of time can be tedious, set up seems overwhelming and if you work Election Day it will be the longest day.**It is also the absolute most rewarding feeling ever once you get through it.** You interact with so many very interesting and varied people, you see the problems, how they are handled and are on the front line. There are very competent and knowledgeable people involved and able to give support and direction. **I encourage everyone to do it -** if you have never done it before, you will hopefully be assigned tasks that you feel comfortably competent to handle - and, after a couple of hours you’ll be an expert in the role._ As Pat stated, it is so rewarding to know that you are doing something that truly will make our elections more secure. Our nation cannot afford another 2020. [**Please sign up today.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---
|
---
From: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action [jenny.beth@teapartypatriots.org]
Date: 8/17/2023 4:07 PM EDT
**Subject: Do you actually want a secure election?**
---
We believe it is the right and duty of American citizens to be involved in the process of election administration, particularly if you want to ensure that our elections are secure. [**National Poll Worker Recruitment Day**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) is next week on Wednesday, August 23rd. The left is really good at recruiting people to work the polls. While conservatives are getting much better about filling those positions, we are still playing catch up. **_Honest poll workers make or break election security._** Various states have different laws about if they are paid positions and how much, minimum age requirements, and so on. But the crux of it is the same in every state: without patriots like you sacrificing your time, the majority of the people watching the election are radical, biased, left-wing activists. We are talking about activists who don’t care about honesty, integrity, or transparency. They will do anything to win, and the only way to stop them is by making sure America-loving patriots are in the room as well. If you want to help, or you’re just curious and possibly interested, [**please fill out the form on this page**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._ZOVksA_g) and we will reach out to you to answer your questions and help you get signed up. Additionally, please help recruit your friends and family to fill these roles as well! It’s worth repeating: our country will never have secure elections without patriots like you stepping up to fill poll worker roles. Your country needs you – [**sign up today!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin PS: You can sign up now and do not need to wait until August 23rd, and you can sign up after August 23rd as well. Making it a “day” is just a way the Election Assistance Commission brings attention to the need for poll workers.

clean_body: | | | I wanted to make sure you saw my email about poll worker recruitment day happening on Wednesday, August 23rd. In that email, I said, “Honest poll workers make or break election security.” This is a serious truth. to let us know you are interested in working the polls and ensuring the next election is secure. And I also wanted to share one of the responses we got from a supporter named Pat after the first email went out. I have been a poll worker every election for several years. I want to lend support to your request - the classes ahead of time can be tedious, set up seems overwhelming and if you work Election Day it will be the longest day.It is also the absolute most rewarding feeling ever once you get through it. You interact with so many very interesting and varied people, you see the problems, how they are handled and are on the front line. There are very competent and knowledgeable people involved and able to give support and direction. I encourage everyone to do it - if you have never done it before, you will hopefully be assigned tasks that you feel comfortably competent to handle - and, after a couple of hours you’ll be an expert in the role. As Pat stated, it is so rewarding to know that you are doing something that truly will make our elections more secure. Our nation cannot afford another 2020. In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | From: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action [jenny.beth@teapartypatriots.org] Date: 8/17/2023 4:07 PM EDT Subject: Do you actually want a secure election? We believe it is the right and duty of American citizens to be involved in the process of election administration, particularly if you want to ensure that our elections are secure. is next week on Wednesday, August 23rd. The left is really good at recruiting people to work the polls. While conservatives are getting much better about filling those positions, we are still playing catch up. Honest poll workers make or break election security. Various states have different laws about if they are paid positions and how much, minimum age requirements, and so on. But the crux of it is the same in every state: without patriots like you sacrificing your time, the majority of the people watching the election are radical, biased, left-wing activists. Now, as the 2024 election looms just ahead, it’s even more important that we defend our majority so we can continue this fight for America. And with our army of America First patriots fighting alongside us, I know that we will WIN in 2024. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Congressman (TX-38) U.S. Army Captain Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

# [Add your name: Tell Trump he's a coward for refusing to debate](https://default.salsalabs.org/T748efdd1-51d2-44f7-8d8c-ec080c1c12f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | The first Republican presidential primary debate will take place this week on August 23rd – and Trump has decided not to participate. A handful of other Republican candidates have qualified and will be on the stage, including Mike Pence and Chris Christie, but Trump is too much of a coward to face them in person. Trump has no problem hurling insults at his opponents via social media, or softball interviews, but he is too chicken to do it on the same stage, where they can hit back. [Add your name: Tell Trump he's a coward for refusing to debate >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a6a8bce-fd4d-4672-a707-2b0642d0a546/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: FWD: I want to hear from you
body:
| | | Peter, Our virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Ron Wyden is tomorrow, and I wanted to make sure you saw the senator’s message. **[Will you join us tomorrow afternoon to discuss all things environment, climate, and conservation with Senator Wyden?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68436348/423029870/1199808482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZjEzMDc0LTRjNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9bKT_9CKxROoUA7cl8lcAMfzA1YLmYrSu_44eRvUEK8=&emci=5b8bab69-3c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0ff13074-4c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** **OLCV’s Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Ron Wyden**
_**WHEN:**_ Tuesday, August 22nd from 2:00 - 3:15 PM PT
_**WHERE:**_ Zoom – [**RSVP now!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68436349/423029871/1199808482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZjEzMDc0LTRjNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9bKT_9CKxROoUA7cl8lcAMfzA1YLmYrSu_44eRvUEK8=&emci=5b8bab69-3c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0ff13074-4c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) We’ll hear about the latest news on conservation efforts in progress, celebrate the 1-year anniversary of President Biden’s Affordable Clean Energy Plan being passed and signed, and so much more. [**RSVP and submit a question for the senator today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68436350/423029872/1199808482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZjEzMDc0LTRjNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9bKT_9CKxROoUA7cl8lcAMfzA1YLmYrSu_44eRvUEK8=&emci=5b8bab69-3c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0ff13074-4c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) I’ll be moderating at the virtual town hall and hope I’ll be seeing you tomorrow! Best,
Lindsey Scholten

Executive Director, OLCV [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68436351/423029873/1199808482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZjEzMDc0LTRjNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9bKT_9CKxROoUA7cl8lcAMfzA1YLmYrSu_44eRvUEK8=&emci=5b8bab69-3c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0ff13074-4c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Dear Peter, Today marks the one-year anniversary of the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA)–and its historic investments in climate action being signed into law. It included my Clean Energy for America Act – which for the first time, makes sure that the tax code rewards emissions reductions, and encourages the development of new clean energy technologies. This is permanent and one of the most consequential bills in my time in public service. This historic win for protecting our planet would never have happened without the power of people like you and organizations like OLCV. But there is more to be done on many issues to preserve and protect Oregon's environment, which is why I hope you will [join me](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68436352/423029874/1199808482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZjEzMDc0LTRjNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9bKT_9CKxROoUA7cl8lcAMfzA1YLmYrSu_44eRvUEK8=&emci=5b8bab69-3c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0ff13074-4c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) and OLCV members in discussing the environment during a virtual town hall on Tuesday, August 22nd at 2:00PM. We will have the chance to celebrate recent wins, get updates on climate investments from IRA, and hear the latest on efforts to protect our natural legacy and environment for future generations, including better protection of our clean air, water, and our public lands in Oregon. Even more, this town hall is about hearing from you on what environmental issue is critical to you. **WHAT:** OLCV’s Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Ron Wyden **WHEN:** Tuesday, August 22nd from 2:00 - 3:15 PM PT **WHERE:** Zoom – [**RSVP now!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68436353/423029875/1199808482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZjEzMDc0LTRjNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9bKT_9CKxROoUA7cl8lcAMfzA1YLmYrSu_44eRvUEK8=&emci=5b8bab69-3c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0ff13074-4c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) The updated River Democracy Act came about after directly hearing from Oregonians across our state about what was important to them at meetings like this one, so I’m looking forward to hearing from you next week and finding out what we can work on together next. [**RSVP today and submit your question, idea, or comment for me!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68436354/423029876/1199808482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZjEzMDc0LTRjNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9bKT_9CKxROoUA7cl8lcAMfzA1YLmYrSu_44eRvUEK8=&emci=5b8bab69-3c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0ff13074-4c40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) I hope you’ll join me and let me hear from you! Yours,
Ron Wyden
US Senator of Oregon |

This is permanent and one of the most consequential bills in my time in public service. This historic win for protecting our planet would never have happened without the power of people like you and organizations like OLCV. But there is more to be done on many issues to preserve and protect Oregon's environment, which is why I hope you will and OLCV members in discussing the environment during a virtual town hall on Tuesday, August 22nd at 2:00PM. We will have the chance to celebrate recent wins, get updates on climate investments from IRA, and hear the latest on efforts to protect our natural legacy and environment for future generations, including better protection of our clean air, water, and our public lands in Oregon. Even more, this town hall is about hearing from you on what environmental issue is critical to you. WHAT: OLCV’s Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Ron Wyden WHEN: Tuesday, August 22nd from 2:00 - 3:15 PM PT WHERE: Zoom – The updated River Democracy Act came about after directly hearing from Oregonians across our state about what was important to them at meetings like this one, so I’m looking forward to hearing from you next week and finding out what we can work on together next. I hope you’ll join me and let me hear from you! Yours, Ron Wyden US Senator of Oregon | ---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. | ---|---

subject: Stop the Tennessee Gun Grab!

body:
The anti-gun lobby wants to pass red flag gun confiscation...
%recipient.md5_hash%
*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* | | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl44cmhi9b90rfbkua44r5jm5ee674vovdquphig_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdimaoj2c3h2bs)
---
| | |
* * *
_BREAKING_ : GUN GRABBERS ARE PUSHING FOR GUN CONTROL IN TENNESSEE
* * *
---
| Dear Friend,

Will you stand up for your right to keep and bear arms?

You see, following the senseless murders at the Covenant School, the anti-gun lobby has pounced on the opportunity to force gun control in Tennessee.

To make matters worse, some Republicans are feeling the pressure to “do something” and join with Democrats to pass some form of gun control.

With the Special Session just already underway, we must make our voices heard loud and clear. The Second Amendment SHALL NOT BE INFRINGED in Tennessee!

This could be a massive loss of liberty if we don’t act today!

[_**This is why I’m hoping you will join me in rushing your most generous contribution to my friends with Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) to help them immediately kick off their campaign to stop gun control in Tennessee**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2tl1sba8nlabdj0rp18drvl0jsit81idjut7q18_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdimaoj2c3h2bs).

When it comes to organizing the grassroots, to pressure politicians to do the right thing, YAL is the best in the business!

But they need our help to fund the effort, so can I count on you to chip in today to stop gun control by clicking one of the links below? >>>_[Contribute $50](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmiqt8cv61p3h5jnephitpc09fkjjatihasuojno_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdimaoj2c3h2bs)_ <<< >>>_[Contribute $20](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zva955n6get8l2k67i0b7asdkkld8qe6v6oktse8_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdimaoj2c3h2bs)_ <<< >>>_[Contribute $10](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvplo6p9mm1m6k6vkm7ohpln5j229e159pi78oqo_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdimaoj2c3h2bs)_ <<< >>>_[Contribute $5](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv59edn06taj6bu1svfsko5jmdj55mipjjk4a8bg_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdimaoj2c3h2bs)_ <<< >>>_[Contribute Any Amount](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2c7irdcm8bkhn9qsalrgk3jlhjsd33bgk6u7s0g_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdimaoj2c3h2bs)_ <<<

YAL has big plans to stop gun control in Tennessee.

It involves going door-to-door, direct mail, targeted digital advertising, live phone calls, and text messaging to mobilize Tennesseans to contact their elected officials, telling them to say no to gun control.

But they can’t do it without your help. Will you step up today, Friend?

**[_Chip in $5 or $10 today to stop gun control in Tennessee_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu6of4up9kfct6gbnme0v1go11cgohpf7v70nm80_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdimaoj2c3h2bs)!**

For liberty,

Glenn Jacobs
_Mayor of Knox County_

P.S.**[_Don't delay. Chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford to help us stop gun control today_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc0uhv8k5661k08oih2e5aiosi4c3nmuqigajgi8_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdimaoj2c3h2bs)!**

Because of the generous support of AMERICAN PATRIOTS like YOU, Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on hundreds of college campuses and in state capitols across the country.

Our four-step mission is to identify, educate, train, and mobilize youth activists to
MAKE LIBERTY WIN!

Since 2018, YAL-recruited youth activists have knocked over 4,000,000 doors in support of liberty candidates and liberty legislation across America. YAL's [Hazlitt Coalition](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpef3v4biogosm3uarhmbkh8k031tugp0mb91p70_rp22sh2s8i66p72cdimaoj2c3h2bs) now numbers over 300 liberty state legislators from more than 40 states advocating for principled policies that free markets, protect individual liberties and promote peace.

subject: I wonder why?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
