[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=16cd3de2a01f42f0944f7fc0127df4c1&_e=8BKuM0ZunSuKM_0_bRWbYXOuNTaWF_qlIs7ZAPH4oFDW58IO32RlTz-R3by9RdASqvJwtxALoNzoave5G6QT8j16NCRGx39kEe-S1DP6TPd4AMoWNpX5vT6J8mAocDOEEgq0IfyYe-KuA1G597ZSFU9uzCOEX5Okbg6GCB7qZvbx2P1p_yx_r7oTIAkdgfQ4nPJS1uuxRmv_GCw3u74wykFWwMTsTkchaijZiq2P4WQqNXaBsy52hxRAw_hrOcUQWDsC7gEs9peBq7BwK0oqFg8SRVt-9fhaKTI3AuA7-qzBv_3-0xgKfL7FzFhNRJwjhkZYAmTah6-DckG2CxxzIvNwP30-t67qbrO3K7T4XkP_7Bxxcl3JObiaHOnOrAnjDu1e1zd5g7HPfafDvEvS3JUKAb7G8jGxq0nJtrtTqI8%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy writing to you from Montana this afternoon.

Recently I came across an email from my opponent in my inbox in which he wrote to his supporters that he is “ _**one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators**_ ,” and that political experts are saying that his “ _**[Senate] seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help**_ ...”

**He’s right** – he is vulnerable to defeat, and for good reason. Jon Tester represents a state in the United States Senate that Donald Trump won in 2020 by SIXTEEN POINTS.

Meanwhile, **Tester is in the United States Senate voting with Joe Biden 91% of the time.** I have a message for Jon: We’re running to represent Montana, NOT MASSACHUSETTS. _**

I know Jon Tester is vulnerable**_

_**Jon Tester knows he is vulnerable**_

****But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans' best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter.****

Races are won by campaigns who can reach their target audience more efficiently and with greater regularity.

Right now, we’re losing the money game. ****[{link to donate}](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=16cd3de2a01f42f0944f7fc0127df4c1&_e=8BKuM0ZunSuKM_0_bRWbYXOuNTaWF_qlIs7ZAPH4oFDW58IO32RlTz-R3by9RdASqvJwtxALoNzoave5G6QT8j16NCRGx39kEe-S1DP6TPd4AMoWNpX5vT6J8mAocDOEEgq0IfyYe-KuA1G597ZSFU9uzCOEX5Okbg6GCB7qZvbx2P1p_yx_r7oTIAkdgfQ4nPJS1uuxRmv_GCw3u74wykFWwMTsTkchaijZiq2P4WQqNXaBsy52hxRAw_hrOcUQWDsC7gEs9peBq7BwK0oqFuwv8xjb5o58LJHkNNsUWNhjAqebEwKYgJLNf386bBH7SHfNPj-nrEhFgMAUaGVMJhFCty4pyqn3Z-0oKqoYDrll5uEfDKYdgtKEQT6IBCI55aIiVJE9HSowFwYGBDYdSIlCBwDeDZLZ5mKCsypvIrk%3D)**** Sen. Tester has raised more than $10 million this year from small-dollar donors like you. We’ve raised a fraction of that. We really need the help. Your donation really might make all the difference.

[**LINK TO DONATE** ](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=16cd3de2a01f42f0944f7fc0127df4c1&_e=8BKuM0ZunSuKM_0_bRWbYXOuNTaWF_qlIs7ZAPH4oFDW58IO32RlTz-R3by9RdASqvJwtxALoNzoave5G6QT8j16NCRGx39kEe-S1DP6TPd4AMoWNpX5vT6J8mAocDOEEgq0IfyYe-KuA1G597ZSFU9uzCOEX5Okbg6GCB7qZvbx2P1p_yx_r7oTIAkdgfQ4nPJS1uuxRmv_GCw3u74wykFWwMTsTkchaijZiq2P4WQqNXaBsy52hxRAw_hrOcUQWDsC7gEs9peBq7BwK0oqFpNeNAlIznMP3lpiWBDdG4zV8rZs2qENTfGsc3KQvIn8mPjZRA1ng8nx4nuxTSYZeQ_-bK1-HnIZ7T0PYjvPtEikmUWuXTbbRrmayvXWNhNctX7Yh2PLfTU1p4TPyM5wZKoxgIE6VveeWHY_O-LUR5Y%3D)

**Please let me hear from you now or in the very near future.**

I cannot win this race without support from conservatives around the country.

**Not only will this be the toughest undertaking of my life, but it’ll also be ugly, too.**

You may or may not know who Jon Tester is but let me tell you this right now: _**you need to know his name**_. You’re going to be hearing it a lot over the coming 15 months.

[**I'D BE GRATEFUL IF YOU DONATED TODAY** ](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=16cd3de2a01f42f0944f7fc0127df4c1&_e=8BKuM0ZunSuKM_0_bRWbYXOuNTaWF_qlIs7ZAPH4oFDW58IO32RlTz-R3by9RdASqvJwtxALoNzoave5G6QT8j16NCRGx39kEe-S1DP6TPd4AMoWNpX5vT6J8mAocDOEEgq0IfyYe-KuA1G597ZSFU9uzCOEX5Okbg6GCB7qZvbx2P1p_yx_r7oTIAkdgfQ4nPJS1uuxRmv_GCw3u74wykFWwMTsTkchaijZiq2P4WQqNXaBsy52hxRAw_hrOcUQWDsC7gEs9peBq7BwK0oqFq-ozRwxiSP4yWmGfmJvtX8GHN0DfRDiLRiPucMTAPoi2OzGCaF2W4SBqV5GIEtUy3YEXVDnV_f87AY4pZwM3g1xVkb0RQKWZv1_WaQmmZSIt6B7urVR_Xc_w1cn5tDxakyLp29-svN8agumrtrELL0%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=16cd3de2a01f42f0944f7fc0127df4c1&_e=8BKuM0ZunSuKM_0_bRWbYXOuNTaWF_qlIs7ZAPH4oFDW58IO32RlTz-R3by9RdASqvJwtxALoNzoave5G6QT8j16NCRGx39kEe-S1DP6TPd4AMoWNpX5vT6J8mAocDOEEgq0IfyYe-KuA1G597ZSFU9uzCOEX5Okbg6GCB7qZvbx2P1p_yx_r7oTIAkdgfQ4nPJS1uuxRmv_GCw3u74wykFWwMTsTkchaijZiq2P4WQqNXaBsy52hxRAw_hrOcUQWDsC7gEs9peBq7BwK0oqFkDhYYScUCj6hRRHrYbOa59dPAlS8B8xVkYA9rhXRn5UfzH8JIBRZ9KI7Y4Bcu4fpH5spwtxOsmPvLRGfKKyhUend6aM91wkkYVmv0mQ_ph5Xsyt_J-cqPT2-JJtf_2A3wJFIRP26yXegAXgWiFLTdM%3D)

* * *
---

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=16cd3de2a01f42f0944f7fc0127df4c1&_e=8BKuM0ZunSuKM_0_bRWbYU_MDJpSMbHPszsU6B6hDroD-i3HTyOdaeEL7Sb29qY8oWjMMIPDWBWv-3-noqKHOWbqTgcax6H950UGjzX5I83M4bCGHzXHMzYs01hUcsNae19t7H1XkKK2pKVlBtvBqqH-DNjbQfq2bU1BU7TUbE7K-sUmLeTINv1k9DeBxe2BKY9JViEzFqGLWxMqu4JtsA%3D%3D) [](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=16cd3de2a01f42f0944f7fc0127df4c1&_e=8BKuM0ZunSuKM_0_bRWbYYxMNjVBd1ia4rnqogppz_Y9j3dybbkx1vSyDR-SzkXP83E3jIwUuBFf_Ptb5Eu17tlpy979nPOBH2BB_tcpiMPKwHEo6rYvePENVgVLqIs0KXuYltStb058tC1TkermTSX78MABikzeZ3FhQBHRg27QRLn9VrRVCPKmJT76TT3_0ygb1AW9dVokzvyJZTevFA%3D%3D) [](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=16cd3de2a01f42f0944f7fc0127df4c1&_e=8BKuM0ZunSuKM_0_bRWbYWGbf6YCvwkVNORkxHILM-Jk-BgFBZZTBjxfBT1UcrXM9iz73SEYs75vnwYFT7hLZgY24FoljwVgAW-XrtAJDbsWdSdp4_HPj950WN3wwxJ8Kgmh2-9bjtZu4TujTbQ745TmreNxg85PoSYjpZesbZVwbMcze7HtG1myqkLBCeV92JhbX-WRpIf2EKgh9Bm5beYwLJsBFpwTiE7J71bxqzE%3D)

| PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
---

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: I’m fighting for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
It is up to me to earn your support for this campaign.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1efd503d183a4162943ace2788ac3340&_e=b8Iq8Y5fiFkcWz5XzP_B_wE5uRvBRANf7YTxSsK39TUePHbZ99bECG5hFZqr4x9VjZtAbG4GrLrpBoDwagQWp26wsp1b1eJYa-hOuOQMUVi-chWgtN-Po1j2kVV3FoTT8xgktD531TDzlEr1NAEQh5qXWmmD5WPKocU51Xv2JwCX2ApTqAh9pQW4_EUBIEgKkmAME0kVQcbITKUJxsuUoWWJsmdl_lBaAVAtb8OA18E1UfXSEcz9DB0j-ORVDVvJWARJvx_7if1znLOsRdK-3Hdkh180_amjQyA0v-wfOtgPNz28f3oGhNpZgTiHYZCCflgVvAwxpYFoXCYqG5q-6Z8cBZY5lT5K7peA7Fhiiv9g35SwemhXmI0-pcwjsMVrGjJp2Sw40pPm1G28O86VCSgDixrYBc7XyPx_BVtsJViLjRZEpx2aJwwHNtcWrfNK)
---
Friend, No one is entitled to anything in this world. I ask for your support because I am willing to do the work to earn it. As your next President, I owe it to you to prove that I am a fighter, and I will never back down from leading our Great American Comeback. Every day on the trail, I am making my case for what I envision to be the future of our country, and I believe that children across America deserve to see the greatness that is our potential as a nation. **_As President, I will be an energetic executive who will go on offense to take the big issues head-on and never shy away from a fight because the media or the Left doesn't like it. We are going to reverse Biden's disastrous policies, restore sanity to our nation, protect the rights of children and families, and end the decline. We will get to work on Day One and we will get it done._**
---

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Underwood=2C=20NEGOP=20Chairman?=
subject: Rejecting the social INJUSTICE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Our Conservative stand is CRUCIAL | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12646357?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=1f5b39fe33&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| Billions in lost revenue for Bud Light and Target have shown us the power of the pocket book in the social INJUSTICE wars that we are in the midst of.

**Now we’re learning** that Best Buy has been excluding caucasian Americans from its management training program and is discriminating against Christians!
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=2aceeb96d4&e=25844e23a8)
---
| They cancel us. They censor, demonize, attack and oust us when we refuse to embrace the narrative, which is an abomination to the values and principles that are at the foundation of our national character.

It is becoming more and more evident that the social justice movement infiltrating corporations, organizations and institutions under the guise of Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion are as disingenuous as the government spending bill fueling our economic destruction under the title _‘Inflation Reduction Act’._
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=541d7b93fa&e=25844e23a8)
---
| Yet we have seen how **EFFECTIVE** it is when we unite and take a stand with our voices and our treasure **to reject the Radical Left agenda. **

**Dear Peter, our Conservative values of limited government and individual liberties empower humanity to rise to greatness better than the so-called social justice movement ever could! **

We have had a front seat in learning the powerful lesson that craftily named movements _are just wolves in sheep's clothing_ to trick the masses into embracing the socialist Marxist ideology that ends in the enslavement of society.

More than ever, our party needs _your voice and involvement_ in the fight to uphold our Conservative values! **We encourage you to use your voice and your hard-earned dollars to make an impact in the social ‘justice’ war _that has been brought to us_. **

[**We also invite you to contribute to our unyielding efforts of achieving unending VICTORIES for our shared Republican principles that have a proven legacy of nurturing exceptionalism and prosperity.**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=99db96f1bf&e=25844e23a8)

[**Join us in these unprecedented times!**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f07d6e62c4&e=25844e23a8)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TODAY »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ec46dd695e&e=25844e23a8 "CONTRIBUTE TODAY »")
---
| For America’s Future,

Eric Underwood - Chairman
Republican Party of Nebraska
---
| | [PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
---
|

Elevating healthy discourse and policy contrast with other candidates isn't an attack, but will be an opportunity to see who will actually stand up to Xi Jinping as well as the Deep State. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: Just a littttlleee more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We just need a few of our team members to step up to help us reach our goal!
#
Derek, we had to reach out.
Let's start with some sweet sweet flattery. You're the best part of our job, Derek. No, seriously, you are just as much a part of Team Fetterman as those of us working full-time behind the scenes to power this movement.
**We can't do any of our work without your support.** From the moment you decided to support us by keeping up with John and joining our email list for updates, you've made an impact. It may not seem like much, but every single person we reach makes a difference!
**That's why we're calling on you again today.** We've done the math and we need 3 more people from 18326 to chip in today for us to be on track for our August fundraising goals.
**[Can we ask you to chip in anything now-- even $3 -- to help us check off 1 out of the 3 supporters we need from 18326 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230821-1?refcode=em20230821-1-8514&refcode2=8514_434096_ZYFcae&akid=8514%2E434096%2EZYFcae)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230821-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230821-8514&refcode2=8514_434096_ZYFcae&akid=8514%2E434096%2EZYFcae)**
Thank you!!!
-- Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230821-8514-footer&t=1&refcode2=8514_434096_ZYFcae&akid=8514%2E434096%2EZYFcae)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8514%2E434096%2EZYFcae)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8514%2E434096%2EZYFcae)

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Fox News amplified the Big Lie from the start
body:
This latest indictment speaks volumes.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1428%2E120351%2EcUjmCC)
In the span of _less_ than a month, Donald Trump has been indicted _**twice.**_
This week’s indictment came from Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis for Trump’s alleged actions in attempting to overturn the 2020 election. In total, there were 41 charges against 18 co-conspirators. Trump himself was charged with 13 felonies.
**Unsurprisingly, Fox News and the right-wing media ecosphere have come out in full force — in defense of Trump.**
But this isn't new, Peter. For years, Fox and other right-wing networks have been pushing near constant dangerous disinformation campaigns and lies that directly led to the January 6th insurrection.
This is why Courier Newsroom’s fact-based and data driven journalism is so important in the age of so much misinformation. And that’s why Courier is committed to expanding our network of newsrooms to the places that need it most.
[**If you're with us in this fight, will you pitch in $5 today so we can continue to counter right-wing misinformation?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230821?refcode=em20230821&amount=5&refcode2=1428_120351_cUjmCC&akid=1428%2E120351%2EcUjmCC)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230821?refcode=em20230821&amount=5&refcode2=1428_120351_cUjmCC&akid=1428%2E120351%2EcUjmCC)**
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Courier Newsroom [info@e.couriernewsroom.com]
Date: Sat, Aug 5, 2023 at 10:50 AM
Subject: The right-wing media is in overdrive to protect Trump
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
Peter, since the news broke about Donald Trump’s latest indictment over his attempt to overturn the 2020 election, the right-wing media ecosystem has gone all in on defending Trump’s actions and attacking the Biden administration.
Unfortunately, none of this is new. Media outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, and One America News Network, alongside personalities like Sean Hannity, Jesse Watters, and others, have been working to spread Trump’s Big Lie about the 2020 election from the beginning.
**You just have to look to the indictment itself for the evidence.** Prosecutors say the false claim that more than 200,000 fake ballots were counted in Pennsylvania was “integral” to Trump’s scheme — a claim that was parroted on Newsmax, OANN, Gateway Pundit, and others.
These claims were never anything more than lies. But now that Trump is once again likely to be the Republican nominee for president, the entire right-wing media ecosystem, led by Fox News, is in hyperdrive to spread more misinformation to protect him.
**And that’s exactly why Courier Newsroom exists. Our journalists are committed to correcting the record on right-wing misinformation and providing the full story for our readers.**
[**We serve readers in “news deserts” spanning 8 battleground states that could decide the next election — and none of our work would be possible without the support of donors like you. So Peter, can we count on you to pitch in $5 right now to help us keep up our important work as 2024 approaches?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230821?refcode=em20230821&amount=5&refcode2=1428_120351_cUjmCC&akid=1428%2E120351%2EcUjmCC)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230821?refcode=em20230821&amount=5&refcode2=1428_120351_cUjmCC&akid=1428%2E120351%2EcUjmCC)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer--1428&t=2&refcode2=1428_120351_cUjmCC&akid=1428%2E120351%2EcUjmCC)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1428%2E120351%2EcUjmCC)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Team Warner
subject: Add your name to make Election Day a holiday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Every American deserves for their voice to be heard

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68440170/423037778/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDcwNTIzZC01MzQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8L-Teu6Xh586OHCFG31dV0qy3xFfm83WzxURr2XbXkU=&emci=72c1d39f-4d40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=7470523d-5340-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, The right to vote is fundamental. It’s as simple as that. Yet states across the country are still passing restrictive, draconian voting laws. We just witnessed such an attempt when Ohio’s State House Republicans tried to eviscerate the state’s initiative process to prevent Ohioans from passing Constitutional amendments by majority rule. Thankfully, Ohio voters saw right through their anti-democratic attack and stopped the measure in its tracks. But this isn’t the first effort we’ve seen and it certainly won’t be the last. That’s why Senator Warner has co-sponsored legislation to strengthen federal voting protections and make Election Day a holiday. _****[Add your name to support his work to protect our fundamental right to vote>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68440171/423037780/-444791548?refcode=mw_em_230821_1&ms=mw_em_230821_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDcwNTIzZC01MzQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8L-Teu6Xh586OHCFG31dV0qy3xFfm83WzxURr2XbXkU=&emci=72c1d39f-4d40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=7470523d-5340-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)****_ Even just earlier this year, Virginia Senate Democrats blocked a slew of GOP proposals aimed at weakening voting rights here in the Commonwealth. They stopped GOP bills to institute mandatory voter ID, repeal the permanent absentee voter list, limit voter registration, decrease early voting, and revoke drop-off absentee voting. The very act of voting is under siege here in Virginia and in state legislatures across the country. We need to pass Mark’s _Freedom to Vote Act_ to make Election Day a holiday and enshrine in federal law our efforts to safeguard democracy from these attacks and protect Americans’ access to the ballot. _****[Sign our petition now to call on Congress to pass Senator Warner’s legislation to make sure every American can make their voice heard.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68440173/423037781/-444791548?refcode=mw_em_230821_1&ms=mw_em_230821_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDcwNTIzZC01MzQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8L-Teu6Xh586OHCFG31dV0qy3xFfm83WzxURr2XbXkU=&emci=72c1d39f-4d40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=7470523d-5340-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)****_ Thank you, Team Warner ******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68440174/423037782/-444791548?refcode=mw_em_230821_1&ms=mw_em_230821_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDcwNTIzZC01MzQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8L-Teu6Xh586OHCFG31dV0qy3xFfm83WzxURr2XbXkU=&emci=72c1d39f-4d40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=7470523d-5340-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)******

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: We owe it to our kids
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Between getting ready for school and the campaign, I’ve been thinking about this.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=91%2E1163%2EuGcV5A)
**We have a lot more mornings like this one on the horizon 👇🏿**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230821?amount=10&refcode=em20230821&refcode2=91_1163_uGcV5A&akid=91%2E1163%2EuGcV5A)
It is almost the end of August... summer is winding down and kids are getting ready to go back to school. Between community meetings and campaign events, I’ve been getting my own daughter, Lelah, prepared to head back to school.
[**(If you’re as busy as I am, and maybe don’t have time to read this whole email, I hope you’ll think about chipping in to my campaign right now!)**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230821?amount=10&refcode=em20230821&refcode2=91_1163_uGcV5A&akid=91%2E1163%2EuGcV5A)
Picking up new notebooks and putting together schedules for my own baby has got me thinking about _all_ of our kids, and what we owe them.
**We owe them better.** And creating a better, brighter future for our kids starts with making bold, progressive change **NOW**.
I’m running for Congress to push for that change; to advocate for ALL of our kids.
[**If you’re with me, will you chip in $10 to our grassroots campaign for Congress today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230821?amount=10&refcode=em20230821&refcode2=91_1163_uGcV5A&akid=91%2E1163%2EuGcV5A)
**[Donate $10 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230821?amount=10&refcode=em20230821&refcode2=91_1163_uGcV5A&akid=91%2E1163%2EuGcV5A)**
I am so humbled by the faith that this people-powered movement has placed in me. This goes beyond just one representative, and one election. This is about our future as a community, and the fight for the next generation.
**When I get to Congress I will carry all of our voices with me in those halls of power, fighting for our kids – the living, breathing embodiment of our collective future.**
Let’s do this thing, **together.** Thank you.
— Lateefah Simon
P.S. We rely 100% on grassroots contributions, including from emails like this — [**so if you can donate right now, it would be a huge help.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230821?amount=10&refcode=em20230821&refcode2=91_1163_uGcV5A&akid=91%2E1163%2EuGcV5A)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper?refcode=em20230821&t=2&refcode2=91_1163_uGcV5A&akid=91%2E1163%2EuGcV5A)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=91%2E1163%2EuGcV5A)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=91%2E1163%2EuGcV5A)

To give by check:
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)
PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS

name: Sean Feucht
subject: Stolen Guitar Update: SALVATION AND BAPTISM!!!
body:
An AMAZING end to this story!!!| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=c3b8316d823b41169d0344f89de632b7&_e=ZQ3hrbpZC0ZUW92G0Wg3s95l3e6v7Lhu5WQ6LscF4z0UHpXN5FJ6aOKBn6zKdHx2Ovy1THGRSyhwchO5JTOPR5g197qhx-HAIe1v6LBO3WEblnPyrAsMgmvprUOgXYRZI-Y1-iMhiTRxTjx2Pz5lnAnSy_dAoRuYvRw-B1_uZKG9K3PHYCWfOH94wd0mQJ31I26dqgfPW7c04awb6TaYjL7Ou0jQI2o4ReoP2XXABZ55q_73blKcBHRu3YkDPtV6ndsTbvHo4n9DrhE42D-HosVLr6lUYtMIzwvtAcwgJGOCzAh9sOGoUP0jUSjSlmTZVllqPWR7Y-19FeBKSubpZw%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
If you've been following the saga of my stolen guitar, the story just got a MAJOR update. It's a POWERFUL testimony to the faithfulness of God. I sent out updates as new developments occurred to encourage people in the movement of God in this trial, as well as to implore people to continue to pray and believe for the ULTIMATE goal— repentance and salvation! Below are some updates, as well as what I wrote at the time of each incident in the hopes that you are encouraged by how faithful our God really is.
**_FIRST_ : **A little backstory— On June 22nd, my vehicle was broken into in Spokane, Washington, and my prized guitar was stolen. Here's what I wrote about the incident at the time:__
---
_I pray that my guitar, my weapon of worship, becomes a burden that causes the thief to return, repent, and RECEIVE JESUS!! God is capable of doing this and SO MUCH MORE!! Stay tuned!!___
---
_**THEN**_ : By God's grace, my guitar was recovered from a local pawn shop. Prayer #1 was answered, but we knew God wasn't done moving. This is what I wrote after recovering my guitar:
__
---
_Well by His grace, I am OVERJOYED to report our first prayer has been answered— the guitar has been RECOVERED! An eagle-eyed Believer spotted it at a pawn shop and bought it back!! Now we wait for the second part of the story to unfold! I know God's not done working on the life of the person who stole the guitar. Stay tuned!_
__
---
**THEN** : The man who broke into my vehicle, stole, and pawned my guitar was evangelized to by a street preacher in the Spokane area. We still had faith that God was moving in his heart! Here's what I wrote:
__
---
_Dean was doing street ministry when he ran into Zach, who confessed to breaking into my car and stealing my guitar. Dean pulled out his phone and played videos of Let Us Worship revivals, and Zach repented and asked for forgiveness! How cool is that!! Now he has not yet given his life to the Lord, but this story's not over. We will be in Spokane on August 20th, and I invited Zach to our revival—this is shaping up to be one POWERFUL testimony!! _
__
---
**NOW** : Yesterday, Let Us Worship returned to Spokane, the very place this story began two months ago. We were EXPECTANT to see God move, and He did not disappoint! Zach, the man who stole my guitar, accepted our invitation to attend! And more than that, he received salvation and was baptized! Prayer #2 answered! Watch below to see the whole thing happen! I promise you'll leave encouraged!!
__
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=c3b8316d823b41169d0344f89de632b7&_e=ZQ3hrbpZC0ZUW92G0Wg3s95l3e6v7Lhu5WQ6LscF4z0UHpXN5FJ6aOKBn6zKdHx2Ovy1THGRSyhwchO5JTOPR5g197qhx-HAIe1v6LBO3WEblnPyrAsMgmvprUOgXYRZI-Y1-iMhiTRxTjx2Pz5lnAnSy_dAoRuYvRw-B1_uZKHQuIcMtkoEmvd-YbNwcGzyxYZXBh6NM3xSgqaXKrNRAXOOCzo3SDeuCrB-bu2NWupMuyPnBKL8JgpTpnB9VQWGsG-mWWhH2uAp_FCcwcj-WAhJNavgDqRtqxK9qZR1axaPjD-pynLEagg6mePL8aBgKIv5Wzr4qV3G2PFBS6cB9Q%3D%3D)
---
Thank you to all who prayed and believed with us! God really does work all things for the good of those who love Him. When obstacles arise, we MUST trust His plan— what may seem like an inconvenience may be part of His kingdom plan.
__
---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean
---
[**SUPPORT LET US WORSHIP**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=c3b8316d823b41169d0344f89de632b7&_e=ZQ3hrbpZC0ZUW92G0Wg3s95l3e6v7Lhu5WQ6LscF4z0UHpXN5FJ6aOKBn6zKdHx2Ovy1THGRSyhwchO5JTOPR5g197qhx-HAIe1v6LBO3WEblnPyrAsMgmvprUOgXYRZI-Y1-iMhiTRxTjx2Pz5lnAnSy_dAoRuYvRw-B1_uZKEQ5I0eBKOfL5zJVLzc1DDKZ01d6D0Nc3ZkH4-HepT8D_vQ-CrYSrnuH65UOZiPZHFsfXe9ZRShb8aXTm0P2qERoxFPUMCVSZRphyhX6_7kDrkNOh-el_3_kITEf8xjNe96sHwATD-5gAnZ_Dxbjyq2fQsFlx5jAqTo93CMMiIlcg%3D%3D)
---
| |
---
| | **International Donors— donate[HERE](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=c3b8316d823b41169d0344f89de632b7&_e=ZQ3hrbpZC0ZUW92G0Wg3s-qzmnBVt3gZENeo6JHWVZF47E1BpO8000ae4jty2_tvS2hFhWInuhMfJOBt89As62XmlXdpxhQtr5cHT3z72xzVpy9IqpcoISSwusheJ2qCUZvpL5xBHCMuLxCQVXuXLhK7RupbvU-1psozfpQZ_ctD2j9mWdJ3vXY1OnnrTTY0a8npfjvWGkMxqzCJCxLLNY10rKFDomCHw-G4SI64XgizEJqo2h-9p9ilIHsjoTzzquF_s0ky-761abZx9VnVFtVylnM3ACLHuqvDzOfHGpe74SedQk_o_dH4M9gKt8IR)****Donate by Check or Money Order** Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 _Contributions are tax-deductible._

name: Mississippi GOP
subject: Hold the Bidens accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Mississippi Republican Party
body:
| | | [](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=b86f0200f661417494ed906a026aa58f&_e=ySV6XdaQ7sjE_HP0UnXxRXpot4WUDlOtGku_H18ya-Ccfs53zw8LMjMy-8uHq_A2oU_yvPUJeyIYvzJkrm_fpW0O23NSAtlrn1dIaRLmqZpeR1L03tHomhnb9aIYgVp0W-1nsjA6w0mreIry89n6Fw36uCiNHE7Tp6Y6bsbnuksYFBkiN22m-3jX58ILt5m9s5A_Z5n39-d4OZXa8Lqf6YekdieSYdZhuRm66668PUy2I98TlbbhuBIJag8WDccLV0e_O_sNsHn1D_2ksnrGr7AraSL4d5z_DU3Ot-te67h_u8vue119eUp1hb_MzIpRTZlt4dn5yWEn9jhjORHr2no2kQ46gQRxcXhIK5ZdAgI%3D)
---
Fellow conservative, Hunter Biden has consistently been in the news for the past few weeks but seemingly continues to remain unscathed. Last week, the House Oversight Committee released a memorandum that detailed **$20 million in payments** that had gone to the Bidens or their business associates. **This money originated from foreign sources in Ukraine, Kazakhstan, and Russia.** **[Will this multiyear-long investigation into Hunter Biden finally result in some sort of justice?](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=b86f0200f661417494ed906a026aa58f&_e=ySV6XdaQ7sjE_HP0UnXxRXpot4WUDlOtGku_H18ya-Ccfs53zw8LMjMy-8uHq_A2oU_yvPUJeyIYvzJkrm_fpW0O23NSAtlrn1dIaRLmqZpeR1L03tHomhnb9aIYgVp0W-1nsjA6w0mreIry89n6Fw36uCiNHE7Tp6Y6bsbnuksYFBkiN22m-3jX58ILt5m9LUufVANTRvz7LikWuwX94muFjYNIVH5XbGm5sDAAkRtL6-62JX3bDGPm5lyuXk3vbaiwbe06UUYWXzDtc2_AjV9_Zx1e3hBVZrPnLhG72zxHl8IA1ciEKswcNjoEoQ_yoScgpbPYw2lPYry-OvhrxGXomfG51yJhs_opDR7zvLQ%3D)** That remains to be seen but the evidence is growing, and we are demanding answers from not only Hunter Biden but also from Joe Biden as well. The administration continues to flip-flop on whether the President knew about his son’s business affairs. Somebody is not telling the truth in all of this and we, as Americans, must hold the Bidens accountable. Please join us in doing this by accessing this secure link: **[CLICK HERE](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=b86f0200f661417494ed906a026aa58f&_e=ySV6XdaQ7sjE_HP0UnXxRXpot4WUDlOtGku_H18ya-Ccfs53zw8LMjMy-8uHq_A2oU_yvPUJeyIYvzJkrm_fpW0O23NSAtlrn1dIaRLmqZpeR1L03tHomhnb9aIYgVp0W-1nsjA6w0mreIry89n6Fw36uCiNHE7Tp6Y6bsbnuksYFBkiN22m-3jX58ILt5m9wFgqrvNt8vgXHuaDw_Y4y6nj6WRZJD0eEzevPQerIBIP9GmYjvrc5_d6GyZRJO1iNMGKdmDwMP4khifq1lF9fCvjVh8DqUe21IP3SiSfIY--RKS_1b9C7qg0eMWj3Bl2IMSVxa5EDIlF4hwxExogJV_RxJgYmBi7YERzND-g3QY%3D)**
---

subject: Gerrymandering + campaign cash = Republican inaction

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

clean_body: As you know, Team Walker was so blessed to announce last week that we EXCEEDED our fundraising goal of $500,000 for the quarter. While this is a massive win for the campaign, we can’t get too far ahead of ourselves. | | Peter, My Democratic opponent taunted a massive fundraising haul of millions so far this year. The money he raised will go directly towards smearing my name, rolling out attack ads on me, and trying to BUY this election. He may have outraised us this time, With a race as competitive as the North Carolina governor’s race, we can’t leave anything up to chance. Gratefully, Mark Walker | Meet Mark Walker Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan. In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game. Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children. | | See Mark in Action:** ---|--- | Paid For By Walker4NC

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: In the latest national polling, we've had the biggest bump. Want to stop seeing these email? | Fellow American, our message is working. Americans are HUNGRY for a purpose. That's why we've seen the largest bump this summer in polling. In fact, the latest national polling has me up SIX POINTS, and now statistically tied for second place. We're polling ahead of career politicians and the DC establishment. This is our chance, Fellow American. I'm running to revive our American national identity, but I need your help to make sure we stay on track. Washington doesn't like that we're bucking against what's expected from a candidate or a presidential campaign. I am not a career politician. I am not bought and sold by a Super PAC. I've invested my own money in this race because I believe America is on the brink and we must do something TODAY to change course. We don't have 20 years left. Some stand for incremental reform - I stand for revolution. | It's time for The Great Uprising to defeat The Great Reset. This isn't just an R vs. D question in 2023. It's a 1776 moment. Together, we'll win back the White House next November. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Laura Friedman
subject: I co-authored legislation to ensure striking writers and actors receive unemployment benefits. Add your name to support this work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68443286/423040468/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTY5NGJmYzAtNTU0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lF2XB3hRrZ3H2ln5USaIrYoHxFfUOEp3UxzddahauCI=) Friend,

Members of the Writers Guild of America and SAG-AFTRA are continuing to strike for improved pay, working conditions and protections.

It’s been a few months since the strike started and many are now beginning to feel the financial pinch, and are uncertain about when they will have a steady income again.

Members of the Writers Guild and SAG-AFTRA who live in New York and New Jersey are eligible for state unemployment insurance benefits -- even though they’re on strike. **Here in California, state laws prohibit strikers from taking unemployment insurance. That’s unacceptable and it needs to change.**

I recently co-authored legislation to allow striking workers in California to receive unemployment benefits. There's no doubt this bill will face major opposition from powerful interests, so we'll need overwhelming grassroots support to make sure it’s passed.

**[Add your name to support legislation to allow striking workers to pull from unemployment insurance.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68443288/423040470/-713673251?refcode=em-8.19.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTY5NGJmYzAtNTU0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lF2XB3hRrZ3H2ln5USaIrYoHxFfUOEp3UxzddahauCI=&emci=9d00ce17-003e-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=5694bfc0-5540-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68443290/423040472/-713673251?refcode=em-8.19.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTY5NGJmYzAtNTU0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lF2XB3hRrZ3H2ln5USaIrYoHxFfUOEp3UxzddahauCI=&emci=9d00ce17-003e-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=5694bfc0-5540-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)
Here’s my take, team:

If a workplace in our community is so unsatisfactory that workers feel compelled to go on strike, public benefits like unemployment insurance should be made available.

Employers have paid into these programs, and workers shouldn't be punished if they're forced to go on strike. Other states have laws protecting striking workers, and there's no reason we shouldn't here in California.

I stand in solidarity with the actors and writers for as long as it takes to get a fair deal. And until then, I’m doing everything I can to make sure they can stay on their feet and receive the benefits they’ve earned.

**[Sign on: allow striking workers to pull from unemployment insurance.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68443292/423040474/-713673251?refcode=em-8.19.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTY5NGJmYzAtNTU0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lF2XB3hRrZ3H2ln5USaIrYoHxFfUOEp3UxzddahauCI=&emci=9d00ce17-003e-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=5694bfc0-5540-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)**

Thanks,

Laura

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Our seniors deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
Prescription drug costs are out of control.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68445207/423042265/-1645665386?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWE5YmQzM2ItNTc0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UIJWQsatSPtNf_85-Pt1_mLSCpbh1MJYZHTrr4UAfbU=&emci=e19bd33b-5740-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ea9bd33b-5740-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)
---
Friend, Prescription drug costs are out of control. Half of Medicare enrollees earn less than $30,000 a year. Yet senior citizens are shelling out up to $5,000 co-pays to access necessary medication to treat Alzheimer's and other conditions. Who benefits from this? Pharmaceutical executives. These CEOs rake in massive profits off of folks living on fixed incomes.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68445208/423042266/-852229755?contactdata=ikFHXTR7exhorgQD8CsY0QiPC6YsCPvS7DnTka04KifsyWY6Zv6tad6aN1d5XwFT430jKLaxDW7Qk2pZ4m+zYYoBGk2Z0CP7kcBrEWbqizqKfXinzvylsRyfpQxTxZ/kK3QwHL2xWQ1iJkZrNSbQ3w==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWE5YmQzM2ItNTc0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UIJWQsatSPtNf_85-Pt1_mLSCpbh1MJYZHTrr4UAfbU=&emci=e19bd33b-5740-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ea9bd33b-5740-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)
---
**Medication doesn't work if you can't afford it.** And millions of Americans can’t afford to forgo their life-saving medication. They deserve better. That’s why we need Medicare for All. **[Sign the petition: Tell Congress to pass Medicare for All.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68445209/423042267/-852229755?contactdata=ikFHXTR7exhorgQD8CsY0QiPC6YsCPvS7DnTka04KifsyWY6Zv6tad6aN1d5XwFT430jKLaxDW7Qk2pZ4m+zYYoBGk2Z0CP7kcBrEWbqizqKfXinzvylsRyfpQxTxZ/kK3QwHL2xWQ1iJkZrNSbQ3w==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWE5YmQzM2ItNTc0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UIJWQsatSPtNf_85-Pt1_mLSCpbh1MJYZHTrr4UAfbU=&emci=e19bd33b-5740-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ea9bd33b-5740-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)** Healthcare is a human right, and it should be a given here in the US, the most prosperous nation in the world. But it isn’t. More than one-third of Americans have said they can’t afford to fill a prescription due to the cost of medication. No one should be forced to choose between their health and their financial security. Medicare for All will prioritize both health and security. It will keep prescription drug prices low and put money back into the pockets of those who need it most. **[Sign if you agree: Medicare for All will prevent Big Pharma from exploiting Americans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68445211/423042268/-852229755?contactdata=ikFHXTR7exhorgQD8CsY0QiPC6YsCPvS7DnTka04KifsyWY6Zv6tad6aN1d5XwFT430jKLaxDW7Qk2pZ4m+zYYoBGk2Z0CP7kcBrEWbqizqKfXinzvylsRyfpQxTxZ/kK3QwHL2xWQ1iJkZrNSbQ3w==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWE5YmQzM2ItNTc0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UIJWQsatSPtNf_85-Pt1_mLSCpbh1MJYZHTrr4UAfbU=&emci=e19bd33b-5740-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ea9bd33b-5740-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)** It’s well past time for Big Pharma to stop ripping off everyday Americans. Let’s pass Medicare for All and ensure that Americans are in a secure position to afford the prescriptions they need, without having to sacrifice their quality of life.
In solidarity,
Ro

clean_body: Prescription drug costs are out of control.| | | Friend, Prescription drug costs are out of control. Half of Medicare enrollees earn less than $30,000 a year. Yet senior citizens are shelling out up to $5,000 co-pays to access necessary medication to treat Alzheimer's and other conditions. Who benefits from this? Pharmaceutical executives. These CEOs rake in massive profits off of folks living on fixed incomes. Medication doesn't work if you can't afford it. And millions of Americans can’t afford to forgo their life-saving medication. They deserve better. That’s why we need Medicare for All. Healthcare is a human right, and it should be a given here in the US, the most prosperous nation in the world. But it isn’t. More than one-third of Americans have said they can’t afford to fill a prescription due to the cost of medication. No one should be forced to choose between their health and their financial security. Medicare for All will prioritize both health and security. It will keep prescription drug prices low and put money back into the pockets of those who need it most. It’s well past time for Big Pharma to stop ripping off everyday Americans. Let’s pass Medicare for All and ensure that Americans are in a secure position to afford the prescriptions they need, without having to sacrifice their quality of life. In solidarity, Ro | | = | | | | | | mailto:info@rokhanna.com ---|---|---|--- Ro for Congress P.O Box 3513 Santa Clara, CA 95051 United States Paid for by Ro for Congress | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Friend, Porcha Woodruff was 8 months pregnant and getting her daughters ready for school when police officers arrested her at her home and detained her for 11 hours, where she was traumatized, dehydrated, and in pain. This horrific story marks the third wrongful arrest in my hometown of Detroit based on facial recognition falsely identifying our residents, making them suspects in crimes they did not commit. **This technology is making us less safe, and its racist inaccuracies disproportionately harm Black and brown communities that are already at risk for over-criminalization.** [**Please sign today to support the**** _Facial Recognition and Biometric Technology Moratorium Act_****to prevent the government from using racist facial recognition technology.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QDaDEJ6Kd3DMpEWNnxP4HS4Ixw9u_bwtfzIPYKESA3HtP8rtHrHO6mlJ3rc2fiHTOp_x9hQ4OTS3eV_jU9o2NTemrocrePEOAhVzAUGdRD0pW2H3WMD6p2WB1FeFbijZD08WbGhOZboFbxDGEPhWJT77lzg9BJayAzxvxRnc6K2Oor34LLMvXxN6IvGnrMvsPQMTINLAPKGfQE1FhAcHmeKppnb-j0l8wJupVKgkabxPvi0GV2h-Bh0SOc22qViQefrOmWcSbGOYCANXtiAhlm-QA35MTdnw8q3XAUbtIGX2f7NaeVDrCZJ-FJtzBN3t_Gr1At23vlm_qAftSbF114MRswbjv--copxC_LNSpRP0v2vqAj2K0dl3RelNpzwjQd0c2BKPPY2-BeoXlAqazMQ/3yx/jjAku37IRIaaC-IWlSe_gw/h1/4u9I_PxcxfR3jJuRtkIg7jz9H-DjcMu3WXvBOgqLBWk) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QDaDEJ6Kd3DMpEWNnxP4HS4Ixw9u_bwtfzIPYKESA3HtP8rtHrHO6mlJ3rc2fiHTOp_x9hQ4OTS3eV_jU9o2NTV1MeS4GY9ibrYl010n9fWl8gv8SxBSlIDXogyh0iQnVHXA6txCD-QI_2IzAmQ0pM78j9iqc7BGBLBX-moUfHtd13deipaf2CttePcG7Cv-f23fomZv-VumoYdPCos3pmkZ4K0DRXd5NFmHhy9xMUX5jeNW43szY74HN8EIo6aGMV-yJ17Az319Z8gBBpLdEYCngniyNz5oN4B9c9PiO7_lm1i7Vay91rMP9lIFwA1oXqr2_aQ9x01VWCEm-TswfGzIma6WazqPMBqPOD1-Jjce0XoUpf_EPXQcGd_k_Qqp5RU7X57ApXyN5rW8zqnilCQ/3yx/jjAku37IRIaaC-IWlSe_gw/h2/Fvy_eLew6o5fzWqcE6yUvnSAkG2_aa-Z4JVX3a7BpXc)
---
I’m co-leading the _Facial Recognition and Biometric Technology Moratorium Act_ that would:

* Place a prohibition on the use of facial recognition technology by federal entities;
* Place a prohibition on the use of other biometric technologies such as voice recognition by federal entities;
* Condition federal grant funding to state and local entities, including law enforcement, on those entities enacting their own moratoria on the use of facial recognition and biometric technology;
* Prohibit the use of federal dollars for biometric surveillance systems;
* Prohibit the use of information collected via biometric technology in violation of the Act in any judicial proceedings, and more.

Research shows that nearly half of U.S. adults’ faces exist in facial recognition databases, and the faces of Black, brown, and Asian people are up to 100 times more likely to be misidentified than white male faces.
**For years I’ve called for a ban on this racist technology, which is being used in neighborhoods across the country to invade privacy, surveil, and criminalize. It’s a flawed and unconstitutional system that endangers our lives and our freedoms.**
I’ve met with local community advocates and lifted up their demands to end the Detroit Police Department’s use of the dangerous technology. Inspired by tenants’ rights activists, I also co-introduced a bill to prohibit the technology’s use in public housing that gets HUD funding.
This year, my colleagues and I re-introduced the _Facial Recognition and Biometric Technology Moratorium Act_. With more false arrests occurring around the country, we must urgently pass this bill and protect our communities.

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Rapid Response Needed
body:
| | | My friend, I’ve fought America’s enemies on battlefields across the globe as a combat-decorated Special Forces Green Beret.

The bracelet I wear on my arm is for one of my teammates who paid the ultimate price to defend the United States from our enemies. It reminds me every day of the true cost of freedom.

So, I’m sure you can understand my outrage at the recent revelations by federal government whistleblower Gary Shapley.

A WhatsApp message Shapely unearthed revealed that Joe Biden’s wastrel son, Hunter, leveraged his father’s name and clout to secure a FIVE MILLION DOLLAR wire from a Chinese Communist Party (CCP) official!

Make no mistake, the CCP is America’s #1 global adversary.

In fact, Communist China’s dictator Xi Jinping has made no secret of his determination to supplant the U.S. as the world’s dominant superpower.

Yet, Hunter Biden saw no issue with getting rich off CCP cash.

It makes my blood boil.

That’s my perspective. Now, I’d like to hear yours.

Please, take a few minutes to complete the _Communist China Threat Assessment Survey_ I’ve enclosed for you and let me know your opinion. I eagerly await your response.[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=5bc040e340cf417a8f352d9827ca3f3e&_e=R6VWkJ2MTXSikPpAvfi7libhxB4adKgcJACe5jbyFRZulQzPeUdFLaTf6iaAZwLAs0yi0b1XYXTFcZZSwgyuuyi941bs3kKIgC5ebKszxlO2J6WHwYiQtLeIwX2UzW-a0CHd3CKZWgZJnRcF2w1Cqh_a3RXEoBhuwiAswZg-jf3yCgJzlthFIbTOBmN2SC7PYH9Oe8od1Ilnq_R4k-uqbSlqpKgJCRg0noKI9V51SklNutS42a2pSIKlVo_g0b08zq2A8mpPzLSO6SDUtxL-b0lnAVSif2Mwe3a7rUmPkXiTOUpK6Y5-8av7T8ZJpj8qOvrVvgZpM67Nu1O-mxlr_OS9RIl72yCMwY3DvEVsWCDEn5IuykZPqMogDtJBqTdq)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: We don’t have to live this way
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Every day, we are left wondering when and where the next tragedy will unfold.
Gun violence is so pervasive in our country, nearly every month we recount the anniversary of a mass shooting—reliving the anguish, anger, and trauma seared into our collective memory.

There is scarcely a day that goes by when we are not left wondering when or where the next tragedy will unfold. And every day the families of victims of mass shootings wonder who their loved ones would be if they hadn’t been taken too soon.

We don’t have to live this way. The vast majority of Americans want sensible gun legislation, but the NRA and the rest of the gun lobby spend a fortune lobbying elected officials, drafting legislation, and using coercive tactics to undermine the will of the people and block progress.

Sadly, Congressman Mike Lawler is in the pocket of the NRA. He opposes a ban on assault weapons and empowers Speaker Kevin McCarthy, who refuses to bring a universal background checks bill to the House floor for a vote.

[**The status quo is shameful. There is so much more Congress can do to get weapons of war off our streets and keep our communities safe. Add your name to my petition to hold the gun lobby accountable and demand action so we don’t have to relive one more devastating tragedy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68447201/423043426/-662238531?ms=em23_230821_gunref_adv_gq_act___Mj_ettx&refcode=em23_230821_gunref_adv_gq_act___Mj_ettx&source=em23_230821_gunref_adv_gq_act___Mj_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230821_gunref_adv_gq_act___Mj_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dc-vote&contactdata=hcvrLQH75UaxIYXtS9mx7EXdEtoS0XnuKbfQQ0rsqZmTZVtIBXXfsWksGEpEuzZz4LmZnc4GO0Zs/Rk7paQS19XzEo7Ux5PPVuS8ql2w+Nw=&refcode2=a475a01e-5940-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDc1YTAxZS01OTQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNQk7DecPlexsDDO5ABBI69cKJzfRJDutgd8T0SepYo=&emci=9018b6c4-4040-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=a475a01e-5940-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24719896)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68447202/423043427/-1217725831?refcode=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDc1YTAxZS01OTQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNQk7DecPlexsDDO5ABBI69cKJzfRJDutgd8T0SepYo=)[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68447206/423043429/-662238531?ms=em23_230821_gunref_adv_gq_act___Mj_ettx&refcode=em23_230821_gunref_adv_gq_act___Mj_ettx&source=em23_230821_gunref_adv_gq_act___Mj_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230821_gunref_adv_gq_act___Mj_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dc-vote&contactdata=hcvrLQH75UaxIYXtS9mx7EXdEtoS0XnuKbfQQ0rsqZmTZVtIBXXfsWksGEpEuzZz4LmZnc4GO0Zs/Rk7paQS19XzEo7Ux5PPVuS8ql2w+Nw=&refcode2=a475a01e-5940-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDc1YTAxZS01OTQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNQk7DecPlexsDDO5ABBI69cKJzfRJDutgd8T0SepYo=&emci=9018b6c4-4040-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=a475a01e-5940-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24719896)
Our schools, grocery stores, places of worship, movie theaters, and concert venues are not safe. And it’s long past time to act and make them safe once again.

Following the horrific tragedy in Uvalde, Texas last year, I helped pass the first major gun legislation in over 30 years—hallmark legislation that President Biden signed into law.

But the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act was the bare minimum; we cannot call it good enough. We must pass universal background checks, ban assault weapons, and enact basic safety regulations that most Americans want.

[**Add your name to the petition to call on Congress to do more to keep our schools, grocery stores, churches, mosques, and communities free from gun violence now. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68447208/423043433/-662238531?ms=em23_230821_gunref_adv_gq_act___Mj_ettx&refcode=em23_230821_gunref_adv_gq_act___Mj_ettx&source=em23_230821_gunref_adv_gq_act___Mj_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230821_gunref_adv_gq_act___Mj_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dc-vote&contactdata=hcvrLQH75UaxIYXtS9mx7EXdEtoS0XnuKbfQQ0rsqZmTZVtIBXXfsWksGEpEuzZz4LmZnc4GO0Zs/Rk7paQS19XzEo7Ux5PPVuS8ql2w+Nw=&refcode2=a475a01e-5940-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDc1YTAxZS01OTQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNQk7DecPlexsDDO5ABBI69cKJzfRJDutgd8T0SepYo=&emci=9018b6c4-4040-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=a475a01e-5940-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24719896)

I will not rest until we get this done.

Thank you,

Mondaire

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Here’s a look at our race by the numbers:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
And why your $10 donation today could make such a big impact.
#
Peter,
Before we ask you to **[make a donation of $10 toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce and replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35731?refcode=em20230821-3603&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3603%2E614464%2Ej_31jX) here’s a quick overview of our race by the numbers:**
Josh Hawley has the lowest approval rating of any GOP U.S. Senator running in 2024. A new _Morning Consult_ poll reported Hawley’s most recent approval at just **44% — even lower than Republicans like Ted Cruz in Texas (48%) and Rick Scott in Florida (47%).**
National GOP insiders are growing worried about Hawley’s serious vulnerability. That’s why a handful of corporate mega-donors and elites launched a brand new Super PAC with **more than $1 MILLION** to prop up Hawley and fund attacks against Lucas.
With your help, we’re building a record-breaking grassroots movement to fight back and flip this Senate seat — raising more than **$2.3 million** in the first six months of our campaign, the most ever raised by a Missouri challenger this far into a U.S. Senate race.
**Every $1 here in Missouri goes nearly 5 times as far as in states like Texas and Florida.** Our state’s smaller media markets mean we’ll be able to get Lucas’ message in front of voters early and often — and that we’ll be able to get a field program up and running, with organizers on the ground and contacting voters, earlier than ever before.
In Missouri’s last U.S. Senate race during a presidential election, there were about **230,000 split-ticket voters who supported a Democrat for Senate.** And with **441 days until Election Day,** we still have time to reach them with Lucas’ unifying vision for working people here in Missouri.
That’s why your **$10** donation today could make such a big impact.
But since **less than 1%** of folks reading this email will actually make a donation to our campaign, we’re counting on YOUR help, Peter.
**[Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford today so we can stay prepared and continue strengthening our grassroots movement? Lucas doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors, so we’re relying on real people like you to fuel this campaign forward every step of the way.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35731?refcode=em20230821-3603&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3603%2E614464%2Ej_31jX)**

Bill and House Democrats won’t let them

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68447394/423043890/-197340401?refocde=wrapper_hdr&ms=230821_tp_ss&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQ5Yzk0ZjQtNTk0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dqk9wpC7Wcp2cxTXVc0WC2KSohKFFS1V1fykQWA9lkY=)

Friend, Last month, President Biden announced his pick to lead the Social Security Administration: former Governor of Maryland Martin O’Malley. Bill and House Democrats praised the nomination, because we know we’ve got a leader who will protect this critical program from GOP attacks. Years of neglect and outright sabotage by Donald Trump’s appointees at SSA have badly weakened Social Security. Republicans in Congress continue to mark Social Security for destruction, but Bill and House Democrats continue to work vigorously to keep America’s crown jewel program alive for the next century. **But we can’t just protect Social Security, we need to expand it too.** That’s why Bill and many of his Democratic colleagues have signed-on to the _**Social Security 2100 Act**_ , which will:
* Improve the annual Cost-of-Living Adjustment (COLA) to reflect seniors’ true costs
* Repeal the Windfall Elimination Provision (WEP) and Government Pension Offset (GPO) that currently penalize many public servants
* Provide the Social Security Administration with resources to improve customer service

[**But to be able to position ourselves to deliver these results, we must reject the GOP next fall, friend. They’ve made it clear they will stop at nothing to enact their radical, unpopular far-right agenda, so we can’t let them. body:
One year later, the Inflation Reduction Act is still changing our nation for the better. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68447614/423044632/163070490?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjE2ZTg1OC01YjQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lxHgW1xw8RyP2mAe1LwBDK2RA2YuS9KDy9SQNYiXfdA=)
Friend, **Inheriting a pandemic-stricken economy is _no_ president’s dream.** But while his opponents were rooting for failure, President Joe Biden and our Democratic leadership in Congress saw an opportunity not just to course correct, but to _fundamentally change the trajectory of our nation._ **Enter the Inflation Reduction Act: the most significant piece of climate legislation in our nation’s history.** Not only has the Inflation Reduction Act lowered living and health care costs for working families — it’s created jobs for _tens of thousands_ of Americans, all while ending our power sector’s reliance on carbon. | [CONTINUE DEMOCRATIC PROGRESS IN '24 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68447615/423044633/-1218854374?refcode=E3787-20230821-IRAAnniversary-SB-Anniversary&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjE2ZTg1OC01YjQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lxHgW1xw8RyP2mAe1LwBDK2RA2YuS9KDy9SQNYiXfdA=)

At a time when our nation needed focused and aggressive leadership to relieve the burden of a declining economy, **President Biden put pen to paper — and Democrats wasted no time passing this bill in both chambers of Congress.**
Folks, we know that this defining piece of legislation will only continue elevating our nation if we have the numbers to expand on things like job creation and carbon emissions reduction. **And Republicans have proven that _even_ when they have the power to deliver for working families, they’ll just use it to bail out their big-wig corporate buddies.**
