name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues CIA for Records about Its Role in Intel Letter Attacking Hunter Laptop Story Just Before Election
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the CIA for all communications of the spy agency’s Prepublication Classification Review Board (PCRB) regarding an October 19, 2020, email request to review and “clear” a letter signed by 51 former intelligence community officials characterizing the Hunter Biden laptop story as having “all the earmarks of a Russian disinformation campaign”.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Aug 21, 2023
---|---|---

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the CIA for all communications of the spy agency’s Prepublication Classification Review Board (PCRB) regarding an October 19, 2020, email request to review and “clear” a letter signed by 51 former intelligence community officials characterizing the Hunter Biden laptop story as having “all the earmarks of a Russian disinformation campaign”. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Aug 21, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the CIA for all communications of the spy agency’s Prepublication Classification Review Board (PCRB) regarding an October 19, 2020, email request to review and “clear” a letter signed by 51 former intelligence community officials characterizing the Hunter Biden laptop story as having “all the earmarks of a Russian disinformation campaign”. ---|--- | | | | | Keeping with her history of poor ethical and moral fitness, a veteran congresswoman who has publicly encouraged violence against presidential cabinet members and among police protestors is proudly commemorating the 50th anniversary of Hip Hop and rap, music famous for glamorizing violence, misogyny, drugs and lawlessness. Celebrating the milestone, California Democrat Maxine Waters claims that Hip Hop is an international culture-shaping force with a growing role in politics. “When I was elected to Congress in 1991, many politicians, including Black politicians, were either distancing themselves from Hip Hop artists altogether or trying to censor rap music,” the lawmaker says in the tribute statement issued this month. ---|--- | | | | | But appointing U.S. Attorney Weiss as special counsel, a man who tried to unethically slide Hunter’s corrupt plea deal past a federal judge, is a sick joke. In fact, Mr. Weiss should be under investigation for his dishonest statements to Congress and his compromised, sweetheart plea deal for Hunter Biden. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) for records of the Archives’ role in President Trump’s White House records controversy; whether it offered Trump a secure storage location other than the National Archives; and if the Archives consulted with the Office of the Director of National Intelligence regarding the classification or declassification procedures of any of the alleged classified documents found at Trump’s Florida residence ---|--- | | | American Family News AFN talked with Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch, a public interest group that investigates and prosecutes government corruption. Fitton says the prosecutors’ objective is quite clear. “The goal is to interfere with the election, as the Biden regime is seeking to put him on trial literally as the primary season begins,” he offers. The Daily Signal Recourse to Garland’s appointment of Weiss as special counsel will have to be political, said Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch, a government watchdog group. “Congress should and can demand a more independent special counsel,” Fitton told The Daily Signal. “Weiss should be a subject of a special counsel investigation. There is a string of evidence of corruption, obstruction of justice, and fraud on the courts by the Justice Department regarding the Hunter Biden probe.” Washington Times Tom Fitton, president of the conservative watchdog group Judicial Watch, was called to testify before the grand jury that indicted Mr. Trump over his post-election actions. Mr. Fitton, who consulted with Mr. Trump following the election, said he testified to the grand jury about his concerns in 2020 when it was reported that a group of top government officials, including Democrat John Podesta, participated in a project called the Transition Integrity Project. The participants played out 2020 election scenarios that would keep Mr. Trump out of office. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

Republicans know that defeating me is their best chance at holding onto their House majority, and they’re willing to pull out all the stops to do it.

| This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. This is huge news, team.
The Cook Political Report – one of the most respected names in politics – has __upgraded__ our chances of defeating Lauren Boebert.
**Our race against Lauren Boebert has officially moved from “Lean Republican” to true “Toss-Up!”**
[**If you’re all-in to help me send Lauren Boebert packing in 2024, then please, chip in $5 or more to my campaign right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68448510/423048310/1610638071?refcode=em20230821pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=ca7436da-5e40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTc0MzZkYS01ZTQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SiKMcRvIgG3YwpABuQrWGxJWBWb2FrEP4Z8fkd1HJQ8=)
Here’s what Dave Wasserman of the Cook Political Report had to say about why our chances of winning have increased:
> _Not only has Boebert avoided taking any steps to moderate her image since coming within 546 votes of losing to former Aspen Councilman Adam Frisch in 2022, Frisch outraised her by a massive $2.6 million to $810,000 in the second quarter thanks to an avalanche of small-dollar donations. Frisch ended June with $2.4 million on hand to Boebert's $1.4 million, and Frisch can leverage that to bash Boebert for leading the hard-right charge to block the defense reauthorization bill over wedge social issue concerns.
>
> A lopsided cash picture won't guarantee a Frisch win, though. Both parties agree this rematch will be decided by the roughly 80,000 voters who didn't show up in 2022 but will in 2024, who skew independent. Those non-voting independents may be more open to Donald Trump than those who showed up in the midterms. More crucially, Frisch won't get a free pass from national GOP groups this time: the NRCC and CLF are likely to invest heavily..._
He’s right. This is going to be a tough race. I’m running in a district that leans Republican by 8 or 9 percentage points.
But last year, we came just 546 votes shy of defeating Lauren Boebert. It was the closest race in the entire country, and the latest poll shows another tie: 45% to 45%.
A huge part of why we lost in 2022 was just that we got out-spent by millions and millions of dollars – and Boebert’s allies are preparing to spend _even more_ this time to tell ridiculous lies about me on every television across the district.
I’ve already clocked over 30,000 miles in my red pickup truck, meeting with thousands of voters across the district. **But if we’re going to counter the Super PAC lies and win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so I have nowhere else to turn. Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert and finally stop the angertainment circus in Washington?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68448511/423048311/1610638071?refcode=em20230821pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=ca7436da-5e40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTc0MzZkYS01ZTQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SiKMcRvIgG3YwpABuQrWGxJWBWb2FrEP4Z8fkd1HJQ8=)

clean_body: This is huge news This is huge news, team. The Cook Political Report – one of the most respected names in politics – has upgraded our chances of defeating Lauren Boebert. Our race against Lauren Boebert has officially moved from “Lean Republican” to true “Toss-Up!” = Here’s what Dave Wasserman of the Cook Political Report had to say about why our chances of winning have increased: Not only has Boebert avoided taking any steps to moderate her image since coming within 546 votes of losing to former Aspen Councilman Adam Frisch in 2022, Frisch outraised her by a massive $2.6 million to $810,000 in the second quarter thanks to an avalanche of small-dollar donations. Frisch ended June with $2.4 million on hand to Boebert's $1.4 million, and Frisch can leverage that to bash Boebert for leading the hard-right charge to block the defense reauthorization bill over wedge social issue concerns. A lopsided cash picture won't guarantee a Frisch win, though. Both parties agree this rematch will be decided by the roughly 80,000 voters who didn't show up in 2022 but will in 2024, who skew independent. Those non-voting independents may be more open to Donald Trump than those who showed up in the midterms. More crucially, Frisch won't get a free pass from national GOP groups this time: the NRCC and CLF are likely to invest heavily... He’s right. This is going to be a tough race. I’m running in a district that leans Republican by 8 or 9 percentage points. But last year, we came just 546 votes shy of defeating Lauren Boebert. It was the closest race in the entire country, and the latest poll shows another tie: 45% to 45%. A huge part of why we lost in 2022 was just that we got out-spent by millions and millions of dollars – and Boebert’s allies are preparing to spend even more this time to tell ridiculous lies about me on every television across the district. I’ve already clocked over 30,000 miles in my red pickup truck, meeting with thousands of voters across the district. But if we’re going to counter the Super PAC lies and win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Your support is what has gotten us this far. We cannot let up now. Thank you so much for everything. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

So my expert advice to grassroots Democrats like you is this: **If you want to make the biggest impact on defending our Senate majority, you must prioritize supporting Sen. Jacky Rosen for reelection in Nevada.**

Don't believe me? Maybe you'll believe _TIME_ – which has reported that **"Nevada could deliver the Senate, and maybe even the White House, to Republicans in 2024."**

| | Friend,

---
George Soros publicly admitted that his dream scenario is a long and drawn-out Republican primary that allows Crooked Joe to sneak into the final months of the 2024 election unscathed.

---
We simply cannot play into Soros’ hands.

---
Which is why I've been saying all along that we MUST wrap up the primary as quickly as humanly possible so that we can focus 100% of our energy on the one and only __REAL__ mission:

---
**Firing Crooked Joe and MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

---
__Every day this primary carries on is another day Biden’s campaign is given life support._
_
---
But Soros isn’t the only special interest seeking to sow division...

---
**_Shadowy RINO megadonors who’ve hatched a $370 MILLION plot to stop us and install their own puppet candidate as the nominee ultimately have the same exact goal as Soros._**

---
You see, these special interest “Republicans” hate our movement so much that they’d rather see four more years of Crooked Joe than for me to return to the White House – **_even if it meant condemning our country to the Left’s tyranny._**

---
And it truly is _**OUR**_ movement that they despise, Friend. They don’t just hold contempt for me... they look down on _**YOU**_ too.

---
**In fact, the special-interest controlled candidate, who has even DEFENDED the Left’s sham indictments of yours truly, just called our supporters “listless vessels.”**

---
And if this is what he’s saying in public, you can only imagine what he thinks behind closed doors.

---
_But while these cowards continue to_ _**_HELP_**_ _Soros, I’ll continue working tirelessly to lock up the nomination and WRAP UP this primary ASAP so that all our energy is focused solely on CRUSHING Crooked Joe._

---

You see, these special interest “Republicans” hate our movement so much that they’d rather see four more years of Crooked Joe than for me to return to the White House – even if it meant condemning our country to the Left’s tyranny. In fact, the special-interest controlled candidate, who has even DEFENDED the Left’s sham indictments of yours truly, just called our supporters “listless vessels.” And if this is what he’s saying in public, you can only imagine what he thinks behind closed doors. But while these cowards continue to HELP Soros, I’ll continue working tirelessly to lock up the nomination and WRAP UP this primary ASAP so that all our energy is focused solely on CRUSHING Crooked Joe. | | Thank you, Donald J. body:
This is good news for us, Peter |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68448759/423049139/-1667455293?sourceid=1051755&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODBlYjFhZi01ZjQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_XJ2Ilb5c8gOpMO1DTlVEGfHo9K0nt6FYJoAZRZcyho=&emci=ed5eaba8-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=280eb1af-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

We've said it before, and we'll say it again and again: We have so much faith in our mission, and in our candidates, because **when choice is on the ballot, choice wins.**

Earlier this month, **Ohio** voters overwhelmingly rejected an anti-choice anti-democracy ballot initiative. This victory mirrored last year's in **Kansas** , when an anti-choice ballot initiative lost by 18 points.

It likely goes without saying: Ohio and Kansas are not blue states. Donald Trump won in both places — twice. But voters across the political spectrum care about abortion rights. **[In order to flip the House, hold the Senate, and protect abortion rights at a local level, we need our candidates to ride this pro-choice wave. Donate now to help support their campaigns.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68448766/423049146/-1667455293?sourceid=1051755&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODBlYjFhZi01ZjQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_XJ2Ilb5c8gOpMO1DTlVEGfHo9K0nt6FYJoAZRZcyho=&emci=ed5eaba8-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=280eb1af-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

Now, other states are looking at these big wins in Ohio and Kansas and thinking, _hey, we should do that too!_

**Arizona** Democrats are working on a pro-choice ballot measure for 2024, and **Illinois** could do the same. And, with a big election right around the corner, **Virginia** Democrats have decided to emphasize the importance of supporting abortion rights. After all, this year's state legislative elections in Virginia _will likely_ decide whether abortion remains legal there, and voters should know what's at stake.

Every EMILYs List supporter should feel especially hopeful about these developments, because when we double down on abortion rights, we bring more pro-choice voters to the polls — and those voters help our women win. ****Let's give Democratic pro-choice women the resources they need to take full advantage of this political climate. Chip in today:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-Women-This-August](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68448767/423049147/-1667455293?sourceid=1051755&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODBlYjFhZi01ZjQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_XJ2Ilb5c8gOpMO1DTlVEGfHo9K0nt6FYJoAZRZcyho=&emci=ed5eaba8-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=280eb1af-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

clean_body: This is good news for us, Peter | | | Peter, We've said it before, and we'll say it again and again: We have so much faith in our mission, and in our candidates, because when choice is on the ballot, choice wins. Earlier this month, Ohio voters overwhelmingly rejected an anti-choice anti-democracy ballot initiative. This victory mirrored last year's in Kansas , when an anti-choice ballot initiative lost by 18 points. It likely goes without saying: Ohio and Kansas are not blue states. Donald Trump won in both places — twice. But voters across the political spectrum care about abortion rights. Now, other states are looking at these big wins in Ohio and Kansas and thinking, hey, we should do that too! Arizona Democrats are working on a pro-choice ballot measure for 2024, and Illinois could do the same. And, with a big election right around the corner, Virginia Democrats have decided to emphasize the importance of supporting abortion rights. After all, this year's state legislative elections in Virginia will likely decide whether abortion remains legal there, and voters should know what's at stake. Every EMILYs List supporter should feel especially hopeful about these developments, because when we double down on abortion rights, we bring more pro-choice voters to the polls — and those voters help our women win. **Let's give Democratic pro-choice women the resources they need to take full advantage of this political climate. Chip in today: Thank you, Rebeca Puentes (she/her/hers) Senior Director, Communications Research, EMILYs List ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Team Cori
subject: RE: We are living in a climate emergency:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori Bush has led efforts in Congress to call on President Biden to declare a climate emergency. | |
---
Peter, The climate crisis is here and it’s killing people: Wildfires are still raging in Maui, with 1,000 people still missing and over 100 people dead. California is dealing with flooding from the first tropical storm to hit the state in decades. And July was the hottest month ever recorded. We need bold action and we need it now. Rep. Cori Bush has led efforts in Congress to call on President Biden to live up to his campaign promises to prevent the worst impacts of the climate crisis. **President Biden has authority under existing law to immediately stop fossil fuel expansion and declare a climate emergency to speed up a just transition to renewable energy.** But his administration continues to approve new fossil fuel infrastructure, pipelines, and leases -- even violating Native sovereignty in the process. He needs to hear from more of us. clean_body: Help us meet our August goal! | | | | Peter, can you believe the summer is already about to come to an end? It's been quite a rush for all of us on Team Peterson. From launching Lynn's candidacy to hitting the trail and making important connections with communities in OR-05 to shaping early policy conversation when it comes to infrastructure, jobs, and our fundamental freedoms – we've hardly had a moment to take stock of how far we've already come in this campaign! But we're going to need the resources to keep this up as summer turns to fall and the pace of the political cycle quickens. = = Every early dollar raised makes a big difference. Far-right Republican groups have already started pouring money into OR-05. If we meet our goal, we'll have the resources we need to push the extremists back and expand Lynn's outreach. This is a team effort, Peter, and we can't do it without you! = More updates soon, Team Peterson | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress |

name: Colin Allred
subject: I'm sweating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
I'm sweating, friend.
And it's not just because of the Texas heat. It's because August has been really slow for fundraising.
I know, we just reported our record-breaking fundraising numbers and everyone from CNN to FiveThirtyEight says we can win this race.
But our incredible start to this race makes me one of the Republican's top targets in 2024.
Friend, we can't afford to fall short on this (or any) fundraising goal if we're going to power this campaign to victory and bring real change to Texas. So please, split a donation of $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Serve America to help me defeat Ted Cruz. → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Unlike Cruz, I'm not counting on wealthy donors to buy this seat for me because I believe our leaders should be accountable to the people they serve, not special interests.
And listen, Texas is huge – it takes over 11 hours to drive from the Panhandle to the southernmost point.
That means we need way more volunteers, pamphlets, folks knocking doors, and yard signs to win in Texas than it does in other states. And that adds up fast.
So I'm counting on folks like you to step up with $5, $10, or whatever you can spare, to power our massive grassroots campaign and help create the change we know Texans want and need.
Right now, I'm counting on you to help me raise $50,000 by midnight to get back on track. So please, will you split a donation between my campaign and Serve America and help me fire Ted Cruz? → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you so much – and in all seriousness, I hope you are keeping cool amid record-breaking temperatures this summer!
Colin Allred

Representing Maine’s second district in Congress, I know what it takes to win in rural communities. That’s why I’m proud to be one of the new co-chairs of the Blue Dogs. I’ve felt compelled by the Blue Dogs in Congress because we take a different approach to politics. We know if Democrats aren’t playing strong with the right message in rural communities, a much darker version of politics can prevail. **We have a lot of work to do to gain the high ground in this conversation, and we have to win all current Blue Dogs seats plus 5 more to take back the Speaker’s gavel.** [**So, can I count on you to rush in a donation to help us win these competitive seats and defeat the extremists in Washington D.C.? ---|---
Ask anyone who knows me and they will tell you that I’d much rather be spending time with my 2 year old daughter or getting a new tattoo than playing the political games that suck up the oxygen in D.C. Long before representing Maine in Congress, I was just a normal guy who joined the Marines to serve my country after the September 11 attacks.
But I do this work because I believe it’s important to have real, normal leaders in Washington D.C. Blue Dogs protect America. We're fighting for rural broadband, healthcare, and lower costs. And we own fiscal responsibility: If there’s a good policy, we should pay for it, but the wealthy need to pay their fair share.
**Look, we all know that politics is high-stakes. This is about winners and losers - and Blue Dogs know how to win in the toughest districts in the country. But we need your help to win all of our seats and continue growing our coalition.**
**[So, can you please donate as much as you can to support the Blue Dogs today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68449192/423050881/-36227436?&refcode=E3782-20230817-JaredGolden-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2MTg2ZDI5LTYzNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hvg45PENo1kyL8K3jLVyxytnxIMH7opOTbO9WfoUbTM=)**
With your help, we can look towards the future and protect our democracy.
\- Jared Golden
Co-Chair of Blue Dogs PAC
* * *
Blue Dogs are normal people in Congress who want to get sh*t done. We believe in freedom and we’re fighting to protect yours. We’re pro-America, pro-democracy, and working to pass fiscally responsible policies that benefit everyday, hard-working Americans. [**We need your help to defeat the extemists in D.C. But I do this work because I believe it’s important to have real, normal leaders in Washington D.C. Blue Dogs protect America. We're fighting for rural broadband, healthcare, and lower costs. And we own fiscal responsibility: If there’s a good policy, we should pay for it, but the wealthy need to pay their fair share. Look, we all know that politics is high-stakes. This is about winners and losers - and Blue Dogs know how to win in the toughest districts in the country. But we need your help to win all of our seats and continue growing our coalition. = With your help, we can look towards the future and protect our democracy. \- Jared Golden Co-Chair of Blue Dogs PAC Blue Dogs are normal people in Congress who want to get sht done. We believe in freedom and we’re fighting to protect yours. We’re pro-America, pro-democracy, and working to pass fiscally responsible policies that benefit everyday, hard-working Americans. = = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. to sign up for only the most important updates, or you can . BLUE DOG POLITICAL ACTION COMMITTEE PO BOX 83142 GAITHERSBURG, MD 20883 United States

clean_body: | | Hey Peter, it’s Becca! = but first, let me tell you why I need your support: 1️⃣ As a mom, teacher, member of the Budget and Judiciary committees, and one of only 12 openly LGBTQ+ members of the House, I’m able to provide a unique perspective and use my voice to fight for you in Congress. 2️⃣ I’m not afraid to call out MAGA Republicans and their dangerous agenda – including introducing a resolution earlier this summer to censure Marjorie Taylor Greene. But holding MAGA Republicans accountable comes at a price, and I’m now the target of right-wing online attacks. 3️⃣ My team and I are getting ready for the election year, and we need the resources to build critical parts of our campaign: extending the Balint Organizing Corps, opening field offices, and hiring additional staff. With so much at stake, I need all hands on deck — and like we always say on Team Becca, running a grassroots campaign truly takes a village! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for being a part of this — I truly couldn’t do it without you! – Becca B. = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . _"A sad day in American constitutional law and in the lives of LGBTQ+ people.”_

Peter, that's what Justice Sotomayor said in response to the latest Supreme Court decision to further strip away the rights and protections of the LGBTQ+ community – and today, I echo that sentiment.
But more than that – this was not just a sad day, but an _infuriating_ one.
Because, for decades now, we have fought for the LGBTQ+ community to receive the protections they deserve. From the right to marry, to the right to adopt children, to simply the right to exist in their own skin, we have spent decades fighting for these protections bit by bit.
Peter, this case, which rested entirely on a hypothetical situation and not a real one, should've never even made it in front of the nation's highest court – and the fact that it did sends alarm bells. It implies that the conservative Supreme Court is looking beyond legal reason and instead looking for ways to intentionally harm the LGBTQ+ community. And if that's the case, we need to be prepared to fight back.
**That's why I put together this flash poll so I can gauge where public support falls on this issue. **
**Peter, I will _never_ relent in my fight for the LGBTQ+ community in New York and beyond, but I need to know if you're in this fight with me. Before midnight tonight, will you take this quick survey to tell me where you stand?**
| | **Do you think LGBTQ+ rights should be protected?**

**ICYMI: Another Poll Confirms Chris Christie’s Momentum In NH
** _Second Poll In Two Weeks With Christie In Second, Ahead Of DeSanti_ s
For the [second time](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=11a12734a6&e=d0a9afa930) in two weeks, a new poll shows that Governor Chris Christie is now firmly in second place in New Hampshire.
In the [poll](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=30db5dfa1c&e=d0a9afa930) released by Echelon Insights, _**Governor Christie is in sole possession of second place in New Hampshire**_ with 14% of the vote, ahead of Vivek Ramaswamy (11%), and Ron DeSantis (9%).
Additionally, a new [national poll](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=7e6840ef42&e=d0a9afa930) has Governor Christie in third place.
These polls are further evidence that Governor Christie’s message is resonating.

subject: John Duarte Endorsement Press Release
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Duarte For Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/867193011468/john-duarte-launches-campaign-for-13th-congressional-district-9573257?e=76a47b375f)
---
| |
---
| **Ceres Mayor Javier Lopez Endorses
John Duarte for Congress **
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
August 21, 2023
---
CONTACT: [Duane Dichiara](mailto:ddichiara@axiomstrategies.com?subject=%5BDuarte%5D)
(916) 997-4784
---
| | **(Modesto, CA)** — Today, Ceres Mayor Javier Lopez endorses John Duarte for his 2024 re-election campaign to California's 13th Congressional District. Mayor Lopez joins a growing list of elected officials, business owners, and community leaders who have endorsed John Duarte districtwide.

Mayor Lopez has deep ties to Ceres, living and working in the community since 1970. Mayor Lopez runs a local sports apparel and athletic business, as well as coaching high school Freshman football at Central Valley High School. Javier Lopez was elected Mayor of Ceres in 2020.

In announcing his endorsement, Mayor Lopez stated:

"I am pleased to announce my endorsement in support of John Duarte for re-election in CA-13. Congressman Duarte has been a champion for the city of Ceres and the Valley which are often left behind, advocating for the issues that matter to us the most. As Mayor, I’ve seen the effects of high state taxes and hardships on valley families and all they have been put through. I look forward to continuing working together with Congressman Duarte to improve our communities."

Following the endorsement Congressman John Duarte responded:

"I am thankful to have received an endorsement from a respected community leader and elected official like Mayor Lopez. Right now, Central Valley families are being crushed by high prices of gas, groceries, and an increasing cost of living. I remain focused on championing bipartisan solutions that benefit hard-working Valley families, and working with Mayor Lopez to continue uplifting the people of Ceres." ###
---

But here 's the thing: When the Clintons went after Trump... When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump... When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump... And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump... They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES. Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. "Can my colleagues and I count on you?" | | "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS" | | "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE" Democrats' dark money dollars are pouring in to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. "PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:" | | "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS" | | "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE" Thank you for your time and support, Kevin McCarthy | | "Never Give Up: Donate now!" I write to you with a heavy heart. The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown. We must never give up on our crusade for freedom. I'm sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority. "Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?"** Thank you, Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy | | "DONATE" | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Sign the Petition: Your voice can SAVE gray wolves from extinction
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1939840?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **BLOOD across the forest floor. MANGLED limbs from sharp metal leg traps. SUFFOCATED by neck snares. SHOT to death by piercing bullets.** These are only a few horrific ways innocent gray wolves and pups are being _**brutally hunted and murdered**_. The death of a mother wolf can push the death toll up for these precious animals. Vulnerable young wolf pups are left to suffer and _**DIE**_ from **HYPOTHERMIA, STARVATION or PREDATION** without their mama wolf present to feed and protect them. In the surrounding regions of Yellowstone National Park, surviving as a gray wolf is _unimaginable_ and _deadly_ due _**to ruthless trophy hunters**_ who are SLAUGHTERING these iconic canines for sport. They find murdering wolves _exhilarating_ —luring them with bait and then _using weapons like crossbows, shotguns, and rifles to kill them._ They are even **DYNAMITING** nursing wolf mothers and pups in their dens! [**Please Friend, if we do not ACT NOW, our beloved gray wolves will only continue to suffer cruel deaths and soon diminish. We need your help to SAVE these iconic creatures from vicious trophy hunters. Add your name! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1939841?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1939842?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
If you’re as upset reading this as we are, then you must agree that hunting gray wolves, especially in this capacity, should **NOT** be legal. Other states have enforced laws to protect this vulnerable species while states like Wyoming, Idaho and Montana permit these inhumane hunting practices with _**little to no regulation. **_
Saving gray wolves means _**EXPANDING and STRENGETHING**_ federal protections. [**In the 60 seconds it takes to shoot a roaming vulnerable gray wolf, you could to use your voice to speak up! Sign the petition before 11:59pm tonight to DEMAND the Biden Administration uphold protections for gray wolves and PROTECT them from the hands of cold-blooded trophy hunters**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1939843?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)[**.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1939844?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | BLOOD across the forest floor. MANGLED limbs from sharp metal leg traps. SUFFOCATED by neck snares. SHOT to death by piercing bullets. These are only a few horrific ways innocent gray wolves and pups are being brutally hunted and murdered. The death of a mother wolf can push the death toll up for these precious animals. Vulnerable young wolf pups are left to suffer and DIE from HYPOTHERMIA, STARVATION or PREDATION without their mama wolf present to feed and protect them. In the surrounding regions of Yellowstone National Park, surviving as a gray wolf is unimaginable and deadly due to ruthless trophy hunters who are SLAUGHTERING these iconic canines for sport. They find murdering wolves exhilarating —luring them with bait and then using weapons like crossbows, shotguns, and rifles to kill them. They are even DYNAMITING nursing wolf mothers and pups in their dens! == | == If you’re as upset reading this as we are, then you must agree that hunting gray wolves, especially in this capacity, should NOT be legal. Other states have enforced laws to protect this vulnerable species while states like Wyoming, Idaho and Montana permit these inhumane hunting practices with little to no regulation. Saving gray wolves means EXPANDING and STRENGETHING federal protections. == == Thank you for taking action to protect wolves! Friends of the Earth == == == | == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == Formatting canceled

name: Team Warmington
subject: Ayotte backtracks regarding Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Cinde Warmington
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68450445/423055779/-1532148897?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230821_SV_ayotte_1.1_1MO_campaign_na_na_ayottetrump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDk3ODVjYS02NzQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wsSzCjKegiYcAo7uOoCxB0ewF735ltwphCqKm_TXkBw=&emci=94e8ce12-6740-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=5d9785ca-6740-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626166) The hypocrisy is blatant. After publicly denouncing Trump in 2016 for his vile, anti-women Access Hollywood tape, Cinde’s newest opponent, Kelly Ayotte, went right to work for his extremist agenda.

**Then:** She pledged to write-in Mike Pence in the presidential election, which contributed to her loss of the senate race.

**Now:** Despite even more rising concerns about Trump, she said that he has her full support if he becomes the nominee.

**_[We want to know what you think: Are Kelly Ayotte and Donald Trump too extreme for New Hampshire? Answer in the next 24 hours to have your opinion recorded→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68450446/423055780/-1532148897?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230821_SV_ayotte_1.1_1MO_campaign_na_na_ayottetrump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDk3ODVjYS02NzQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wsSzCjKegiYcAo7uOoCxB0ewF735ltwphCqKm_TXkBw=&emci=94e8ce12-6740-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=5d9785ca-6740-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626166)_** | | **[Answer Here→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68450447/423055781/-1532148897?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230821_SV_ayotte_1.1_1MO_campaign_na_na_ayottetrump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDk3ODVjYS02NzQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wsSzCjKegiYcAo7uOoCxB0ewF735ltwphCqKm_TXkBw=&emci=94e8ce12-6740-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=5d9785ca-6740-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626166)**
---

**Trump supporter or not, she has consistently rubber stamped his extremist agenda, helping overturn Roe v. Wade and campaigning with extremist groups like Moms for Liberty.**

We need to elect a leader to the corner office with integrity. It’s hypocritical for a former state Attorney General like Kelly Ayotte, who was once in charge of upholding the law, to support a man who has 40 criminal counts and at least three indictments against him. We can’t let her become our governor.

**When push comes to shove, Ayotte stands with extremists, not with the people of the Granite State. That’s why we can’t elect her to the corner office.**

Will you tell Team Cinde what you think of our opponent’s support of Trump by answering our short survey today?

Team, since the 2020 election, Republican lawmakers have passed **dozens of bills in nearly half of all states** undermining voting rights.

In **Ohio** , Republicans tried to change the rules to make it harder for voters to make reproductive freedom a constitutional right.

In **Texas** , GOP lawmakers passed legislation that allows state officials to overturn election results in the state’s most populous county.

And now, **House Republicans** are working to pass legislation that would restrict voting rights nationwide.
[**_The NDRC is working across the country to combat efforts to weaken our democracy and undermine voting rights. Will you donate now to support our work?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68450480/423055848/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230821_FR_8F_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhOTc4NWNhLTY3NDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AMg4CLsUYQoGjk5HtoBjU8fOx3Leqon-K080FGEPPtU=)
While Republicans have been working to restrict voting rights, Democrats have been working to expand them.

After our grassroots movement helped Democrats win full control of state government in **Michigan** for the first time in 40 years, lawmakers passed legislation to expand access to early voting and absentee voting.

Likewise in **Minnesota** , Democrats passed legislation to automatically register voters at age 18.

And last month, **House Democrats** reintroduced the Freedom to Vote Act, which would set national standards protecting the right to vote.
[**_Team, the NDRC is committed to fighting across the country to strengthen our democracy and protect the right to vote. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Elevating healthy discourse and policy contrast with other candidates isn't an attack, but will be an opportunity to see who will actually stand up to Xi Jinping as well as the Deep State. This debate will be your first chance to see who is not afraid to lead this nation to become a better America and reclaim a country we can be proud of. | 1. Will you be tuning into the first GOP Primary debate on August 23rd? 2. Have you endorsed a candidate for President yet? 3. What question or topic do you want to see the candidates and myself debate? | The truth is, right now I am the only presidential candidate with a plan for the issues facing America today. From reviving our national identity to unleashing our economy and declaring economic independence from communist China, my vision is focused on national revival, not a national divorce. Together, we can take America First to the next level. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

| | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | ************** I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

But there’s also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn’t what it used to be.

I’ve been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That’s the American way.

The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That’s 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.
My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. **********

---
| | [ Join the Sun Now → ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=73a375623dfc44498c65782f9db8e81d&_e=9inLcDBfzJL5ANIlzDY4m2raVqKbDnH0Ns1msWyW83kglcFx_3IP7TzZkWWPzQqKogn0wz6JcDoLD7V70ashpRZb9hvD70dEXQHPbZeOPoFQu6mlyBCithhuRyW1fXmEywQrKySGXn-Huun3l_SQeXmfnYSraffek9qm8qj83n2f5vAgcxTr8szabjA4KUakA_8eiBHGDp50QC8WxTxfBVo8blAJKQjZN37z-TvCOqUc9BXVYZjP_4WHhb0xXaJQ8UoEV0upOXG0-qo9zU2xV-V2COZWFBfz5NEQn_gvvEo%3D)
---
| | ****** Please join me in the fight to restore America’s journalism.
This is one mission that our country desperately needs.**
---
| | |
---

Larry Kudlow
Columnist for The New York Sun

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68451307/423058446/-1695430967?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U5Y2Q4ODctNmM0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uJ23KV04lUmXMnNcsvuNbWL4oCzafWqOTP_c3zOQoe0=)
Hi there Peter, 👋

I'm Emma, Joanna Weiss’s campaign manager. I couldn’t be prouder to join Joanna’s team, and am thrilled to be able to work to keep California’s 47th District blue.

**Joanna’s race is unique.** The 47th District is the only Democratic-held seat in California that’s both open and considered a toss-up. Keeping this seat blue also happens to be critical in our efforts of retaking the House majority.

**I wouldn’t have joined Joanna’s team if I didn’t think she was up for the challenge.** Her work as a law school professor and community activist has been incredibly inspiring to me – especially her work organizing women to help advance Democratic values and ethics. _As a fellow woman in politics, I know how critical her voice is for our community and in Congress._

**As hopeful as I am, I know it will be an uphill battle against the GOP.** Republicans are determined to flip this seat and keep their grip on the House. We recently got word that a super PAC aligned with Kevin McCarthy has already committed to spend **$100+ million** on districts like ours.

clean_body: | = Hi there Peter, 👋 I'm Emma, Joanna Weiss’s campaign manager. I couldn’t be prouder to join Joanna’s team, and am thrilled to be able to work to keep California’s 47th District blue. Joanna’s race is unique. The 47th District is the only Democratic-held seat in California that’s both open and considered a toss-up. Keeping this seat blue also happens to be critical in our efforts of retaking the House majority. I wouldn’t have joined Joanna’s team if I didn’t think she was up for the challenge. Her work as a law school professor and community activist has been incredibly inspiring to me – especially her work organizing women to help advance Democratic values and ethics. As a fellow woman in politics, I know how critical her voice is for our community and in Congress. As hopeful as I am, I know it will be an uphill battle against the GOP. Republicans are determined to flip this seat and keep their grip on the House. We recently got word that a super PAC aligned with Kevin McCarthy has already committed to spend $100+ million on districts like ours. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you for your support! name: CaucusRoom
subject: Biden is Playing Political Games
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-aydklhk-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday! CNN keeps saying[ _Trump was right_](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-y/).**
**The Press is Finally Hammering Biden** A Meet the Press **[roundtable had much to criticize about Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-j/)** and his poll numbers that look more like Clinton in 2016. **Dystopian Goals** These 14 cities have a target of **[banning meat, dairy and private vehicles](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-t/)** by 2030. **Biden's Political Games** Biden is using a government agency to **[sink Gov Abbot's border Buoys.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-i/)** **Will He or Won't He?** Trump, the commanding frontrunner for the nomination as he makes his third straight White House run, hasn't committed to attending the debate on Wednesday.**[Do you think he should attend?](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-d/)**

**Put the Big Guy on the Stand** Oh boy! Hunter Biden's lawyers [**threatened to put Joe on the stand** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-h/)if the DOJ brought charges against his son. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-k/)!**
* What's **[wrong with you](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-u/)?**
* **[Finally](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-p/)!**
* They never **[look the same](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-x/).**
* Did they**[plan it this way](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-m/)?**
* Does anyone recognize**[this guy](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-c/)?**

**Countdown to the 1st Republican Primary Debate.** **[_Watch it here!_](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-q/)** [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-a/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-f/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-z/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhk-trhiujldw-v/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

name: Team Bennet
subject: Protect service members’s reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_082123_DODAbortion_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_082123_DODAbortion_act]
This is unprecedented, friend.
For the first time ever, three of the United States’ military services are operating without Senate-confirmed chiefs.
That’s because Senator Tuberville is currently blocking all military nominations, including for senior military officers in the Army, Marine Corps, and Navy. It’s a misguided attempt to protest a Department of Defense policy regarding abortion rights, and one Michael has been fighting from the beginning.
We wanted to make sure you saw our email about this issue, and had a chance to sign our petition.
Our service members sacrifice everything to protect this country. The least we can do in return is ensure that they have access to the best possible medical care — including reproductive care. But Senator Tuberville wants to play politics with reproductive care, and our armed forces.
The Senate MUST protect the reproductive rights of service members. Will you join our call by adding your name now? It will only take a minute [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_072623_dodreprorights]
SIGN ON NOW >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_072623_dodreprorights]
SIGN ON NOW >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_072623_dodreprorights]
Michael has been fighting this since the very beginning. Your support now will help him keep up this fight.
Thank you!
Team Bennet
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Bennet <info@michaelbennet.com>
Date: Fri, Jul 28, 2023 at 2:18 PM
Subject: This is a national security threat
Hi friend –
You may have seen on the news that a Senator from Alabama is currently blocking hundreds of military promotions.
Michael has been fighting this pointless obstruction from the start, and we wanted to take a minute and give you more of the story.
In February, Senator Tuberville, a Republican from Alabama, took the unprecedented step of blocking all military nominations. No member of Congress in American history has ever done this — and Michael was the first Senator to point this out on the Senate floor.
Months later, Tuberville is still blocking our service members from their well-earned promotions — claiming it's in protest of a Department of Defense policy that protects access to reproductive care for women in uniform.
This political game is jeopardizing our national security. His obstruction could prevent as many as 650 nominations, and is stopping the Senate from filling vacancies as high up as the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff and the Commandant of the Marine Corps.
These are people who have dedicated their lives to this country — and they deserve nothing less than the best from their nation’s leaders.
To make matters worse, Senator Tuberville is doing this to make women's lives more difficult as they face an intensely personal choice.
He wants to force women in the military to pay their own travel out of state for an abortion, and use their days off to do so.
He wants to make our service members' lives harder, and he must be stopped.
Michael was the first person calling on Senator Tuberville to end this charade. He's been more vocal about it than anyone else — and he won’t stop until this ends.
We created a petition to call on the Senate to protect the reproductive rights of our servicemembers. Will you join us by signing your name? [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_072623_dodreprorights]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_072623_dodreprorights]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_072623_dodreprorights]
Thank you!
— Team Bennet

Hey, Friend.

I'm sending over a _brief message_ to discuss the measures my colleagues and I are taking to hold the Biden administration accountable for putting the security of our nation at risk.

**[**HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE
>> PITCH IN $25 HERE <<**](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=462d1e1770f74677a2112768bddcf3cb&_e=go7NUJmnFQtGlIrGh8SnkgGN9GJFNLNj6szoqDFOjKxF6tYbWlMG7MV3dChfmSsUzNLdav6O92i5R_Qu7LaL6tCVUNiX0mzotpa1a0huZWJQoU2CMkcZQ6royN--jDP0uz-eleeh29Rxz-28u52-VO04pOOuvfwGTJWzEvKzcefaKD8cPUc8M441kOHyAp08_CKwaqeHE1w25jQic-s7oEHiL6niLSTqFdiZl316ywNP0bXqjhxLDswpC1_FH-hgM7dtwG_tjYAwQEeKt2bP3P58pcxzO9TspmjKBgyqAccl0d7BCQgOA5hj0PiSpyc2V1rapD-KFAomBUh5YaH1kw%3D%3D)**

**[**> > HOLD BIDEN AND MAYORKAS ACCOUNTABLE <<**](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=462d1e1770f74677a2112768bddcf3cb&_e=go7NUJmnFQtGlIrGh8SnkgGN9GJFNLNj6szoqDFOjKxF6tYbWlMG7MV3dChfmSsUzNLdav6O92i5R_Qu7LaL6tCVUNiX0mzotpa1a0huZWJQoU2CMkcZQ6royN--jDP0uz-eleeh29Rxz-28u52-VO04pOOuvfwGTJWzEvKzcecFBVRZTp5aDinF8cDEE9UMjm7rGEJwSxAYGQTL9QcGEbCXgCIcLHEX3ve0ZWc4t1sFP5MgJ2Jo8zNkKbkWS86F8TDuqINwHodMpUuhWFuXeFNLGvVVZVWqKf6bVppSfzZZP3K1xZF4f6Oh1vXdeFlVi44cndpxxucQokQQgQSezQ%3D%3D)**

Secretary Mayorkas's reckless behavior threatens the integrity of the Constitution and the rule of law, and Congress must act. **We simply cannot remain a free country if we do not secure our borders, which brings me to humbly request you chip in whatever you can below.**

name: Senator Kennedy
subject: Smack-Down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
*JOKE INSIDE*

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=96efe546a3804307a9c2a0a9a3867202&_e=NwZV2rLxcjLEDp03ppZEyzgod2np-38W1LYXX_MuyAAf6iE9vYWOuUN8qqmlH9Lidnsbo4FlDZRX4bVyyqnM89IOP3ee2Y7HZts10nid_us9TOQ6zH0iQuGwdWqlX1cwuKQc-gQxIquC-K8WT53MpB_SjdlTewnBa1pqDFt7fiaEHAcqy0NYPiTdxmvU-pkptohN_AktDGDYnWxTHgZF7bJSH1tV9ve8f2yrnYOd4KvqGtORYqlXyFWJHDDonXxT5FQKap7fxh72Reb5fRzXS_09v5aC0Q5HcfLR-fH6L1RiVqOkU2sRgPiSUAJKd2ta_UZNXGi6EPAstY04j7CvQm9oPEGHU-VfzzD3YatuaV0%3D)
---
Hey thereFriend,

**_I don 't like to brag about the expensive places I've been, but this morning I went to the grocery store AND visited the gas station._**

All jokes aside, this has spiraled out of control. **" Bidenomics" is bull.**

Democrat over-spenders are squeezing everyday Americans dry with their poor economic policy. | [**DONATE TO STOP BIDENOMICS**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=96efe546a3804307a9c2a0a9a3867202&_e=NwZV2rLxcjLEDp03ppZEyzgod2np-38W1LYXX_MuyAAf6iE9vYWOuUN8qqmlH9Lidnsbo4FlDZRX4bVyyqnM89IOP3ee2Y7HZts10nid_us9TOQ6zH0iQuGwdWqlX1cwuKQc-gQxIquC-K8WT53MpB_SjdlTewnBa1pqDFt7fiaEHAcqy0NYPiTdxmvU-pkpzsO-96eC1nAf4MnY6-Qz85oBHiIyXzcCSCsrd-CwMJisIVSSNAfXzqi0hv_q1lZ3ZT0OdJ9TImJuFinb1uBPvR7nu2IsXLCTRZlxlPU4jsKyY0dMuShsHUg2vtSl3_80k9YGyVxVElc8jRKpRvit-D5xEvqMCCg0qBM1gnVNBUo%3D)
---

Socialism is running rampant through our government, sending handouts to undeserving recipients, sending our energy independence out the door, and sending our nation on a downward spiral.

I'm leading what I like to call a **Socialism Smack-Down.

Summer is almost over and fall is just around the corner, Peter - and we wanted to keep you posted on what Team Lawler has been up to.
Last week, Congressman Lawler paid tribute to the brave men and women who lost their lives during the disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan, as well as called for justice on behalf of the families who lost their loved ones during the September 11th terrorist attacks of 2001.
Also, Mike Lawler and other members of the NY delegation once again went on record to demand the repeal of the federal SALT cap, a harmful policy which increases New Yorkers' tax burden and essentially forces many NY families pay taxes twice on the same amount of income.
Please see for yourself and, as always, please share your feedback.

clean_body: | | | | Read this week's Lawler Ledger | Summer is almost over and fall is just around the corner, Peter - and we wanted to keep you posted on what Team Lawler has been up to. Last week, Congressman Lawler paid tribute to the brave men and women who lost their lives during the disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan, as well as called for justice on behalf of the families who lost their loved ones during the September 11th terrorist attacks of 2001. Also, Mike Lawler and other members of the NY delegation once again went on record to demand the repeal of the federal SALT cap, a harmful policy which increases New Yorkers' tax burden and essentially forces many NY families pay taxes twice on the same amount of income. Please see for yourself and, as always, please share your feedback. | MIKE IN THE NEWS | TOP SOCIAL MEDIA POSTS | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York! Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- =

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

| Hello Peter,

I’m writing to ask if you will make a donation to our campaign. I hope you will give me a minute to explain why this request is important — **_[but if you are ready to do your part right now, you can split a donation between Democrats Win Seats and my campaign at this link knowing how grateful I am for your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68451730/423060183/550760886?amount=25&source=EM_NBI_dwspac_20230821_FR_1.4_0_3MO_casey_NA_NA_ohioabortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjBjNmIxMy02ZTQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=op8Te5xj_niVx14B0_5Tz19G71QMQq9en0gwP9p99Y0=)_**

This is also the race that could decide if Democrats hold our Senate majority. We know that and Mitch McConnell knows it too.

It is hard to understate the stakes, Firstname: Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, women’s rights, LGBTQ+ equality, the right to vote, and more are on the line if Republicans flip the Senate next year.

We need to be able to fight back against the millions that McConnell and the GOP are going to spend here, which will hinge on our ability to meet each fundraising goal we set.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_082123_fighterweneed&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_082123_fighterweneed&amount=20]
Hi Peter,
Now more than ever, it’s important we have elected officials with the courage and the experience to stand up to MAGA Republican bullies.
Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene are running the House of Representatives. They are trying to take our country backwards on every issue.
That’s why we need to elect Raquel to Congress. As a state representative and then as a state senator, Raquel Terán showed up, spoke up, and sounded the alarm when the MAGA Republicans in the state house threatened to take our state backward.
And she didn’t just talk, she organized her colleagues to block so many harmful policies. Between preventing a decrease in Arizona's minimum wage, preventing a ban on sanctuary cities, and fighting back against Republican attacks on women’s reproductive freedoms, Raquel has fought for and with us at every turn.
Now it’s time we take that fight to Congress. Chip in $5, or $10 today to support our grassroots campaign >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_082123_fighterweneed&amount=20]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_082123_fighterweneed&amount=20]
Republicans in Washington are now threatening to cut Social Security and Medicare, while trying to impose a federal abortion ban. We need a Representative who knows how to go up against far-right radicals and win. That’s why we need Raquel in Congress.
Before we can make that a reality, however, we need to get through a challenging primary campaign. Can you donate a few dollars today to support our grassroots efforts? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_082123_fighterweneed&amount=20]
A ganar,
Team Terán

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, Now more than ever, it’s important we have elected officials with the courage and the experience to stand up to MAGA Republican bullies. Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene are running the House of Representatives. They are trying to take our country backwards on every issue. That’s why we need to elect Raquel to Congress. As a state representative and then as a state senator, Raquel Terán showed up, spoke up, and sounded the alarm when the MAGA Republicans in the state house threatened to take our state backward. And she didn’t just talk, she organized her colleagues to block so many harmful policies. Between preventing a decrease in Arizona's minimum wage, preventing a ban on sanctuary cities, and fighting back against Republican attacks on women’s reproductive freedoms, Raquel has fought for and with us at every turn. Now it’s time we take that fight to Congress. Chip in $5, or $10 today to support our grassroots campaign >> [] DONATE [] Republicans in Washington are now threatening to cut Social Security and Medicare, while trying to impose a federal abortion ban. We need a Representative who knows how to go up against far-right radicals and win. That’s why we need Raquel in Congress. Before we can make that a reality, however, we need to get through a challenging primary campaign. Can you donate a few dollars today to support our grassroots efforts? [] A ganar, Team Terán DONATE [] [] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona. For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children. She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake. Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [] Terán for Congress PO Box 1041 Glendale, AZ 85311 United States Paid for by Terán for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Hi there, In a moment, ****[I’m going to ask you to split a donation between Michigan Victory Fund and Fight Like Hell PAC to support our collective work to keep Michigan’s open Senate seat blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68451782/423060353/-200302748?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230821_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTkxOGVhMmQtNmU0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dMydLI-1oU006jzwRn_qCoPdPmcRkZmI45iNgbZSe-s=) ****But first, I want to take a minute to talk about Senator Debbie Stabenow’s service and legacy for our state. Senator Stabenow is a champion for Michigan. As the first woman elected to represent Michigan in the U.S. Senate, she's been leading the fight for working families, the auto industry, and farmers. She continues to stand up for workers’ rights and expand paths to good-paying jobs in the trades. She’s brought manufacturing and supply chains home to Michigan, and she works across the aisle as Chair of the Senate Agriculture Committee to deliver bipartisan farm bills. Not only that — but she is a fierce protector of our Great Lakes. Sen. Stabenow fought for decades to modernize the Soo Locks and continues to tackle toxic contaminants in drinking water. She’s also a leader in expanding access to affordable health care and ensuring parity for mental health services. **Most of all, she is an incredible friend. Debbie is one-of-a-kind. ** Just like many others, I was surprised when she announced earlier this year that she was not running for re-election — but so incredibly proud of her legacy of delivering results for our state. But, an open Senate seat in Michigan is a rare opportunity. And with Sen. Stabenow’s retirement, MAGA extremists will surely be doing everything they can to win this swing seat and control of the Senate. If we want to protect the progress we’ve made, build on her legacy, and continue working together to make a difference for Michiganders in every community, then we need to come together and fight like hell to keep Michigan blue. As we gear up for 2024, Sen. Stabenow and I are teaming up to make sure we've got strong support all across Michigan. We're working hard to build a grassroots network that's tough enough to protect this seat and come out on top, but we can't do it without your help. Your support is a game-changer for us in this mission. ****[That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you split a donation between Michigan Victory Fund and Fight Like Hell PAC today? clean_body: | Hi there, In a moment, **= But first, I want to take a minute to talk about Senator Debbie Stabenow’s service and legacy for our state. Senator Stabenow is a champion for Michigan. As the first woman elected to represent Michigan in the U.S. Senate, she's been leading the fight for working families, the auto industry, and farmers. She continues to stand up for workers’ rights and expand paths to good-paying jobs in the trades. She’s brought manufacturing and supply chains home to Michigan, and she works across the aisle as Chair of the Senate Agriculture Committee to deliver bipartisan farm bills. Not only that — but she is a fierce protector of our Great Lakes. Sen. Stabenow fought for decades to modernize the Soo Locks and continues to tackle toxic contaminants in drinking water. She’s also a leader in expanding access to affordable health care and ensuring parity for mental health services. Most of all, she is an incredible friend. Debbie is one-of-a-kind. Just like many others, I was surprised when she announced earlier this year that she was not running for re-election — but so incredibly proud of her legacy of delivering results for our state. But, an open Senate seat in Michigan is a rare opportunity. And with Sen. Stabenow’s retirement, MAGA extremists will surely be doing everything they can to win this swing seat and control of the Senate. If we want to protect the progress we’ve made, build on her legacy, and continue working together to make a difference for Michiganders in every community, then we need to come together and fight like hell to keep Michigan blue. As we gear up for 2024, Sen. Stabenow and I are teaming up to make sure we've got strong support all across Michigan. We're working hard to build a grassroots network that's tough enough to protect this seat and come out on top, but we can't do it without your help. Your support is a game-changer for us in this mission. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you again for everything that you do to help us move forward together. I’m grateful for your partnership and support. Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
