clean_body: As Attorney General, Keir will take on powerful special interests who treat vulnerable people unfairly, from corporate polluters, opioid manufacturers, to predatory lenders. Keir will always fight for fairness, opportunity and justice. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter — it’s Keir. I wanted to make sure you caught my team’s last finance update because things aren’t looking so good. Right now, my team tells me we’re way off of where we need to be if we want to finish strong and reach our August fundraising goal. = My years of experience as a Chief Defender taught me how to develop innovative solutions to the problems plaguing our system, and I’ve never taken a one-size-fits-all approach to the challenges I faced. There is no candidate more equipped to lead the Attorney General’s office on Day 1 than I am, Peter. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Forwarded message from Team Keir: We wanted to give you a quick update for how our finances are looking for the month of August. There are less than two weeks left, and to be frank, we’re not exactly where we need to be. Hitting each of our monthly goals from now until next November is crucial, and we need your help. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Peter, Keir is the only candidate truly prepared to take on the challenges that millions of Pennsylvanians are facing each and every day. Through her years as a leader in both Montgomery and Philadelphia Counties, we witnessed a transformation as she worked side by side with the community to rebuild the justice system from the bottom up. And with her consistent track record of fighting for the underdog and winning, we know there’s no better fit. = | = Thanks for all your support, Team Keir | = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY KEIR FOR AG PO BOX 22321 | Philadelphia, PA 19110 If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

name: Keystone Progress Education Fund
subject: Exciting news, the road ahead, and a summer breath of fresh air
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Hold onto summer with some great news to keep you going!| | |
---
Hello Friend! August has been flying by with some great news out of Harrisburg to re-energize us for the ongoing challenges on the horizon.
Governor Shapiro came through for all Pennsylvanians by announcing that, “after nearly 30 years, the state [is ending its contract with Real Alternatives—an anti-abortion organization ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68451849/423060432/-325019552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2MGM2YjEzLTZlNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=65BRttZ8Jd8CTuuj5GmYYydl8Ab5eguqNEEmSekPa0I=&emci=8184a635-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=960c6b13-6e40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)that provides funding to what are known as 'crisis pregnancy centers,' letting the state’s contract with Real Alternatives expire at the end of the year.” This means that over $7 million annually can be redirected to fund programs that actually benefit the people of Pennsylvania!
All eyes are on Western Pennsylvania for a roadmap to [progressive Democrat’s success](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68451850/423060433/-1423414804?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2MGM2YjEzLTZlNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=65BRttZ8Jd8CTuuj5GmYYydl8Ab5eguqNEEmSekPa0I=&emci=8184a635-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=960c6b13-6e40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134) in the elections this November.
Speaking of the November election, a new report explains the [importance of the judicial elections ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68451851/423060434/-1089396879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2MGM2YjEzLTZlNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=65BRttZ8Jd8CTuuj5GmYYydl8Ab5eguqNEEmSekPa0I=&emci=8184a635-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=960c6b13-6e40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)to upholding our democracy and protecting voting rights.
---
| | In labor news, members of the Writers’ Guild of America have been on [strike for over 100](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68451852/423060435/-1770969042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2MGM2YjEzLTZlNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=65BRttZ8Jd8CTuuj5GmYYydl8Ab5eguqNEEmSekPa0I=&emci=8184a635-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=960c6b13-6e40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134) days as negotiations with the studio executives continue. If you’re in the Philadelphia area, you can [stand in solidarity](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68451853/423060436/-1327719925?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2MGM2YjEzLTZlNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=65BRttZ8Jd8CTuuj5GmYYydl8Ab5eguqNEEmSekPa0I=&emci=8184a635-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=960c6b13-6e40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134) with the people on strike at a rally from noon - 1pm at City Hall(1400 John F Kennedy Blvd, Philadelphia, PA 19107).
---
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68451854/423060437/-1327719925?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2MGM2YjEzLTZlNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=65BRttZ8Jd8CTuuj5GmYYydl8Ab5eguqNEEmSekPa0I=&emci=8184a635-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=960c6b13-6e40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)
---
| | Nationally, this month marks one year since President Biden signed the Inflation Reduction Act into law. [This law made an enormous difference in the lives of Pennsylvanians](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68451855/423060438/980251670?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2MGM2YjEzLTZlNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=65BRttZ8Jd8CTuuj5GmYYydl8Ab5eguqNEEmSekPa0I=&emci=8184a635-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=960c6b13-6e40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134). It “ensured that 76,000 Pennsylvanians were able to keep their health insurance, reduced the cost of insulin for over 80,000 seniors, and incentivized several manufacturers to invest in the state and create more clean energy jobs.”
---
| | Help protect our democracy by [supporting our work](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68451856/423060439/-1148132282?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2MGM2YjEzLTZlNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=65BRttZ8Jd8CTuuj5GmYYydl8Ab5eguqNEEmSekPa0I=) to engage with voters, register potential voters, and ensure that communities understand the importance of electing progressives this November!

---
| | Enormous thanks to everyone that applied for our Art of Democracy show. We received incredible submissions and can’t wait for the opening at the end of September! That’s the news for now. Get more on the latest legislative and judicial hits, misses, progressive news, and actions whenever you’re scrolling — follow, like, and share our socials! [Instagram](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68451857/423060440/2084364585?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2MGM2YjEzLTZlNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=65BRttZ8Jd8CTuuj5GmYYydl8Ab5eguqNEEmSekPa0I=&emci=8184a635-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=960c6b13-6e40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134), [Twitter](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68451858/423060441/1473617521?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2MGM2YjEzLTZlNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=65BRttZ8Jd8CTuuj5GmYYydl8Ab5eguqNEEmSekPa0I=&emci=8184a635-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=960c6b13-6e40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134), [Facebook](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68451859/423060442/-2104860897?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2MGM2YjEzLTZlNDAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=65BRttZ8Jd8CTuuj5GmYYydl8Ab5eguqNEEmSekPa0I=&emci=8184a635-5f40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=960c6b13-6e40-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134). We’re going on a short end-of-summer break to recharge before diving into the election season. We’ll see you in September and hope that you’re able to find time to recoup as well! In solidarity,The KPEF team

clean_body: Hold onto summer with some great news to keep you going!| | | Hello Friend! August has been flying by with some great news out of Harrisburg to re-energize us for the ongoing challenges on the horizon. Governor Shapiro came through for all Pennsylvanians by announcing that, “after nearly 30 years, the state provides funding to what are known as 'crisis pregnancy centers,' letting the state’s contract with Real Alternatives expire at the end of the year.” This means that over $7 million annually can be redirected to fund programs that actually benefit the people of Pennsylvania! All eyes are on Western Pennsylvania for a roadmap to in the elections this November. Speaking of the November election, a new report explains the upholding our democracy and protecting voting rights. | | In labor news, members of the Writers’ Guild of America have been on days as negotiations with the studio executives continue. If you’re in the Philadelphia area, you can with the people on strike at a rally from noon - 1pm at City Hall(1400 John F Kennedy Blvd, Philadelphia, PA 19107). | | | Nationally, this month marks one year since President Biden signed the Inflation Reduction Act into law. . It “ensured that 76,000 Pennsylvanians were able to keep their health insurance, reduced the cost of insulin for over 80,000 seniors, and incentivized several manufacturers to invest in the state and create more clean energy jobs.” | | Help protect our democracy by = to engage with voters, register potential voters, and ensure that communities understand the importance of electing progressives this November! | | Enormous thanks to everyone that applied for our Art of Democracy show. We received incredible submissions and can’t wait for the opening at the end of September! That’s the news for now. Get more on the latest legislative and judicial hits, misses, progressive news, and actions whenever you’re scrolling — follow, like, and share our socials! , , . We’re going on a short end-of-summer break to recharge before diving into the election season. We’ll see you in September and hope that you’re able to find time to recoup as well! In solidarity,The KPEF team | | There is power in numbers! KPEF unites people across the progressive spectrum to It takes resources to host shows like the upcoming Art of Democracy, engage in public education, and year-round voter outreach. = | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.Keystone Progress Education Fund 354 S Atlantic Ave Pittsburgh, PA 15224 United States

Peter, I thought I should take a moment to address some of the most frequently asked questions I get about HER Time:
1. **Why do you send all of these emails?**
These emails are the primary way HER Time raises money to support all the work we do. Whether that’s advocating for our issues (like passing the _SHIELD Act_)_,_ protecting abortion, or boosting women candidates, like Lauren Underwood or Angie Craig. They’re also the most direct way for our team to send critical updates to our supporters — like you!
2. **Does my $5 really make a difference?**
Yes! $5 may seem insignificant, but it speaks to the power of a grassroots team. When you multiply $3 or $5 or $10 over and over by everyone reading these emails, the impact can be _huge_. But grassroots power only works if everyone plays their part.
3. **Do you expect me to donate every time we reach out?**
_Of course not!_ But we do hope you open our emails and give them a read, because they have the most up-to-date information about our work, and your engagement helps us out.

While we don’t expect you to donate to every email, I hope you’ll consider donating to this one. [_**What do you say, Peter? Have I answered your questions? Could you help us out with a $5 donation today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68452179/423061232/-529510226?amount=5&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230821_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjRjMzA1N2EtNmU0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_cV0djnFZkcT8gZVxiugsQhrlraE62vER4ktGnJzZ2s=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68452180/423061233/-529510226?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230821_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjRjMzA1N2EtNmU0MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_cV0djnFZkcT8gZVxiugsQhrlraE62vER4ktGnJzZ2s=)

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: 😱 Lake/Sinema
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
It appears as if Kari Lake is getting closer to getting into this race, and when she does it will be with the full backing of the MAGA-right.
#

Peter -
We send a good amount of fundraising emails, and we don’t expect you to give to every one that hits your inbox. But we do hope you’ll give to this one.
Please let us explain why:
**FIRST:** It appears as if Kari Lake is getting closer to getting into this race, and when she does it will be with the full backing of the MAGA-right.
**THEN:** An article came out suggesting that Kyrsten Sinema is considering whether or not to run herself — something we really have to be ready for both ways.
**NOW:** Our next FEC deadline is approaching FAST and this quarter has not been going the way we need it to.
If everyone reading this email contributed just $10, we’d reach our goals today and have the resources we need to win this race.
But not everyone does give. Which is why we need people who understand the stakes of this race; who understand how important this Senate race is; who understand how important grassroots donations are to our campaign — to chip in.
Can you?
[**Please use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate today. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in and your support will get us back on track.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230821-2-f&t=1&akid=985%2E734936%2EFseNdt)

body:
| When we say $10 has a big impact on our campaign to elect Adam to the U.S. Senate, we mean it.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3493%2E5257348%2EkgsdL8)
Derek — With 10 days until the August deadline, we’re asking:
**[Will you chip in $10 to Adam’s campaign for the U.S. Senate?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=aug2023_abs_em.iLceiL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20230821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3493%2E5257348%2EkgsdL8)**
[DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=aug2023_abs_em.iLceiL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20230821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=3493%2E5257348%2EkgsdL8)
---
When we say $10 has a big impact on our campaign to elect Adam to the U.S. Senate, we mean it.
$10 helps us share Adam’s message with voters across California.
$10 helps us expand our online organizing and volunteer efforts to build up Team Schiff.
$10 helps us hit our fundraising goals and build up our defenses to withstand right-wing spending that’s going to pour into this race.
And $10 helps Adam stand strong against the attacks Donald Trump, Kevin McCarthy, and their MAGA cronies throw our way day after day.
Your $10 donation today is going to make all the difference in sending Adam to the Senate, Derek, especially since Adam isn’t taking a dollar from corporate PACs.
**[With this in mind, will you make a $10 donation now, ahead of our upcoming end-of-month deadline?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=aug2023_abs_em.iLceiL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20230821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=3493%2E5257348%2EkgsdL8)**

subject: The ‘DARVO’ Distraction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada]( "Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada")
body:
Heard of it? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/db87f44e417d/elizabeth-helgelien-for-congress-12646381?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=2cf7390a6e&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| Peter,
---
| | **D** eny. **A** ttack. **R** everse **V** ictim and **O** ffender.

James Lindsay recently argued the **DARVO** tactic is being utilized in the political persecution of President Trump.

It’s a strategy from Saul Alinsky’s _Rules for Radicals_ , a playbook for how to gain and retain power through the fanatical lens of Marxist socialism.

**Deny:** Evidence about the Biden Crime Family Enterprise continues to surface.

**Attack:** Wage lawfare and political persecution against the most formidable opponent.

**Reverse Victim and Offender:** The Deep State, Biden Family and Trump haters claim to be victims to MAGA Republicans and a President who produced REAL deliverables for Americans. Meanwhile the Biden Family has raked in millions by influence peddling with foreign nations.

**Whenever a new revelation about the Biden Crime Family Enterprise comes to light, Trump is charged with another indictment!** Yet with each new indictment, the support for President Trump grows.

**Why is that?** **It turns out most people don’t like bullies the size of a Goliath Government coming after one of its own!**

**This most recent indictment could have been brought over two years ago, why now?**

The circumstances surrounding this fourth indictment _reek of political bias_. DA Willis is investigating while leveraging it to fundraise for a political campaign. Even the manner of the grand jury proceedings have come into question, characterized by a judge as ‘one-sided’.

**I look forward to seeing President Trump present his case which will undoubtedly, yet again, have an outcome of complete exoneration. I have ZERO confidence in saying the same for Joe Biden.**

[**Peter, given the evidence that HAS seen the light of day, whose INNOCENCE do you have more confidence in?**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=9a0838b630&e=54a81bd33c)

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: contraception
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
It's time that we codified the right to contraception in law.
Access to birth control is essential to privacy, health, well-being, career growth, and more. Its legal future shouldn't be up for debate — but conservative leaders continue to threaten to overturn this fundamental right.
I write all about this in a recent op-ed. You can read all my thoughts in the article linked here >> [https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2023/08/11/protecting-access-to-contraception-a-bipartisan-issue/]
https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2023/08/11/protecting-access-to-contraception-a-bipartisan-issue/ [https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2023/08/11/protecting-access-to-contraception-a-bipartisan-issue/]
In recent years, conservative justices on the Supreme Court have suggested that they would be willing to overturn Griswold v. Connecticut , which established that women have the right to take birth control. And when the House voted to protect the right to contraception in 2022, 195 Republicans voted against it.
This much is clear: extremist Republicans won't stop at banning abortion.
Protecting access to contraception is a critical piece of protecting reproductive rights as a whole. The government has no place in inserting itself into intensely personal decisions about birth control and abortion.
In Congress, I will do everything in my power to protect these basic freedoms.
My opponent has made his anti-choice stance clear by voting to restrict abortion rights nationwide. I need your help to defeat him next November. Can I count on you to donate now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_082123_ConOpEd_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Team WFP
subject: Pennsylvania Republicans are terrified of our momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party IE Committee (http://wfpiepac
body:
| | | Peter, Pennsylvania Republicans are _terrified_ of our momentum. They filed an appeal after losing their frivolous lawsuit to remove WFP champions Councilmember Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke from November’s ballot for Philadelphia City Council. Why? Because they know that we can beat them. They know that our movement in Pennsylvania is strong. They know that people need a change. And they know that if we come together and make sure voters in Philadelphia know that they have a choice, we can shut them out of the two minority party seats that have been handed to them for decades. That’s where you come in, Peter. **[With the November election fast approaching, we need you to join a virtual postcard party on Wednesday, August 23 at 7 PM and reach any and all Philadelphia residents you know about the inspiring leaders running for city council this year. RSVP now for the link to join.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqZX2PdWyOQ6xu2o0VXnEnQxQBs9trK9jCkjFwwxiRDXhBwsVGisASjAZIqpDjOmV7z5hWifuJF8YJ5ylLd1F9u-BWdodKs03UEE8okebQU_AbQ9ZxrWRjmxgYPFsdjymBd7T_k6VmuRRHdpitutBa0fvqMD8AyPO3g1mit-TV4b8o1g-A3iC3tq_E3mCaFEfRJZo9q1ORHvi_TBrIcIIz4PGm-UpviNcfxyqy3am09DiggeLN1TuhAiR9XLynLZgzhhYXec4zrPUKo0Ff3fmJfQ/3yx/t_l1vLyxRcuB6m83KA74-Q/h0/SPRuddZCdaWWcFK2vYbWW5r8MvTaoepawBxJ7le5UBo)** **[RSVP now](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqZX2PdWyOQ6xu2o0VXnEnQxQBs9trK9jCkjFwwxiRDXhBwsVGisASjAZIqpDjOmV7Uff3DEyiPR1Pi9tQl_V_vENXb8POTbGJDyJGMyQJNKeR87u3SMbqkrwgnWzAT8LbBokqVMROCf1-fbc3_fEmsxo2A9qXZ7lFDgJniNjEyw96Hvuj9zcSDp_zoUzfkEvHkvFyZveH9UzVD4TkcQyn46aqWOjadc1JMt8skYbFWVYOyQZzS45_9yLL-X0srrh7E7AH5mvWsNu2gvuWwqQrTg/3yx/t_l1vLyxRcuB6m83KA74-Q/h1/TgAAy6T1MYzWMkVNjc24I_b70xhBU6RgvwYIagMZ6D0)** If you haven’t been to a WFP postcard party yet, here’s what to expect. Before the call, we’ll send you a link to meet with our organizers. You can join from anywhere with an internet connection. Our organizers will help you download the free Reach app, which will help you find anyone you know in Philadelphia who’s a registered voter. With just a few clicks, you’ll have sent out physical postcards (with your picture on it!) explaining what’s at stake this November. Cards and postage are on us. Postcard parties just like these helped propel Senator John Fetterman to a strong victory over Dr. Oz. With just a few clicks, you’ll have sent out physical postcards (with your picture on it!) explaining what’s at stake this November. Cards and postage are on us. Postcard parties just like these helped propel Senator John Fetterman to a strong victory over Dr. Oz. And by joining a postcard party this week, you can help make sure that Kendra and Nic reach everyone they need to before the November election. In solidarity, Team WFP Paid for by Working Families Party IE Committee () and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

name: Team AOC
subject: Are you on some of these other political email lists?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Here’s what we believe:
#
Are you on other political email lists?
If so, you probably regularly receive urgent and panicky emails asking for money. Too many politicians and organizations see their grassroots supporters as an ATM machine. They use scare tactics, guilt and shame, and downright misleading language to coax people into donating.
It’s bad, and getting worse. **Team AOC is determined to rise above that and treat you and our other grassroots supporters with respect.** Here’s what we believe:
\- Instead of scaring you to donate, we want to inspire you to take action.
\- Instead of guilt-tripping you for not donating enough, we want our emails to provide value to you. We try to send out informative, educational content.
\- Instead of misleading you about fake 5X matches or faux threats, we’re honest with you about what’s going on and how you can help.
\- Instead of only hitting you up when we need money, we’ll also send you opportunities to volunteer or help other candidates and causes who need it.
**But just like all the other campaigns in your inbox, we do have fundraising goals and deadlines.** Everything we raise each quarter is detailed in our public FEC report, and we want to post the biggest possible fundraising numbers. But we’re not going to scare or scam you into donating. We’ll just ask nicely because your donations to AOC are important and meaningful.
[Would you be able to make a $3 contribution to help us reach our August fundraising goal? Every single donation will truly make a difference. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230821.F3Kr2R&refcode=em20230821-4854-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4854%2E2526796%2E5ONHF5)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230821.F3Kr2R&refcode=em20230821-4854-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4854%2E2526796%2E5ONHF5)**
If you can’t make a donation today, that’s okay too. We still want you here, and we still appreciate you reading our emails.
The truth is that this email list is powerful. It’s powerful precisely because you’re here, with so many others. It’s powerful because when so many of us take collective action all at once, we can make real change.
So, maybe you can’t [donate right now.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230821.F3Kr2R&refcode=em20230821-4854-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4854%2E2526796%2E5ONHF5) But maybe you’ll get something of value from the next email we send. Or perhaps you’ll join us for a volunteer activity down the road.
No matter what, we’re glad you’re here. Thanks for being part of this movement,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230821?refcode=em20230821-4854-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=22&refcode2=4854_2526796_5ONHF5&akid=4854%2E2526796%2E5ONHF5)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230821-4854-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=23&akid=4854%2E2526796%2E5ONHF5)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=4854%2E2526796%2E5ONHF5) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=4854%2E2526796%2E5ONHF5) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=4854%2E2526796%2E5ONHF5)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=4854%2E2526796%2E5ONHF5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=4854%2E2526796%2E5ONHF5)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

August 21, 2023 Bringing _you_ the latest news, updates and what you _need to know_ about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio **Happy Monday!**
---
|
---
# Three Things to Know This Week:
---
1. Matt Dolan launches new statewide ad highlighting crisis at southern border.

2. Matt’s campaign surpasses 200 endorsements!

3. Sherrod Brown exposed for dodging tax payments, breaking ethics rules.

---
# Get up to speed...
---
|
---
**Matt Dolan launches new statewide ad highlighting crisis at southern border.**
* Matt’s latest campaign ad, being released today, shines a spotlight on the crisis of fentanyl flooding into the United States through our southern border.

* The ad paints a stark contrast between Senator Sherrod Brown, who last year told NBC News: “I don’t hear a lot about immigration from voters except from people on the far-right.”

* Matt understands that this is not a left or right issue – it is an issue that affects all Americans.

** **
---
[](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=d8c41438a879460b973e61cd24315f9a&_e=-CWH8T9dIEtdRh-Sa0PED-0Gk48abYY-CG_DmPyBs2Vhf0emxhZGiEnzcwXpisao4aHDiTiEMYYN84MC86vqVRqKB_SiLRJ4UcdQYvcno0myqdL7H24m2jPrXy6twqRXMBitJh1sY5GzDyitZjanfd0XaMVLhjueSd4cqvFM1zsv1eKx20Vb3jfkN3oQSA-FkZOrmuUF8mT7Crm3MnoHSY-cP5IZgomAkwl2-X8w3dVKZTVTcvvOvCWZBKSKSJVQzAqSu7rKHjSgYz2eh57b0KcYyk29bkVD_lacD_liqz_liyijIMqjBpqElJq0nncb)
---
| | | [ **WATCH HERE** ](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=d8c41438a879460b973e61cd24315f9a&_e=-CWH8T9dIEtdRh-Sa0PED-0Gk48abYY-CG_DmPyBs2Vhf0emxhZGiEnzcwXpisao4aHDiTiEMYYN84MC86vqVRqKB_SiLRJ4UcdQYvcno0myqdL7H24m2jPrXy6twqRXMBitJh1sY5GzDyitZjanfTnoTg_8JPbGI32UpU0loSvm_bYe-rPEHwF6FiSaGbt2GTEviAp-kVh0kiV2Il65BZKS30BxqC6t26aY_q1Hr_eRFeQvGU9YWVNj3Hdsy2wpFXM4khj-1Zea7ErzpMajFGx4Ve0GuhjGiAdkKItRR5TW-XG5PSu9_Agr6y4VVpN3)
---
|
---
**Matt’s campaign surpasses 200 endorsements.
**
* Last week, Matt’s campaign reached another milestone, surpassing 200 total endorsements.

* Crawford County Commissioner Larry Schmidt, Highland Heights Mayor Chuck Brunello, Jr., and Madeira Vice Mayor Doug Moormann all endorsed Matt’s run for US Senate.

* In their respective endorsements, they praised Matt’s principled leadership and ability to achieve conservative results for the people of Ohio.

---
| | [](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=d8c41438a879460b973e61cd24315f9a&_e=-CWH8T9dIEtdRh-Sa0PED-0Gk48abYY-CG_DmPyBs2Vhf0emxhZGiEnzcwXpisao4aHDiTiEMYYN84MC86vqVRqKB_SiLRJ4UcdQYvcno0myqdL7H24m2jPrXy6twqRXMBitJh1sY5GzDyitZjanfS2zCN03URiT3_OQTCIlEkQxP9ysB4EsVvWj8x3EmXhcEA30bHQ4VQ1G3UP3--si8vYttJncZUbgLv1caoETPgwFCyaqmM3WoNBNCPKuLsRUmICcAOWBZSSkS83rTeDLmDNEfrl-k38InxsvGpy8IIPqxZn5kXEwRNc6sCrF85xt)

---
| | |
---
**Sherrod Brown exposed for dodging tax payments, breaking ethics rules**
* Sherrod Brown [lied on multiple past finance forms](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=d8c41438a879460b973e61cd24315f9a&_e=-CWH8T9dIEtdRh-Sa0PED2WpisjT_Azj1kvFanzZ2Eg3FeBHsJesulsUPEPTeufAejnuz5CH4b5G6x_Inc3_aKC7O1fcn-N6vILC4fyv6CzfxE6pktU8By9SkW85oANO38m-sW4T_YxmoxanWutPfMZl3bEUmNRtuAt8yvfO7PswSdDawQRszy6ARFtnt_2oHQrlpt1gK05HVEggBlRDh9M9P16LpHxrXU-L5GGU-wlTnE2JmyDf1zR2l88endo6FMFmFYCx_d2Ktnk3B74DFPyCtYJ_X_KC31gBQB4WPz-ciGsdlw-hmxf4iegWJ9ixDmCwMN6gerFfESWMDnyxZA%3D%3D), failing to disclose his wife’s six-figure investment and pension payments, deflating his net worth by as much as half-a-million dollars.

* Brown is building up quite a track record. Earlier this very year, Brown also received an extra property tax credit and racked up penalties for late payments, [according to _NBC News_](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=d8c41438a879460b973e61cd24315f9a&_e=-CWH8T9dIEtdRh-Sa0PED1ph-baa6WwooqyDpquCX2jgD67Sb53WDO6rSIxd7XiXPyssSCKEVN1nul_z2NCxqrxmu5QQW2EqVyqoKbJA0ZGQx9mih25BPfX-YJdgWw2St1FmlXQbwL98q3CtMADe2xKQe-U1tnZdOf1EVKJG5SBdN0kszigF5HYP01wB-xQODRUqsyuhW7EM_mHfSEew0d4q28XnztIIieSo1KYmdOjK1-6Se0xbmiXWMYttO0mjC9It40DJwKjT-fpKmqnD7iNtbbEuMlDosJiwFYSHg0Ixns_ozSxsRaVgO_DnLdIH).

* “Sherrod Brown has been in Washington, DC so long, he’s completely lost track of reality and his own hypocrisy,” Matt Dolan told The Post. “After voting to raise Ohioans’ taxes, Brown got caught dodging his own tax payments. Now he’s guilty of ignoring the same ethics rules he used to attack Republicans.”

---
| | [](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=d8c41438a879460b973e61cd24315f9a&_e=-CWH8T9dIEtdRh-Sa0PED70ptL2CK9YXtizOCCLKy9HMGJWoFCZ8i1OjUlL4ks5BL9rN4vL57aut_HfORezoR3pZ53GZh_LLtn-ie0u04bN-wd3-2aiZz-jkdyb2XZEjb0GlgsTaqkjEPli9HYdyJ8dduvlMdx_1pwV0JDvNlh-Z6esaWKZxZ5u_CDMQTdZ-EOkR3BIx5d1q26dSWDHVq81laFGqCcFvO1qsM1N9iOFNa2K7w3hNUhws2_33YJu4T8EomLgJA2Edt3PrFFrByXYsZXDMbEXbCZ0GbPEiaWA%3D)

Matt Dolan needs your help to bring our conservative voices to the U.S. Senate, consider contributing below to help us WIN in Ohio!

Matt’s latest campaign ad, being released today, shines a spotlight on the crisis of fentanyl flooding into the United States through our southern border. The ad paints a stark contrast between Senator Sherrod Brown, who last year told NBC News: “I don’t hear a lot about immigration from voters except from people on the far-right.” Matt understands that this is not a left or right issue – it is an issue that affects all Americans. | | | | Matt’s campaign surpasses 200 endorsements. Last week, Matt’s campaign reached another milestone, surpassing 200 total endorsements. Crawford County Commissioner Larry Schmidt, Highland Heights Mayor Chuck Brunello, Jr., and Madeira Vice Mayor Doug Moormann all endorsed Matt’s run for US Senate. In their respective endorsements, they praised Matt’s principled leadership and ability to achieve conservative results for the people of Ohio. | | | | | Sherrod Brown exposed for dodging tax payments, breaking ethics rules Sherrod Brown , failing to disclose his wife’s six-figure investment and pension payments, deflating his net worth by as much as half-a-million dollars. Brown is building up quite a track record. Earlier this very year, Brown also received an extra property tax credit and racked up penalties for late payments, . * “Sherrod Brown has been in Washington, DC so long, he’s completely lost track of reality and his own hypocrisy,” Matt Dolan told The Post. “After voting to raise Ohioans’ taxes, Brown got caught dodging his own tax payments. Now he’s guilty of ignoring the same ethics rules he used to attack Republicans.” | | | | | | | | | Interested in joining Team Dolan? Matt Dolan needs your help to bring our conservative voices to the U.S. Senate, consider contributing below to help us WIN in Ohio! | | | Forward this email to a friend! Visit DolanforOhio.com for more information on Matt Dolan’s campaign. | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

| | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | ************** I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

But there’s also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn’t what it used to be.

I’ve been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That’s the American way.

The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That’s 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.
My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. **********

---
| | [ Join the Sun Now → ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ad9460a7e2a64a999e44b1c17abfc770&_e=5jNmOkOzBZwOMyJY2raXygFIt2dYqXsHGoZhI6BbMmMKTXdpmtwxtK2bExUHwZh4JINJJ6ODc1nsD8zXNhWbXNWqgwBZT3Vq0Pd5ME240z4gj8f0esyUPhxWnl7nC5u7F0Jg-wB_GDMRy1yzkA5gvIhYJfYLFk5-hlMUjPB0mydThwZpXafZhEnlShmPEqAkrkO_TbR_by0cy5y22Tey0J6K3ERiKQ8pj69eH0nmZf4BhlqYruF_Ozdoo1GiJoS4XLcqRq24wWRpBhm4N9_E2UvEM5WZlzeSIu3F0-xNhKo%3D)
---
| | ****** Please join me in the fight to restore America’s journalism.
This is one mission that our country desperately needs.**
---
| | |
---

Larry Kudlow
Columnist for The New York Sun

a

the

Kansas

jobs

district
nationwide,

the

to

to

jobs,

and

the
climate
crisis.
*
*
Bipartisan
wins
for
Kansas:
Sharice
wrote
a
guest
column
in
the
Kansas
City
Star
to
highlight
the
accomplishments
of
the
bipartisan
Federal
Aviation
Administration
reauthorization,

of

amendments
which
will
improve
safety

and
invest
in

control
towers.
Read
Sharice’s
guest
column
here.
[https://www.kansascity.com/opinion/readers-opinion/guest-commentary/article277486728.html]
*
*
Delivering
for
veterans:
Sharice
introduced
legislation
to
support
veteran
small
business
owners
and
entrepreneurs.
This
bipartisan
legislation
was

by

*

so

feel

and
protected.

clean_body: Sharice has been working hard in Congress to deliver for Kansas families, and we wanted to give you a few updates from her work in Washington and right here in Kansas’ 3rd district. First, if you can, please chip in $20 or any amount to support our work. Every donation we receive is important to ensuring we stay on track to keep Sharice fighting for us beyond 2024. [==] Check out what Sharice has been working on below! == [==] Expanding rural broadband: At a Small Business Committee hearing, Sharice highlighted the importance of investing in rural broadband here in Kansas and across the nation. Sharice has led bipartisan legislation to invest in rural broadband so that families and businesses in rural Kansas can access high-speed internet. Creating jobs: Sharice announced that Kansas’ 3rd district has created more clean energy jobs than any other congressional district nationwide, thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act passed last year. Sharice was the only member of Kansas’ congressional delegation to vote for this critical legislation to create jobs, lower costs, and fight the climate crisis. Bipartisan wins for Kansas: Sharice wrote a guest column in the Kansas City Star to highlight the accomplishments of the bipartisan Federal Aviation Administration reauthorization, including two of Sharice’s amendments which will improve safety outcomes and invest in modernizing control towers. Read Sharice’s guest column here. [] Delivering for veterans: Sharice introduced legislation to support veteran small business owners and entrepreneurs. This bipartisan legislation was unanimously approved by the House Small Business Committee because our veterans deserve to be supported when they complete their service. Fighting the fentanyl crisis: Sharice joined local leaders at Shawnee Mission West to discuss the importance of addressing the fentanyl crisis and protecting everyone in our communities, especially young people. As the new school year begins, Sharice will continue working with local, state, and federal leaders to ensure this crisis is addressed. * Investing in public safety: Sharice joined the Overland Park Police Department for a tour and ride-along with a police officer. As a daughter of a law enforcement officer, Sharice knows the importance of supporting our local law enforcement so folks in our community feel safe and protected. And this is just some of what’s been going on with Team Sharice. Everyone who has supported Sharice through volunteering, donating, attending an event, or anything else is the reason she has been able to get so much done. Hillary Scholten

[From: Rep. Jill Tokuda <jill@tokudaforhawaii.com>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68452751/423063372/1689853541?refcode=HillaryScholten&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjI3M2JjZS03MzQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hYqX9IS-0hJrKCZ0wDndP9XczjFQj3ZgPOCE--yUeGI=)
Date: Wed, Aug 16, 2023 at 5:00 PM
Subject: Heartbreaking losses in Hawaii

Dear Colleagues,

Thank you for reaching out to offer support. What we are experiencing on Maui is heartbreaking, something you pray will never happen to your family or in your community.

Our hearts will be forever heavy with the unimaginable loss of life and devastation. Unfortunately these losses are only expected to grow in the coming days and weeks.

Hundreds of loved ones remain missing, thousands of homes and businesses have been wiped out. We can never fully recover from this tragedy, but I hope the country will come together in this dark time and show their Aloha to the people of Maui.

We’ve already seen an outpouring of support, but our kamaʻāina that have lost everything still have a long road to recovery ahead of them. [_**There are several local organizations providing direct relief to those in need, and 100% of your contribution will support them.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68452752/423063373/1689853541?refcode=HillaryScholten&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjI3M2JjZS03MzQwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hYqX9IS-0hJrKCZ0wDndP9XczjFQj3ZgPOCE--yUeGI=)
Thank you for helping me spread the word.

With Aloha,

Jill

After being on the ground with him in New Hampshire and Iowa, I know it is more important than ever that we protect the America First movement. Joe Biden has only emboldened our enemies, and President Trump is the leader that will Make America Great Again. It's no secret that President Trump is under attack by the Democrats because they can't stand to see his poll numbers soar and will do anything they can to ensure he doesn't take back the White House next year. **[Democrats in D.C. are seemingly attempting to DESTROY our country's values from within, so Americans must do all we can to support America First.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=20857a80702d46919b141b7b76c1e414&_e=ZIdsDBmjJTVBAv47PAUhmEUWZ5Rq9zPOYVCnffRkC5hfIO131rP1_5h6Y-uGlwI7VA8wi2GGwHXMjU2nqvOKAWlDrVM8mxLfQXEzcgMI6kg29O9Z3fSNvtgHambwTcEd-YCoOYTLnRy8E2XJcXKrL5WjyUb2eThPPRt2Xt6FsKlA5oGgbm7SG-4PkNzaK-20KHFwQRclqM6eo3M5qXSy8blYTrTykA2TPCiBoIH_RNsMfSojDJjI7R2hZ3uZHiHiaQflEaRnqphy213xBhY9uZ2XVNSNnV1Wkn2PZf1ahwwBwVOg6BcKgyxzDBl9t8-bx-d-rlIJmvdQxwd8R0efOSiOvnhpL2_BGozpFy4nnffgSXPi6KdTzkplcs5iOmFUCglSy02vppJF84VLYMDWpA%3D%3D)**

body:
It's not hard to recognize someone worth helping. I've identified Tim Sheehy as someone I think would be tremendous to work with and I need your help to get him to Washington.

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=47fb93af1944416c8456ae7b4977a180&_e=OxBQ-ALn9BGggHHpDWr_2IzUGw_vzoOErQEyrKN32Au6faX1bfxaRSYVTPbxjLf6WoR1b6nH_MSKewsWXSpvXN61rHLtFIXxgGHvAgF1u9p6Ue_rZrPL3myEU-ynLh7cWUqg9s8gzqlRvkRA_uOsJ_rdfg3cN6Fp5MPH8MFioG8CBkpPeJvEy7sCfSMW5DNfviRivu_ti6OBK2Ra7xIZC4F4xm9pw16rmmU6OWOL2EHTXYcasRjnM4V7fGd39WgK0BRVYHTBZeHJpNaL4LSb_awE5dIX1iSx_StSQ6nH7Gw%3D)

Friend,

It's Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I'm in need of a favor.

**Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer 's foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win. **

You see, Jon Tester has successfully pulled the wool over voters' eyes into sending him to Washington on their behalf since 2006. How, I don't know. Because the reality is his views are not at all in line with the views of voters in Montana. His voting record would give him a real easy time being elected in Oregon, California, or Massachusetts.

**_Let 's put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate._** If you don't want to read to the end of this note, please make sure you click this link to donate to help Navy Seal Tim Sheehy WIN and FLIP the Senate RED before you close out your browser.

After 16 years of Jon Tester voting in lock step for a liberal agenda, we Republicans have a real shot at ousting him next November thanks to Navy SEAL veteran Tim Sheehy who is running this go around. We can't afford another six years of votes for big government, deficit spending, raising taxes, open borders and climate extremism.

Tim is a very impressive candidate and I know he'd make a **GREAT U.S. Senator.**
He needs our help, which is why I'm personally reaching out to ask you to get involved today.

**[Please, send him a large donation right now.](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=47fb93af1944416c8456ae7b4977a180&_e=OxBQ-ALn9BGggHHpDWr_2IzUGw_vzoOErQEyrKN32Au6faX1bfxaRSYVTPbxjLf6WoR1b6nH_MSKewsWXSpvXN61rHLtFIXxgGHvAgF1u9p6Ue_rZrPL3myEU-ynLh7cthZgLJ-AaBSKuY_blTkFVmxYGgSlixB5mF812FxLUoTp4V7v4ioh-ZVoGXomqRgPLiiRpZOMvuq0erWp1r7bkxSMwI69DoKqdqqpugyKMLPT1qCfetpW5MQDb6jt4OHZzNAiv-h9hGF7hpcBQVFgXgnnewoClsDX5-f_r1vRUkM%3D)** I'll leave it up to you what you consider to be large, but please know that he'll put your gift to the best possible use. Fellow conservative,

I’m thrilled to tell you about an exciting candidate who is poised to become the future of the Republican Party.

**Kevin Lincoln** just launched his campaign for California’s 9th Congressional District against one of the most vulnerable Democrat incumbents in 2024.

[**This is a top-target House seat that I know Kevin can flip RED with your support.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b1a002d6fc1a4f5ab8e6bf8c89a8a2ab&_e=EgBg_qJ-qsapjFtFqitHCax0geuLu8u8_41sSR2yb0EAfpZD4qlAAh2iOZlops3_sZuDJ7gBAS-lSb8R1sixPyU7_JmcFu1P-L1tYZa3aNUzQaSUzjSlDWe7l6mJg6c4OqcwRq1TxJwcsNAokJBLuQld0_FkdERjbN-oLiqJRJSXM2Lrz48bU1PLANUGSLFL2WF3qM5C5hPPer6YamTdYBlIUiGab-vHogjnpjs3BNzIZb0eKOdLPVTZnLEVGOk0P9HYM3jwBJb1_EYpEP6t7Ppk8IpXfUDgs1eJef9cMAJ9p383V5myxdyc2VvIWaxg3LhpuUc6APIzJTBiyTgSCbsr8e8sZyTlOzcGKhNRi830P5Kmy9IPbCh0IZXs3rnEmWrK_EYEIT-XWBJ2Jqt_MslqMSBhRV8IikwyAGyCr1w%3D) Here’s why Kevin can win, and why he needs and deserves your backing:

If I could describe Kevin in just one word, it would be “LEADER.”

Kevin is a **Marine Corps veteran** who served on the Marine One aircraft protecting the president after 9/11. He later went on to earn his degree while raising a family and **working in the private sector.** Eventually, Kevin decided his hometown needed new leadership and he defeated a formidable Democrat incumbent to become **mayor of one of California’s largest cities.** As mayor, Kevin has helped his city recover from the harmful COVID lockdowns while also tackling crime and homelessness.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b1a002d6fc1a4f5ab8e6bf8c89a8a2ab&_e=EgBg_qJ-qsapjFtFqitHCax0geuLu8u8_41sSR2yb0EAfpZD4qlAAh2iOZlops3_sZuDJ7gBAS-lSb8R1sixPyU7_JmcFu1P-L1tYZa3aNUzQaSUzjSlDWe7l6mJg6c4OqcwRq1TxJwcsNAokJBLuQld0_FkdERjbN-oLiqJRJSXM2Lrz48bU1PLANUGSLFL2WF3qM5C5hPPer6YamTdYBlIUiGab-vHogjnpjs3BNzIZb0eKOdLPVTZnLEVGOk0W6HPz4z1PZUBhqdam-9nngFXJC8PmSI4f31kES5GBZemL8GVkDqTf8CfcJmD09ovS14M6QfM-C32t9X34QKXZC5kU0OXUcglyHPyGq65Fa3JOjLsKU_SxBGJarp9jMUxLRHPtTXYJxCp2DeIU2N8IPCQfieupNDqBbNNj-oFYAY%3D)

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

clean_body: I'll keep up the fight in the Senate, and I'm counting on you to stay in the fight, too. | | | | | I first ran for Senate because I saw how the system is rigged for the rich and powerful and against everyone else. I saw how Republican lawmakers – backed by special interests – were working for their wealthy buddies at every level of government. Frankly, I won because voters saw it too. Democrats can be proud of what we’ve accomplished since then. That includes recently securing abortion access in states like Ohio, Michigan, and Kansas, and making the biggest-ever investment in fighting climate change. I’ll be the first to say there’s more we’ve got to do, which is why I’m running for re-election. But we can’t just focus on federal races — and the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee has a powerfully important role to play at the state level. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

We've built a movement that's run by people, not Super PACs. | | Fellow American, In less than 48 hours, I'll take the stage for my first political debate - EVER, When I launched this campaign in late February, we were polling at 0%. Washington insiders weren't paying attention. But, Fellow American, now they are. I want to make a big splash on Wednesday night - but we also need to raise as much money as possible between now and the time I take the debate stage in Milwaukee. Before the day is over, I want to secure an additional 500 donations to Team Vivek to show the DC Establishment the strength of our movement. - that doesn't matter to me. It's the fact that you're in this fight with me. I am not counting on Super PACs to fund this campaign - I am counting on you. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights.
